title: Real Estate Virtual Assistant - Digital Marketing Focused
description:
NOW HIRING: Digital Marketing Virtual Assistant – Real Estate (Remote) 

• Job Type: Remote (Virtual)

• Schedule: Monday to Friday

• Working Hours: Minimum required overlap between 12:00AM to 6:00AM PH Time (preferred 12:00AM to 7:00AM PH Time)

• Hours: 30-40 hours/week

• Compensation: $5-8/ hour (based on experience and qualifications)

• Start Date: ASAP



We are seeking a highly creative and detail-oriented Digital Marketing Virtual Assistant to support my real estate marketing and online content projects. You’ll help bring video, website, flyers, and social media ideas to life through clean design, SEO-friendly posting, and consistent branding. This is an ideal role for someone who thrives in a fast-paced environment, has strong attention to detail, and is experienced with digital tools and marketing platforms.



You’ll be a great fit if you love organization, enjoy creative digital work, and can manage multiple marketing platforms seamlessly. This position offers the opportunity for long-term growth within a supportive, systems-driven business.



Responsibilities Include:



Video Editing: Expert-level editing in CapCut — trim, brand, caption, music, and produce short-form and long-form videos.



YouTube Management: Upload and optimize videos for SEO (titles, tags, descriptions, thumbnails, playlists).



Website Updates: Design and maintain pages on WIX, ensuring professional layouts and mobile-friendly performance.



Graphic Design: Create branded social graphics, flyers, and thumbnails in Canva using consistent brand colors and fonts.



Organization: Manage shared folders, files, and workflow in Google Drive/Docs/Sheets.



Content Scheduling: Assist in posting content to YouTube, websites, and social platforms:
, Insta, LinkedIn, and Google Business according to a marketing calendar.



Qualifications



Minimum 2 years of experience as a Digital Marketing VA or similar role

CapCut expertise (portfolio or samples required)

Familiarity with WIX, Canva, Google and YouTube SEO best practices

Excellent written and spoken English

Highly organized, reliable, and attentive to detail

Able to follow written and video SOPs

Comfortable working independently and meeting deadlines



• Creating and maintaining SOPs via Asana and Loom for recurring business processes and project management

• Researching content creation via ChatGPT and Claude

• Managing & organizing cloud-based files and collaborative documents in Google Drive

• Assisting with social media scheduling and content creation

• Editing short-form video content using CapCut

• Designing branded materials in Canva (flyers, social media posts, thumbnails, etc.)

• Uploading and optimizing videos on YouTube & YouTube Studio

• Making edits and updates to our Wix websites



Ideal Candidate Profile:

• Minimum 1–2 years of experience in a similar role

• Strong time management and project tracking abilities

• Excellent written and verbal communication skills

• High level of integrity, discretion, and professionalism

• Strong familiarity with digital tools such as Canva, CapCut, WIX, YouTube Studio, Google,
, Asana, Loom, and CRMs

• Ability to work independently with minimal supervision

• Familiarity with real estate workflows or terminology is a plus



Requirements:

• Fluent in written and spoken English

• Must work exclusively for us (no other clients)

• Experience with United States real estate transactions and MLS systems is a strong asset

• Must have your own device, VPN access to Denver, Colorado, and STABLE internet connection



To Apply:



 your resume in pdf format to 
 with the subject line: Virtual Assistant Application – [Your Name]



Special Application Request:

To help us understand your communication and tech skills, please submit the following with your resume:

1. A 1–2 minute Loom or video recording introducing yourself and sharing one system or tool you’ve used to improve efficiency in a past role

2. A sample of your video work (e.g., Youtube video)



 SKILL REQUIREMENT

Real Estate. Attention to Detail. English Proficiency.

title: Senior Amazon PPC Manager, Vendor Central + Pacvue (UK Agency)
description:
Senior Amazon PPC Manager, Vendor Central + Pacvue (UK Agency)



We are a UK-based Amazon agency managing Pan-European accounts across Europe. We work over multiple categories and help brands launch into the UK and EU.



We are hiring one experienced Amazon PPC Manager to take ownership of a Vendor Central account for a major client. This is not a generic Seller Central role. You must be fluent in Vendor Central and confident working in Pacvue as the main client tool. The account hosts multiple brands under one vendor account, and your ability to cleanly segment strategy, budgets, reporting, and campaign structure across brands is essential.



What you will do



- Own the full PPC lifecycle for one Vendor Central account containing multiple brands: Sponsored Products, Sponsored Brands, Sponsored Display etc.

- Structure campaigns, naming conventions, and reporting so each brand within the account is managed and reported on independently

- Work natively in Pacvue for campaign management, bid automation, and reporting

- Plan and execute strategy across UK and in future EU marketplaces (keyword research, campaign structure, budget pacing, bid strategy, competitor targeting, defensive ranking)

- Run PPC for major events: Prime Day, Black Friday, Cyber Monday, Lightning Deals

- Produce weekly and monthly client reports with clear commentary, not just dashboards

- Work with our in-house content, listing, and logistics teams to align PPC with launches, restocks, and pricing changes

- Own ACOS and TACOS targets per brand within the account



You must have



- 4+ years hands-on Amazon PPC experience, with meaningful time in Vendor Central (not only Seller Central)

- Hands-on experience with Pacvue is strongly preferred. If you have used Skai or Perpetua at Vendor scale instead, mention it and be specific about what you used it for

- Experience managing multiple brands within a single account, with clean segmentation

- Proven management of at least $30k+ per month in ad spend

- Deep knowledge of Amazon EU or UK marketplaces (not just US)

- Fluent written and spoken English

- Strong Excel or Google Sheets skills (pivot tables, bulk sheet manipulation)

- Ability to overlap at least 4 hours with UK time (9am to 5pm GMT or BST). Some calls with US client afternoon UK time will be necessary

- Reliable internet, backup power, own workstation



Tools and AI



We want to understand exactly what you use day to day. In your application, list:



- Every Amazon PPC tool you have hands-on experience with and for each one say whether you used it daily, occasionally, or just trialled it

- If you have used Pacvue, tell us specifically: which modules , for how long, and one concrete thing you built or optimized in it



Any AI tools you use in your PPC workflow (Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini, custom GPTs, Zapier or Make automations tied to AI, etc.), with a specific example of how you use them in real work



We actively use AI tools internally and want someone who thinks about how to use them to work faster and smarter, not someone pretending to.



Nice to have



Experience with Amazon DSP

Experience across multiple EU languages or working with localized listings

Experience with Amazon SAS Pro

Experience reconciling Vendor Central ad performance against shipped COGS and sell-through data



The package



Full-time, fully remote

Salary: $1,800 to $3,000 per month depending on experience

Paid time off: 15 days per year plus UK or Philippine public holidays (your choice)

Long-term role, no short contracts



To apply

Send:



- Apply officially with the title 'PPC Manager Application - FAO [insert the name of our 'CO-Founder]

- Your CV

- A short Loom (or other) video (3 to 5 minutes) walking through an Amazon Vendor Central PPC campaign you are proud of: the problem, your strategy, and the result with actual numbers. If you have Pacvue experience, show it or talk about it specifically. If you do not have access to Vendor Central, feel free to run through some data you have presenting your work.

- Your written answer to this scenario: "You inherit a Vendor Central account with four brands running under it. Overall account ACOS is 45%, but the client's target is 20%. Two brands are profitable, two are not. Walk me through the first three things you would check and the first three actions you would take. 

- If you have Pacvue experience, also tell us which reports or automations in Pacvue you would use to diagnose this faster."

Your tools and AI list as described above.



Applications missing the Loom video or the tools and AI list will not be considered.

title: Customer Service Specialist
description:
Customer Service & Client Relationship Specialist



Adelfia Insurance is seeking a Customer Service & Client Relationship Specialist to join one of the top-performing insurance offices in Los Angeles. This role is primarily focused on servicing our current clients and protecting relationships within our existing book of business, while also helping identify cross-sell opportunities and strengthening customer retention.



You will be responsible for delivering top-quality service to current customers while helping generate growth through our existing client base.



(PLEASE READ CAREFULLY BEFORE APPLYING)

Must speak and write English at an expert level

Full-time position: Monday–Friday, 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM Pacific Standard Time

Spanish speaking is preferred but not required

Responsibilities:

Primary Focus: Customer Service & Retention

Answer inbound phone calls and provide top-quality service to current customers

Perform policy reviews with current customers

Handle billing questions and payment inquiries

Provide Auto ID Cards, policy documents, and Certificates of Insurance

Solve underwriting, inspection, and policy servicing issues

Assist customers with claims reporting and claim follow-up

Handle Notice of Cancellations and retention outreach

Attempt to save policies at risk of cancelling

Manage CRM tasks, notes, and follow-up activity

Maintain strong relationships with customers through excellent communication

Secondary Focus: Growth Through Existing Customers

Make outbound calls to current customers for relationship check-ins

Ask for Google reviews and referrals from happy customers

Identify cross-sell opportunities such as:

Auto + Home bundles

Additional vehicles or drivers

Commercial policies

Life insurance opportunities

Warm transfer qualified opportunities to licensed agents or schedule callbacks

Help customers uncover gaps in coverage so they are properly protected

Who We’re Looking For:



We are looking for self-driven individuals who are “A” players and want to make a great living.



You should be someone who:



Enjoys helping people and solving problems

Communicates confidently and professionally

Learns quickly and follows systems well

Has a positive attitude and strong work ethic

Takes ownership of daily responsibilities

Is comfortable speaking with customers all day

Naturally looks for opportunities to help customers further protect themselves

Experience:



Insurance experience is not required. We provide strong training, systems, and support. If you bring the right attitude, work ethic, and communication skills, we will help you succeed.



Work Environment:

Fast-paced

Positive and team-oriented

Organized and accountable

Results-driven



Your main goal will always be to put the customer’s best interest first while delivering excellent service and helping grow client relationships.

title: Executive Assistant (Operations & Logistics) – Landscape Maintenance
description:
Job Title: Executive Assistant (Operations & Logistics) – Landscape Maintenance

Job Overview:

We are seeking a highly organized, proactive Executive Assistant to support our Landscape Maintenance Manager. Our business is growing fast, and we need a "right-hand" person to handle the administrative side of our field operations. You will be responsible for ensuring no client lead is missed, quotes are sent within hours, and our field crews are scheduled efficiently.

Key Responsibilities:

Rapid Client Response: Monitor all incoming inquiries 
, Phone/VoIP, SMS). You will be the first point of contact, ensuring "speed-to-lead" by responding to new inquiries immediately.

Quote & Contract Management: Using our templates and pricing guides, you will draft professional estimates and service contracts. You will follow up with clients until the contract is signed.

Route & Crew Scheduling: Organize daily and weekly work schedules for multiple crews. You will optimize routes to minimize travel time and ensure all maintenance tickets are completed on time.

FSM Software Management: Maintain and update our Field Service Management (FSM) system in LMN (landscape maintenance network) with accurate client data and job notes.

Proactive Follow-ups: Act as the "buffer" for the Manager by following up on pending tasks, internal crew reports, and client feedback.

Required Skills & Qualifications:

Experience: At least 2–3 years of experience as an Executive or Operations Assistant, preferably for a service-based business (Landscaping, Construction, or Real Estate).

Technical Savvy: High proficiency in FSM tools like Jobber, ServiceTitan, or LMN is a massive plus.

Communication: Exceptional written and verbal English. You must be comfortable calling US/Canadian clients to confirm appointments.

Problem-Solving: The ability to "think ahead"—if a crew is delayed by rain, you are already rescheduling the afternoon and notifying the clients.

Working Hours & Compensation:

Schedule: [PST - 7:00Am - 3:00Pm]. This is a full-time, long-term role.

Pay: $5.00- 8$00 USD/Hr (depending on experience and FSM software proficiency).

How to Apply :

Send your resume and a 1-minute video introduction.

In your subject line, include the phrase: "Operations Pro for Mountain Home Services".

In your message, tell us which FSM or scheduling software you have used before.

title: B2B Sales VA - Logistics
description:
About the Role



We are looking for a highly motivated Shipping Sales & Booking Coordinator to manage both the sales and operations side of international freight shipments from the Far East to the USA. This role is ideal for someone with strong B2B sales experience, especially in outbound and inbound sales, who can confidently generate business, close deals, and oversee bookings from start to finish.



Key Responsibilities



Sales & Business Development

* Generate new business opportunities and close freight sales independently.

* Conduct outbound prospecting and handle inbound sales inquiries.

* Build and maintain strong B2B client relationships.

* Prepare competitive freight quotations for FCL, LCL, and Air Freight shipments.

* Negotiate pricing, rates, and service terms to maximize profitability.

* Grow and manage existing customer accounts for repeat business.



Booking & Shipping Operations

* Convert closed deals into confirmed bookings.

* Coordinate ocean and air freight shipments from the Far East to the USA.

* Liaise with overseas agents, carriers, and origin offices.

* Manage sailing schedules, booking cut-offs, and shipment timelines.

* Handle shipping documentation such as BL Instructions, ISF, AMS, invoices, and packing lists.

* Monitor shipments and proactively resolve delays or operational issues.



Customer Service & Account Management

* Serve as the main point of contact from booking through delivery.

* Provide regular shipment updates and ensure excellent customer satisfaction.

* Build long-term partnerships with customers.



Systems & Reporting

* Maintain accurate sales pipelines and shipment records in CRM/TMS systems.

* Coordinate billing and profitability reporting with the accounting team.



Qualifications

Required

* 3+ years of experience in freight forwarding, logistics, or shipping sales.

* Strong B2B sales background with proven success in closing deals.

* Experience in both outbound and inbound sales preferred.

* Hands-on knowledge of international freight operations (FCL/LCL required, air freight is a plus).

* Experience with Far East to USA shipping lanes.

* Knowledge of Incoterms, ISF, AMS, and U.S. import regulations.

* Excellent communication, negotiation, and customer service skills.



Preferred

* Existing client portfolio / book of business.

* Experience working with carriers, NVOCCs, and overseas agents.

* Familiarity with CRM and TMS systems.



Personal Qualities

* Sales-driven and results-oriented.

* Entrepreneurial mindset with strong ownership.

* Highly organized and detail-oriented.

* Customer-focused and proactive.

* Able to work independently in a fast-paced environment.



Apply now and join a growing logistics team where your sales and coordination skills can make an impact!

title: Custom Order Operations Specialist (EST)
description:
We are looking for an experienced and highly organized professional to join our team as a Custom Order Operations Specialist. If you have a background in order management, purchasing, vendor coordination, or operations, this may be the right opportunity for you.



This role requires someone who can manage multiple priorities, communicate effectively, and ensure custom orders are processed accurately from quotation stage through production and final delivery.



Position Overview



The Custom Order Operations Specialist will be responsible for managing incoming quote requests, coordinating with vendors, processing approved orders, and ensuring timely fulfillment while maintaining accurate records throughout the process.



Key Responsibilities



Quoting & Order Processing



• Review incoming custom quote requests and confirm complete product specifications

• Follow up internally or with customers when information is incomplete

• Request pricing and timelines from vendors

• Compare vendor quotes to requested specifications for accuracy

• Enter approved quotes into the internal system for processing



Order Fulfillment & Coordination



• Manage approved custom orders from start to finish

• Coordinate production schedules and monitor vendor progress

• Manage artwork files, proofs, approvals, and customer sign-off before production

• Create purchase orders and ensure complete documentation

• Track shipments and delivery schedules

• Maintain accurate updates in internal systems

• Resolve delays, discrepancies, and production issues as needed



Qualifications

title: Data Engineer – Platform Focus
description:
Role Summary

We are looking for a Data Engineer to join our team and help maintain and improve our data platform infrastructure. You will work under guidance to implement pipelines, monitor platform health, and assist in making our data reliable and accessible.



Key Responsibilities

Assist in testing, and maintaining data pipelines and workflows.

Support the development and maintenance of the data platform (warehouses, lakes, and storage solutions).

Learn and apply best practices for data modeling, governance, and quality.

Collaborate with the team to understand business requirements.

Help monitor and troubleshoot platform performance and data pipeline issues.

Document workflows, procedures, and platform configurations.



Required Skills & Experience

Basic SQL skills; comfort querying data and performing transformations.

Familiarity with at least one programming language (Python preferred).

Exposure to cloud-based data platforms (Snowflake, BigQuery, Redshift, etc.)

Experience with orchestration tools (Airflow, Prefect, dbt)

Strong attention to detail and problem-solving mindset.

Interest in building scalable, reliable data solutions.



Preferred Skills

Experience with version control (Git).

Knowledge of data visualization or BI tools (Tableau, Power BI, Looker)



You will be given a short assignment to assess your skills.  We are looking for someone that will ask questions if they don’t understand something and can follow directions really well.  We are also looking for someone who can collaborate with the team as well as working independently with little oversight.



KPIs

Achieve one significant project per month that improves the existing data infrastructure, including documentation, implementation, and maintenance scheduling.

title: Google Ads account audit and consultation
description:
We are a marketing agency based in The Hague, Netherlands, and we are looking for an experienced Google Ads specialist to perform a deep account audit and consultation for one of our client campaigns.



We prefer candidates who have worked with Google Ads accounts in the Dutch or broader European market, as familiarity with these markets will help you identify relevant patterns faster.



Background



The account has been generating 13 to 21 leads per week consistently over the past 6 weeks.

 

Starting Monday April 13, leads dropped sharply, with only 2 leads that day and none for the rest of the week until April 18. 

On Apr 18 a cleanup of search terms was done. Since then the account received 1 lead on Apr 19, 2 leads on Apr 20, and then again 0 leads on Apr 21 and Apr 22. 



Key facts

- No changes were made in Google Ads between March and April 18

- No website changes were made since end of February

- The website loads fast on desktop and mobile

- Ke yword search volumes have not changed significantly

- The contact form (Contact Form 7 on WordPress) has been tested daily and works correctly, with submissions appearing in the mail log

- GTM, GA4, and Google Ads conversion tracking have not been working for approximately one year, so the drop in leads is not primarily caused by a tracking issue. 

- Budget spend has remained consistent throughout this period



What we need



We need you to review the full account, identify what caused the lead drop, and provide a clear recommendation on how to restore performance. 



We expect a written summary of your findings and a prioritised action plan.



Requirements

- at least 2 years of hands-on experience managing lead generation search campaigns in Google Ads

- Experience working with Google Ads accounts in the Dutch or European market is strongly preferred

- Ability to diagnose performance drops beyond surface-level metrics

- Knowledge of GTM and GA4 tracking setups

- Clear written communication in English



Deliverables

- Full account audit

- Root cause analysis of the lead drop

- Written action plan with specific recommendations



How to apply



Please include the following in your application:

- The word “HAGUE” in the subject 

- Your rate for an initial 30-minute consultation

- Your rate for a full account audit

- Examples of similar audits you have completed

title: Full-Time YouTube Video Editor (Faceless Channels) – $30 per Video + Paid Test Project
description:
Job Title:



Full-Time YouTube Video Editor (Faceless Channels) – $30 per Video + Paid Test Project



Job Description:



Please read in full before responding or your application will not be considered. 



We are launching new YouTube faceless channels and currently testing multiple niches (facts, top lists, motivational, finance, health, and others). We have a large bank of videos ready to produce and are looking to hire 3 skilled video editors to join our remote team on a full-time basis.



You will receive the script and voiceover tool (Eleven Labs). Experience with ElevenLabs is a big plus.



Pay:



$30 per completed 30 minute video (equivalent to ~$1 per minute of final edited video)

Paid test project: $10 for editing a 1-minute sample video (payment will be immediate via paypal)

Consistent full-time workload with long-term opportunity. 

Weekly pay for all videos completed that week. (The faster you can complete high quality videos, the more videos we can assign you.) 



Bonuses

You will receive bonuses for the performance of the videos as follows.

100,000 views: +$25 bonus

500,000 views: +$50 additional bonus (total $75)

1,000,000 views: +$200 additional bonus (total $275 maximum per video)

$20 bonus for completing 3 videos in one week. Totalling $80/month if you do this every week for an entire month. 

This puts your on track earnings at roughly $400-$600/Month if you can produce 12 videos per month and reach a couple of view bonuses. 



Responsibilities:



Source your own relevant stock footage(we have a team stock footage subscription to Envanto as well) , B-roll, and images based on the script

Edit 30 minute engaging faceless YouTube videos

Add smooth cuts, dynamic transitions, text overlays, subtitles/captions, zoom/pan effects (Ken Burns), sound design, and background music

Color correct footage, enhance audio, and optimize pacing for high viewer retention

Deliver polished, YouTube-ready videos with proper organization

Complete each 30 minute video on a strict 48 hour timeline, this is non negotiable if you want the position. 







Requirements (Must-Have):



Strong understanding of the english language, we will not tolerate mismatched footage, spelling errors etc. 

 At least 1 year of professional video editing experience (YouTube faceless or similar channels preferred)

Strong proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro (DaVinci Resolve or Final Cut Pro acceptable)

Strong English proficiency – you must fully understand scripts and content to choose appropriate visuals and timing

Ability to find and select high-quality, relevant stock footage/B-roll that matches the script and niche

Experience with or willingness to learn ElevenLabs for voiceover generation (big plus if you already have it)

Reliable high-speed internet and a powerful computer for smooth 1080p/4K editing

Excellent time management – able to deliver high-quality work on tight deadlines

Self-motivated, detail-oriented, and able to work independently with minimal supervision



Example of videos you would be creating: 











How to Apply (Important – Follow Instructions Carefully):



1. Provide links to 3–5 examples of your best edited YouTube-style videos (faceless channels preferred – include links with timestamps if possible).



2. In your application message, include:



• Your years of video editing experience

• Editing software you are strongest with

• Confirmation that you can adhere to 48 hour turnaround time for a 30 b roll video like provided in the examples above.

• Confirmation that you can source your own stock footage/B-roll

• Any experience with ElevenLabs or AI voice tools (optional but mention if you have it)



3. We will review portfolios and invite selected applicants to complete a paid test project ($10). You will receive a short raw sample (script + voiceover) and instructions to edit a 1-minute test video, including sourcing appropriate stock footage.



Only complete applications with strong portfolio examples will be considered. We need 3 editors to start immediately. 



If you’re a talented, reliable editor who can create engaging faceless videos and grow with us, apply now!

title: Part-Time Video Editor for Podcast Reels (CapCut) — Women's Health Brand
description:
Start ~5–10 hrs/week, potential to grow

Salary: $5–7/hr USD depending on experience (paid weekly via Wise)



About Us:

We're a women's health telehealth practice in the US producing a podcast focused on perimenopause and menopause education. We need a reliable, detail-oriented editor to turn our podcast episodes into short-form vertical reels for Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts.



What You'll Do:

You'll receive a podcast episode (video + audio) along with a document from us listing exact timestamps to cut and the captions to use. Your job is to:

Cut the clips at the specified timestamps

Reformat to 9:16 vertical with proper framing on the speaker

Burn in captions using our brand fonts and colors (we'll provide a style guide)

Add simple B-roll, zooms, or cuts to keep pacing engaging (no static talking heads)

Export and deliver finished reels to our Google Drive using our file naming convention

Schedule and publish finished reels across our social platforms using Metricool (we'll train you on our posting cadence and caption conventions)

Pull weekly performance reports on reel metrics



We typically produce 4–8 reels per episode, and we release episodes bi-weekly.



Requirements:

Proficient in CapCut (Desktop or Pro)

Strong portfolio of short-form vertical video work — please include links

Good eye for pacing and visual rhythm in short-form content

Reliable internet and ability to meet a consistent weekly deadline

Professional English written communication

Attention to detail — caption accuracy and brand consistency matter to us



Nice to Have:

Experience editing podcast or interview content

Familiarity with health, wellness, or women's lifestyle brands

Descript or Riverside experience



How to Apply:

Please send:

Links to 2–3 reels you've edited (vertical, captioned, ideally from long-form source content)

A short note on your CapCut workflow and how you'd approach a 60-minute podcast episode

Your available hours per week and time zone

Your hourly rate in USD



Important: In the first line of your application, write the word "rosemary" so we know you read this post carefully.



Trial: We'll start with a paid trial — one full episode's worth of reels (approx 4–6 clips) at your stated rate. If it goes well, we'll move to an ongoing weekly arrangement.



Looking forward to hearing from you.

title: Social Media Coordinator
description:
Department: Marketing

Reports to: Director of Sales and Marketing

Employment Type: Part Time

Location: Remote

Experience Required: 2-3 years



About the Role

We are looking for a creative and driven Social Media Marketing Coordinator to join our team. In this role, you will own the day-to-day management of our social media presence, copywriting to content creation and publishing. You are someone who understands how to craft messages that resonate, knows the nuances of each platform, and can turn a brand voice into scroll-stopping content.



This is a hands-on role. You will write, design, schedule, and publish content.



Key Responsibilities

Content Creation & Copywriting



Develop original, on-brand content across Instagram, Instagram Stories, LinkedIn,
, and TikTok

Write compelling and on brand copy for posts, captions, stories, and Reels

Adapt brand voice and messaging for platform-specific audiences and formats

Collaborate with our internal team to source stories

Create graphics, audiograms, and simple video edits using tools like Edits, Canva, Adobe, or CapCut



Publishing & Scheduling

Manage and maintain the editorial content calendar across all active platforms

Schedule and publish content using social media management tools (e.g., Metricool, Meta, and natively to the social media platform)

Ensure timely, consistent posting aligned with campaign goals and release schedules

Coordinate podcast episode promotion, guest tagging, and cross-channel amplification



Community & Engagement

Monitor comments, DMs, and mentions across platforms and respond in a timely, brand-aligned manner

Actively engage with followers, collaborators, and community members to build connection

Identify trending conversations and opportunities for authentic brand participation



Analytics & Reporting

Track performance metrics including reach, engagement, follower growth, and link clicks

Compile monthly performance reports with insights and recommendations

Use data to inform content decisions and continuously improve output quality





Qualifications Required

2–3 years of experience in social media marketing, content creation, or a related field

Strong copywriting skills with a portfolio of social media content or writing samples

Demonstrated experience managing business accounts on 2+ major platforms

Proficiency with scheduling and publishing on Metricool

Solid working knowledge of Canva or Adobe Creative tools for visual content

Strong attention to detail, time management, and the ability to meet deadlines

Comfortable working independently with minimal oversight

Proficiency in 
 



Preferred

Experience in podcast, media, or personal brand marketing

Familiarity with short-form video editing (CapCut, Adobe Premiere Rush, or similar)

Basic understanding of SEO and hashtag strategy

Experience using AI tools (e.g., Claude, ChatGPT) to support content workflows

Background in community building or audience engagement strategies





What We're Looking For

Beyond the skills on paper, we want someone who is genuinely curious, a strong communicator, and passionate about the power of storytelling. You don't need to be a subject matter expert in everything, but you do need to ask good questions, care about the people behind the content, and bring energy and intention to everything you publish.



You are equal parts creative and analytical. You can write a heartfelt caption and then open the dashboard to see how it performed, and you care about both.

title: Phone + Office Support for US Painting Company (Part-Time, PT Hours) — Saturday Coverage Required
description:
I run a painting company in the US. I need someone part-time (4 hours/day, Tuesday through Saturday, 10:00 AM – 2:00 PM Pacific Time) to be the voice and the back-office for my business.

Saturday availability is not optional. Most of our new leads come in over the weekend, and speed matters — the faster we reach out, the more we close. If you can't work Saturdays, please don't apply.

What you'll do



Call new leads fast — especially on Saturday — and book appointments

Follow up on old leads and bring them back to life

Collect all info needed for estimates

Follow up on proposals we've sent — find out if the customer is moving forward

Hand closed leads off to our production crew

Back-office work in QuickBooks — manage accounts, keep things clean

Track everything in spreadsheets



What I need from you



Excellent spoken and written English (you'll be on the phone with US customers)

Solid spreadsheet skills and a natural habit of tracking

Great customer service — warm, patient, professional

Saturday availability (hard requirement)

Some sales experience is a big plus

QuickBooks experience is a big plus



Hours

4 hours/day, Tuesday through Saturday, 10:00 AM – 2:00 PM Pacific Time (US). That's 20 hours/week.

Pay

$7–$8/hour depending on experience. Paid weekly.

Growth

This role can grow into a full-time position for the right person. If you prove yourself reliable and great at the work, we'll expand your hours and responsibilities.

To apply



Tell me, specifically, why I should hire you. Don't tell me you're "detail-oriented and a hard worker" — everyone says that. Tell me a real story.

Make the subject line: "Painting Pro — [Your Name]"

Include the word Blue Marlin somewhere in your reply so I know you read this.

Confirm you can work 10:00 AM – 2:00 PM Pacific Time, Tuesday through Saturday.

Tell me about any phone work, sales, or QuickBooks experience you have.



Applications that don't follow these steps will be ignored.

title: Executive Assistant
description:
I'm a founder running multiple e-com companies, a personal brand, and a podcast — and I'm looking for an exceptional Executive Assistant to become my right hand across all of it.



This is not a traditional EA role. You'll be operating as part chief of staff, part brand partner, part producer. If you love structure, obsess over detail, write beautifully, and genuinely enjoy building things from zero — keep reading.



**What you'll be doing**



- Running my calendar, inbox, and travel (flights, accommodation, logistics) across multiple time zones

- Supporting the growth of brands — strategy, voice, and consistency across every touchpoint

- Writing, editing, and scheduling social media content that is sharp, on-brand, grammatically flawless, and culturally aware across markets

- Producing my podcast end-to-end: researching themes, sourcing and vetting guests, preparing briefing docs, coordinating recordings, liaising with editors, and supporting YouTube publishing and growth

- Researching markets, people, tools, and opportunities — and turning that research into clear, actionable summaries

- Helping recruit, vet, and onboard tea
mbers across my businesses — finding the right people is one of the most important things you'll do

- Building systems, SOPs, and project plans so things actually run instead of just getting done once



**Who you are**



- Native-level or exceptional spoken and written English (NON-NEGOTIABLE)

- A genuinely gifted copywriter — able to write in someone else's voice and make it sing

- Deeply organized. You think in systems, checklists, and second-order consequences

- You understand branding and marketing — not just the vocabulary, but the craft. You can tell why one piece of content lands and another doesn't

- Comfortable working across multiple businesses without dropping balls

- Resourceful — when you don't know something, you figure it out before asking

- Discreet, trustworthy, honest

- Please include EA2026 in the subject of this application so I know that you read this job post.

- Experience supporting founders or executives running multiple companies

- Podcast production experience (research, guest outreach, YouTube)

- Familiarity with tools like Notion, ClickUp, Canva, Descript, CapCut, Buffer/Later, Google Workspace

title: Social Media Manager + Video Editor (Wellness / Fine Art Aesthetic)
description:
About Me



Hi! My name is Poli, and I’m a Pilates instructor, educator, and consultant in the wellness space.



I’m currently building a content ecosystem centered around my podcast:

“The ABC’s of Living: The Art & Beauty of Conscious Living.”



This platform blends:



Pilates and movement science

Philosophy and intentional living

Art, beauty, and aesthetics



This content is not meant to feel like typical “wellness content.”

It should feel elevated, thoughtful, and visually beautiful.



This work directly supports my larger business:

developing and marketing Pilates certification programs and instructor education.



The Role



I’m looking for a Social Media Manager + Video Editor who can take long-form podcast content and transform it into short-form, high-impact clips for:



Instagram (Reels)

TikTok



Your role is to help shape the visual and emotional identity of the brand through content.



What You’ll Do



Watch podcast recordings and identify strong, viral-worthy 
nts

Edit short-form clips (15–90 seconds)

Add:

Subtitles (clean, aesthetic, not distracting)

Background music (tasteful, emotional, not trendy/overused)

Visual overlays (art, textures, subtle motion, references to classical art or minimal luxury visuals)

Post content to Instagram and TikTok

Write captions aligned with the brand voice (intentional, elevated, not clickbait)

Maintain a consistent posting schedule



Creative Direction (Very Important)



The vibe is:



Fine art > trendy

Intentional > loud

Elegant > overproduced



Think:



Museum energy

Soft, cinematic visuals

Classical or minimal modern design

Wellness that feels intellectual and artistic, not influencer-style



This is NOT:



Fast-cut, chaotic TikTok editing

Overuse of emojis, sound effects, or flashy transitions



If your instinct is “make it go viral with trends,” this is not the role.

If your instinct is “make this feel like art,” you’re exactly who I’m looking for.



Who You Are



Strong video editing skills (CapCut, Premiere Pro, Final Cut, etc.)

Strong sense of visual taste and pacing

Experience editing for Instagram and TikTok

Understands storytelling, not just clipping

Can match visuals and music to emotion

Reliable, communicative, and detail-oriented



Bonus if you:



Appreciate wellness, movement, or philosophy content

Have experience with aesthetic/brand-driven pages



Deliverables



3–7 clips per podcast episode

Consistent weekly posting

Organized file delivery + content planning support



To Apply



Please include:



Portfolio or sample edits (especially short-form content)

1–2 examples that match a clean, artistic, elevated aesthetic

A short note on how you would approach editing a wellness podcast differently from typical TikTok content



Closing



This is a creative partnership. I’m looking for someone who can help build something distinct: where wellness meets art, and content feels like it has depth, not just reach.

title: Podcast / Talking Head Video Editor (Long-Form)
description:
We’re looking for a skilled YouTube video editor to help us produce high-quality long-form

content for a fast-growing entrepreneurship and financial education brand.



This is a long-term role for someone who takes pride in clean, high-quality edits and wants to

grow with a serious content operation.



Our content is designed for entrepreneurs and business owners focused on scaling their

companies, accessing capital, and building real wealth. 



You will primarily be editing:

• Podcast episodes

• Educational talking-head videos 



This is a full-time role with consistent weekly work and long-term opportunity.

Must be available during EST business hours. 



All interviews will be conducted during EST

hours.



What You’ll Be Working On 



1. Podcast Episodes (45–90 minutes)

• Clean up dead space and tighten pacing

• Identify and build strong intro hook segments (this is critical)

• Insert commercials or call-to-action segments when needed

• Add simple on-screen graphics (text, social handles, callouts)

• Deliver clean, YouTube-ready final videos 



2. Talking-Head Educational Videos (8–15 minutes)

• Remove pauses and tighten delivery

• Maintain smooth, clean pacing

• Add graphics, text, and visual enhancements when appropriate

• Ensure videos are engaging and easy to follow

We are not looking for basic cutting.

We value editors who understand pacing, flow, and viewer retention.  



Editing Style (Reference Only)

We draw inspiration from creators such as:

• Alex Hormozi

• Dan Martell

• Karlton Dennis

• The Calum Johnson Show 



You do not need to replicate these styles exactly, but you should understand modern YouTube

editing patterns and pacing.  



Thumbnail Creation (Bonus Skill)

If you have experience creating YouTube thumbnails, that is a strong bonus.

We currently use simple thumbnail styles and templates. This is not a design-heavy role, but the

capability is valuable.   



Tools We Prefer

• Adobe Premiere Pro

• After Effects

• DaVinci Resolve

• Photoshop (for thumbnails – optional)   



Compensation

$900 – $1,000 USD per month (based on experience and quality of work)

• Paid via Wise (Weekly)

• Opportunity for increased pay and responsibility as we scale



Why This Role Is Valuable

• Long-term, stable position (not project-based)

• Directly work with a growing personal brand and media platform

• Consistent weekly content production

• Opportunity to grow into a larger role over time



We are looking for someone who:

• Has experience editing educational YouTube videos or podcasts

• Understands pacing, storytelling, and viewer engagement

• Produces clean, professional-quality edits

• Communicates clearly and reliably

• Wants long-term, consistent work

• Can commit to work from 9:30 AM to 6:30 PM EST 



Bonus if you have experience with:

• Motion graphics

• Thumbnail design

• Retention-focused editing styles



Pay attention and have the following  details ready:



1. Links to 3 YouTube videos or podcast edits you have worked on 



2. A brief explanation of your role in those edits 



3. Your favorite YouTube creator (from an editing perspective) and why 



4. Choose one video you’ve worked on and explain:

• What you would improve

• What was done well

• How you would improve viewer retention 



Applications without examples of long-form editing work will NOT be considered.  



Fill out our online application form at

title: Executive Assistant to the CEO
description:
Application Requirement (Video Submission)



Before we review your resume, all applicants are required to submit a short 2–4 minute video.



This will be the primary basis for moving forward in the hiring process.

We are not looking for perfect answers. 



We are looking for how you think, how you operate, and how you communicate.



Please answer the following:

1. Why are you more than a traditional Executive Assistant?

2. Tell me about a time you were given a task, but you went beyond the instructions to achieve a better outcome.

3. Tell me about a recent example of how you’ve used AI to improve your work or a process.



Applicants who do not submit a video will not be considered.



Role Overview

This is not a traditional Executive Assistant role.

You will not simply manage calendars or send
s. You will work directly with the CEO as a right hand operator, helping turn ideas into execution and ensuring priorities move forward.

This role is best suited for someone who wants to operate closer to leadership, take ownership of outcomes, and grow beyond administrative work.



Key Responsibilities

Manage and prioritize the CEO’s time based on what matters most

Turn ideas into execution and ensure consistent follow-through

Identify gaps, inefficiencies, and missed details, and resolve them proactively

Attend meetings and translate discussions into clear action steps

Help keep projects and tea
mbers accountable to timelines and outcomes

Communicate on behalf of the CEO when necessary

Build and improve systems, workflows, and processes

Utilize tools, including AI, to improve efficiency and output



Qualifications

Strong sense of ownership and accountability

Ability to think beyond tasks and focus on outcomes

Resourceful and able to operate in fast-paced, ambiguous environments

Strong communication skills, both written and verbal

Organized, detail-oriented, and proactive

Comfortable learning and using new tools, including AI

Able to work independently with minimal supervision



Compensation and Work Setup

Compensation: $5 - $6

Pay Schedule: Weekly thru 

Work Setup: Fully remote

Schedule: Must be flexible and aligned with CEO and business needs ( 40 - 45 hours a week)

title: Remote Office Manager For NYC Construction Company
description:
*Position Overview*



The Remote Office Manager oversees daily administrative operations, digital workflows, and cross?team coordination for a distributed or hybrid organization. This role ensures smooth communication, accurate documentation, timely reporting, and consistent operational support across all departments. The manager maintains high standards of organization, confidentiality, and responsiveness while working independently in a remote environment.



*Administrative & Operational Management*



- Manage daily office operations, digital filing systems, and workflow processes to ensure efficiency and accuracy.

- Maintain calendars, schedule meetings, coordinate virtual events, and prepare agendas and summaries.

- Oversee document control, including contracts, proposals, onboarding packets, and compliance records.

- Track deadlines, deliverables, and follow?ups across multiple teams and projects.



*Communication & Coordination*



- Serve as the primary point of contact for internal staff, clients, and vendors.

- Draft, proofread, and distribute professional communications, including
s, memos, reports, and announcements.

- Facilitate smooth communication between remote teams, leadership, and external partners.

- Support onboarding and training by preparing materials, coordinating sessions, and maintaining documentation.



*Financial & Reporting Support*



- Assist with invoice processing, expense tracking, purchase orders, and budget monitoring.

- Prepare weekly and monthly reports, dashboards, and summaries for leadership.

- Maintain accurate records for audits, compliance, and internal reviews.



*Technology & Systems Management*



- Manage digital tools such as project management platforms, CRM systems, cloud storage, and communication apps.

- Troubleshoot basic technical issues and coordinate with IT when needed.

- Implement and optimize digital workflows to improve efficiency and reduce administrative friction.



*HR & Compliance Support*



- Maintain employee records, timesheets, and remote work documentation.

- Assist with recruitment coordination, interview scheduling, and candidate communication.

- Ensure adherence to company policies, confidentiality standards, and regulatory requirements.



*Required Skills & Qualifications*



- 3–5 years of administrative, office management, or operations experience (remote or hybrid preferred).

- Strong proficiency with digital tools such as Microsoft 365, Google Workspace, Slack, Zoom, and project management platforms.

- Excellent written and verbal communication skills with strong attention to detail.

- Ability to manage multiple priorities, meet deadlines, and work independently with minimal supervision.

- High level of professionalism, discretion, and problem?solving ability.

- Strong organizational skills and comfort with fast?paced, evolving environments.



*Preferred Qualifications*



- Experience supporting executives or cross?functional teams.

- Familiarity with CRM systems, HRIS platforms, or accounting software.

- Background in operations, project coordination, or compliance?driven industries.

- Ability to create SOPs, templates, and process documentation.



*Work Environment*



This is a fully remote role requiring reliable internet access, consistent availability during business hours, and the ability to manage communication across multiple channels. Occasional virtual or in?person meetings may be required depending on company needs.



MUST HAVE ACCESS TO:



1. Phone

2. CPU 

3. High Speed Internet 

4. Office equipment 

5. Office Supplies



MUST COMPLY:



1. New hire must only work with our company to ensure efficient remote operation.

2. Available MONDAY - FRIDAY, 9 AM - 5 PM EST.

title: Administrative Assistant for US Tax and Accounting Firm
description:
Ideal for an organized administrative professional who enjoys being helpful, following checklists and has experience supporting a US based business.



START DATE: May 4, 2026 



SCHEDULE: 

FULL TIME; INDEPENDENT CONTRACTOR 

MONDAY - FRIDAY

US TIMEZONE 10:00 AM - 6:00 PM EST*

*NIGHT SHIFT in the Philippines



COMPENSATION: $1,100 USD PER MONTH 



AVERAGE 40 HOURS PER WEEK

 

At About Profit, we are ALL about advising small business clients on maximizing their profitability. We are one of only 60 Profit First Mastery Certified Firms in the United States. That means we are the go-to experts in cash management and profitability for savvy small business owners who have cash in the bank to correlate to their profitability.

 

Even though our team is global, we all work with a Staten Island hustle and a Brooklyn grind that our clients love. 

 

We need an administrative tea
mber to support our team by managing calendar's and coordinating completion of various administrative tasks. 



About Profit's Core Values

No A**holes: We promote positive interactions and are free from toxic behavior.

Friendly: We create a welcoming and approachable work environment.

Personable: We are genuine and create relatable interactions within the workplace.

 

Key Responsibilities and Success Metrics

Time Management and Scheduling 

Proactively schedule appointments via Accuity within predetermined time blocks and per the scheduling guidelines. Ensure cancelled appointments are removed from the calendar and rescheduled per scheduling guidelines. 

Success Metric:

• Zero meetings scheduled without receipt of required documents per checklist 

• All documents needed for meetings are received and saved in the client file at least 30 minutes prior to the scheduled meeting

Administrative Client Support 

Tax Planning Clients 

Take each client through the established planning process from start to finish so the Tax Manager is set up for a successful planning call with the client. Steps include communicating with the client to request information, saving documents and updating contact cards in Karbon once received, coordinating with the tax manager to complete analysis and scheduling a review call once all the pertinent information is received. 

New Client Onboarding

Take each new client through onboarding steps including reaching out to the client via
 to request documents, scheduling calls with the Tax Manager, and updating the client card in Karbon.

Success Metric:

• Ensure all steps in the tax planning process are complete in Karbon for each client on the scheduled completion date.

 

Administrative Partner Support

Client Communication

Send out error free communication via Karbon to notify clients of closures, updates and other updates per schedule or as directed by the office manager or Partner. Answer incoming calls and route the call to the appropriate department.

Success Metric:

• All communications are sent per scheduled sent date to all intended recipients  

 

Ideal Skills Characteristics:

• 1 year of experience working remotely in an executive assistant, administrative support role 

• Experience working the night shift

• Acts proactively because waiting around is wasting time

• Enjoys doing things before being asked to do them

• Can map out, plan for, and efficiently work toward successes

• Finds joy in helping people tackle tasks and problems

• Prefers to be super organized in any situation

• Hustles to get work done well and on time

Additional Requirements

• Reliable, high-speed internet 

• Computer 

• Private workspace 

 

APPLICATION PROCESS:

1. Apply Online

2. Complete online English grammar test (Approximately 15 minutes)

Note: A link to this test will be
ed to you upon submitting your application

3. Complete The ALL IN Assessment online within 24 hours of application (Approximately 35 minutes to complete)

Note: A link to this assessment will be
ed to qualified candidates

4. Preliminary Interview via Zoom (Approximately 15 minutes)

5. Online Skills Testing

6. Deep Dive Interview via Zoom (Approximately 1.5 hours)

7. Virtual Team Shadow Day - PAID ($15 USD): "Experience a Day in the Life with Us" (2 hours)

title: Remote Virtual Estimator
description:
Please attach a resume and examples of your work.



Profile Summary

Role Type: Remote / Virtual



Key Focus: Accuracy in cost estimation, quantity takeoffs, and bid preparation.



Ideal Candidate: A detail-oriented individual with strong mathematical skills, deep industry knowledge (e.g., construction or electrical), and the ability to work autonomously. Clear and effective communicator. C2 & C1 professional level. 



Primary Industries: Construction (Commercial/Residential)



Job Description



Core Responsibilities

Cost Estimation & Analysis: Analyze project documents, blueprints, and specifications to determine labor, material, and equipment costs.



Quantity Takeoffs: Perform detailed digital measurements and list all materials required for project completion using specialized software.



Bid Preparation: Change complex cost data into professional, competitive bid proposals and executive summaries.



Vendor & Subcontractor Coordination: Research prices, manage bids from subcontractors, and maintain relationships with suppliers.



Risk Assessment: Identify potential financial or operational risks and suggest cost-reduction or value-engineering options.



Communication: Collaborate with project managers, engineers, and clients through video conferencing,
, and virtual meetings to clarify project scopes.



Required Skills & Qualifications



Technical Proficiency: CRM Construction Online



Analytical & Math Skills: Strong ability in algebra, geometry, and financial analysis to prevent costly errors.



Experience: 

Typically requires 3–7+ years of industry experience (e.g., as a project manager, estimator) to understand field complexities.



Education/Certification: 

A bachelor's degree in Construction Management or Engineering is often preferred but not always mandatory. Experience is more attractive.



Professional certifications like Certified Professional Estimator (CPE) or Certified Estimating Professional (CEP) are highly valued.



Remote Work Competency: Self-motivated, with excellent time management skills and a secure, high-bandwidth, and home office setup.

title: Amazon Graphic Design Expert
description:
We are a fast-growing Amazon agency working with multiple brands to scale their presence and profitability on Amazon. Our team moves quickly, operates at a high level, and is focused on execution. We are looking for a highly skilled Amazon Graphic Design Expert who can produce premium, conversion-focused creative at scale using AI and modern design tools.



This is not an entry-level role. We need someone who understands Amazon, understands buyers, and can consistently produce high-impact creative assets without relying on traditional product photography.



What You’ll Be Responsible For



You will be the creative engine behind listing visuals across multiple brands. Your main objective is to produce clean, high-converting, Amazon-compliant visual assets quickly and consistently.



Responsibilities include:



Designing high-quality Amazon listing images that drive conversions



Creating A+ Content layouts that enhance brand storytelling and credibility

Using AI tools to generate lifestyle images without the need for photography

Maintaining visual consistency across entire product lines



Delivering assets fast while maintaining premium quality standards



We are looking for someone who can “pump out” strong creative at scale without sacrificing quality.



AI Skills Are Required (This Is a Must)



You MUST have hands-on experience using AI tools to create Amazon listing images and lifestyle scenes.



You should be comfortable:



Generating product lifestyle scenes using AI



Enhancing product photos using AI tools



Creating compliant backgrounds and environments without photography



Using AI to speed up design workflows and ideation



You will be expected to prove your ability to use AI to produce Amazon-compliant creative that looks real, clean, and professional.



Required Experience

Amazon listing image design



A+ Content creation



Brand Store layout design



Canva (expert level required)



Photoshop or equivalent tools



AI image generation tools (examples: Midjourney, DALL-E, Photoshop AI, etc.)

Amazon image compliance rules



What makes a listing image convert



How to structure visuals for clarity and impact



How to design for mobile shoppers

FAST and efficient



Detail-oriented



Highly creative



Self-motivated



Comfortable taking direction and executing quickly



Hungry to improve and grow

description:
Are you looking for a stable, long-term position where attention to detail and expertise are highly valued? We are seeking a dedicated individual with experience in Xactimate and a solid understanding of roofing components.

About Us: We are an insurance supplement company that partners with roofing contractors to assist in supplementing their insurance jobs. Our work involves reviewing photos of roofs, analyzing the original estimates, and creating detailed supplements that include necessary additions for rebuilding, supported by citing code and providing photo justification.

• Create detailed and accurate supplements using Xactimate.

• Communicate primarily via
 with insurance companies, and occasionally speak directly with adjusters to justify the inclusion of certain line items.

• Proficiency in Xactimate and an understanding of roofing components.

• Excellent written and verbal communication skills.

• Ability to work night shifts (9 AM - 5 PM ET).

title: Amazon Ads / PPC Manager - UK & EU Agency
description:
IF YOU ARE INTERESTED IN THIS JOB - DO NOT USE CHATGPT TO RESPOND. ALL CHATGPT RESPONSES WILL BE DISREGARDED. IT IS VERY OBVIOUS WHEN ITS BEEN USED - THANK YOU



We are Atlantic Access, a fast-growing client-centric European digital sales agency, helping the most exciting start-up brands launch in Europe. We cover and manage the entire end to end process for brands from logistics, digital marketing, customer service, B2B/B2C sales and full-service Amazon Europe management.



We work mainly with crowd funded brands from around the world that have raised millions of $ on Kickstarter and Indiegogo. This is a great opportunity for someone to learn more about the start-up life and the fun and challenges of working with high growth companies.



Amazon PPC Manager - 3+ years experience of the Amazon marketing platform is essential



Key Responsibilities:



Managing multiple Amazon accounts in multiple countries

Develop and execute Amazon PPC strategies to maximize sales and ROAS

Conduct thorough keyword research and analysis to target relevant audiences

Create, monitor, and optimize sponsored product and brand campaigns

Manage daily budgets, bids, and pacing to ensure efficient ad spend

Analyze campaign performance and provide actionable insights

Implement A/B testing to optimize ads, landing pages, and product listings

Stay updated on Amazon's advertising tools and industry trends

Monitor competitor strategies and adjust campaigns accordingly

Generate weekly and monthly reports on campaign performance metrics

Collaborate with the marketing team to align PPC strategies with broader goals

Manage and optimize product listings for SEO and PPC synergy

Track and adjust for seasonal trends and demand shifts

Improve ad copy and creative to boost click-through and conversion rates

Identify and resolve issues related to ad performance and account health

Manage relationships with Amazon support to resolve PPC-related issues



To succeed in this role, you must:



Have 3 years minimum experience working with Amazon PPC and marketing.

Advanced, Strategic ability to implement campaigns and grow sales.

Excellent Data analysis capability - Be able to find patterns and understand performance.

Be tech savvy and understand how to use online software and Microsoft Excel in depth.

This role involves working closely within a team and would be expected to participate in frequent video calls and messages within the team.

Confident in the use of ChatGPT



You MUST have strong written and verbal English communication skills in order to reply to customers by
 perfectly.



You will be expected to work some crossover with UK time. This will mean PH time a later start and late end. However we do NOT want someone to be working overnight as its not healthy!!



To Apply for the job:



Change the subject line of your application to:

"I Want to Work for You [Insert the name of our company CO-Founder]"



1. At the top of your message, write 2-3 short sentences on why you're applying and why you're a great fit.



Below that, answer the following questions clearly, using the number and letter for each:



2 Describe your Amazon PPC experience.



How long have you managed accounts?



What was the typical ad spend and ROAS?



What tools/software do you actively use to manage PPC?



3.b) What’s the hardest part of managing Amazon PPC and why?

What’s the most important part?



3.c) How do you use AI in your management of PPC?



Thank you for your time and good luck with the application, if you have any questions please feel free to reach out.
