title: Marketing Operations & Systems Implementation
description:
Role:  Virtual Assistant / Operations & Systems Implementer

Engagement:  Independent contractor, paid hourly · $5–$7 USD / hour (DOE)

Hours:  40 hours per week, US Eastern Time (EST) business hours

Location:  Philippines-based (remote)

Initial Timeline:  1–2 weeks to complete full 5 Day Deal Flow Challenge implementation

Long-Term Potential:  Strong possibility of ongoing role and additional responsibilities



About Breeze Home Buyers

Breeze Home Buyers is a growing U.S. real estate investment company that buys houses directly from motivated sellers. We are investing heavily in systems, data, and AI-powered workflows so our team can move faster, make smarter decisions, and close more deals. We are looking for a sharp, self-directed operator to help us build the backbone that the rest of the team will run on.



The Opportunity

We have enrolled in the DataSift "5 Day Deal Flow Challenge" — a 32-module program covering data strategy, sequential marketing, deep prospecting, REISift CRM setup, deal analysis, and scaling operations. Rather than doing it ourselves, we want to hire a high-caliber VA to go through the challenge on our behalf, implement every system exactly as taught, and set us up to run at full speed.

This is not a generic VA role. It is a build-and-optimize project. You will watch every video, complete every workbook, apply every AI skill, and then execute the blueprint inside our accounts. When the initial build is complete, you will stay on to maintain the CRM, build KPI dashboards, and help us hire and train the marketing VAs who will run the campaigns you've built the systems for.

What You'll Do



Phase 1 — Complete the 5 Day Deal Flow Challenge (Week 1–2)

Work through all 5 days of the challenge — videos, workbooks, and AI skills — and implement every module directly inside our accounts. The challenge IS your implementation guide; treat every lesson as a task to complete, not just watch.

Day 1 — Data & Market Research (~3.5 hrs)

Apply the Data Priority Pyramid (Tier 1 First-to-Market ? Tier 2 Stacked Niche ? Tier 3 AI) and Pendulum Theory to pick our highest-ROI data sources.

Pick our Blueprint (A Launchpad, B Optimizer, C Specialist, or D Scale-Up) and map our target market using Market Finder and SiftMap.

Install and use the Claude Skills for REI (First to Market County Data, Sift Market Research, AI-Powered Prospecting) and run a Sold Properties analysis to validate assumptions.



Day 2 — Team Structure, Sequential Marketing & Phone Scoring (~2 hrs)

Design the Replacement Ladder team structure (Data Manager ? Callers ? Lead Manager ? Closer) and the 2:1 Caller-to-Lead-Manager ratio.

Build Niche and Bulk Sequential Marketing filter presets — cheapest channel first (SMS ? Cold Call ? Direct Mail ? Deep Prospecting).

Set up Trestle phone scoring (5-Tier Dial Priority), Smarter Contact for SMS, Free Caller Registry, WhisperFlow for voi
 drops, and Open Letter Marketing for direct mail.



Day 3 — Deep Prospecting (~1 hr)

Build the 4-level Deep Prospecting workflow using the Deep Prospecting Claude Skill and the Property Finder Skill for probates.

Set up skip-tracing tool access: BeenVerified, 
, TruePeopleSearch, CyberBackgroundChecks, FindAGrave, 
.

Implement the Foreclosure Analysis process (5-Lens FTM) and custom fields for deceased records, tax delinquency, and auction dates.



Day 4 — REISift CRM & Deal Analysis (~4 hrs)

Full REISift/DataSift CRM build: default statuses, pipeline phases, SiftLine boards, 26 pre-built sequences, CRM events, task presets, and 6 drip campaign templates.

Implement the 4 Pillars of Motivation (Reason, Timeline, Condition, Price) and STABM daily routine for the lead team.

Stand up the Deal Analyzer plugin (AI Comping Skill + Rehab Estimator Skill) and build a Buyer Prospecting list with verified cash buyers.



Day 5 — Scaling, Hiring & SOPs (~2 hrs)

Run the 4-pillar REI Company Audit, produce a 30/60/90 plan, and load the DataSift KPI Sheet with our leading and lagging indicators.

Use the SOP Skill for Claude and the 5-step SOP Pipeline (Learn ? Record ? Transcribe ? Playbook ? Deploy) to document every system you build at a 5th-grade reading level.

Prepare the hiring pipeline:
 VA groups, Indeed, Ninja Assistants, Wise payouts, and ready-to-use Job Description templates.

Deliverable at the end of Phase 1: every module implemented inside our accounts, an SOP for each system, and a short written summary of decisions made and questions flagged.

Phase 2 — Optimize Our REISift CRM

Clean and organize existing data, lists, and tags inside REISift.

Set up pipelines, statuses, custom fields, and automations to match the challenge's recommended structure.

Build and stack marketing lists using the data strategy taught in the challenge (absentee, probate, pre-foreclosure, tax delinquent, etc., as applicable).

Manage skip tracing and data enrichment workflows.

Implement AI-powered workflows, prompts, and skills introduced during the challenge to speed up repetitive tasks.

Phase 3 — Implement Marketing Systems (for other VAs to execute)

You will NOT be running the outreach yourself. You will be building the systems, templates, and SOPs that the marketing VAs we hire will execute.

SMS / text-blasting campaigns — set up the tool, templates, cadences, compliance guardrails, and handoff rules to the acquisitions team.

Cold calling / dialer — configure the dialer, load lists, set up scripts, dispositions, and reporting for the calling VAs.

Direct mail — build mailing list pulls, design template workflows, manage vendor handoffs, and track response rates back into the CRM.

Phase 4 — Ongoing (if retained)

CRM maintenance & data hygiene — ongoing list pulls, tagging, deduplication, skip-trace management.

Hire and train other VAs — help us recruit, onboard, and train the marketing VAs who will run the campaigns you built.

KPI reporting & dashboards — build and maintain weekly reporting on leads, contact rate, appointments, contracts, and marketing spend.

Continuously optimize systems as our volume grows.



Who You Are

You are a self-starter. Nobody will hand-hold you through this — the challenge IS your guide. You watch a video, take notes, and implement. You catch your own mistakes, build repeatable processes, and communicate proactively.



Must-Haves

Experience as an Operations Manager and/or Marketing Manager (not just a general admin VA).

Excellent written English; conversational spoken English for weekly calls.

Proven ability to work independently from training material — you can watch a training, take notes, and execute.

Strong process thinker: you document everything and build SOPs without being asked.

Comfortable working US Eastern Time business hours.

Confident using AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude) for real work — prompting, drafting SOPs, data cleanup.

Zapier and/or 
 experience for no-code automations.

Advanced Google Sheets / Excel (formulas, pivot tables, data cleanup at scale).

Hands-on experience with list stacking and data-enrichment tools (PropStream, BatchLeads, skip-tracing services, or equivalents).



Nice-to-Haves (Preferred, Not Required)

U.S. real estate / wholesaling / investing background; prior experience with REISift, Podio, or similar investor CRMs.

Experience hiring and training other VAs and building KPI dashboards (Google Sheets, Looker Studio, Databox, etc.).

Why Work With Us

Clear scope and a clear guide — you won't be guessing what to build.

Real ownership — you'll architect the systems the whole company runs on.

Long-term upside — strong contributors will be offered ongoing hours and expanded responsibilities.

Learn a modern real-estate tech stack (REISift, DataSift, AI tooling) paid for by us — direct access to the owner, no corporate layers.



How to Apply

Please submit BOTH of the following. Applications missing either piece will not be reviewed — we use this as our first filter for self-starters who follow directions.

1. A short written response (copy into your application message)

Your relevant experience as an Operations and/or Marketing Manager (2–4 sentences).

Any real estate, REISift, or investor-CRM experience you have (2–4 sentences — say "none" if none).

How you would personally approach a 1–2 week, self-taught implementation project like this (3–5 sentences).

One example of a system, SOP, or automation you built in a past role and the result it produced.

Your internet speed, hardware, and confirmation that you can consistently work US EST business hours.

2. A 2–3 minute Loom video

Introduce yourself on camera.

Walk us through your screen showing one tool you are genuinely strong in (REISift, a CRM, Zapier/Make, Sheets, etc.).

Tell us why you are a strong fit specifically for an implementation role based on a training program.

Paste your Loom link directly in your application. Videos behind logins or requiring sign-up will not be opened.

Hiring process: written + Loom review (1–3 business days) ? 30-minute video interview with the owner ? short paid trial task (1–2 hours, paid at your quoted rate) before final offer.

Compensation & Engagement

$6–$8 USD / hour, set on offer based on experience. Weekly payment via Wise, Payoneer, or PayPal.

30–40 hrs/week during the initial 1–2 week build; ongoing hours agreed after Phase 1.

Independent contractor — you manage your own taxes in your country. Performance bonuses possible once marketing systems are producing leads.



A Note From the Owner

We're looking for one great person — not ten average ones. If you watch a training video with a notebook open, build a checklist, and start implementing the same day, you are exactly who we want to talk to. If you need constant direction, this role won't be a fit. Thank you for reading this far — we look forward to reviewing your application.

title: Inbox Manager / Appointment Setter (Cold Email Replies)
description:
I’m looking for a reliable and detail-oriented person to manage incoming
 replies and help turn conversations into booked appointments.



This is not a sales-heavy role — the leads are already responding. Your job is to reply quickly, keep conversations simple, and guide them toward booking a call.



If you’re someone who communicates clearly, follows instructions, and responds quickly, this will be a great fit.



Responsibilities:

-Monitor incoming
 replies

-Categorize responses (interested, not interested, questions, etc.)

-Reply using simple, short messages

-Answer basic questions (we will provide scripts)

-Offer available time slots for calls

-Confirm appointments once accepted

-Follow up if someone doesn’t respond



Requirements:

-Strong written English (simple and clear, not robotic)

-Fast response time (ideally within 5–15 minutes during shift)

-Ability to follow instructions and use templates

-Good attention to detail

-Reliable internet connection

-Available during agreed working hours



Nice to Have (not required):

-Experience with
 outreach or appointment setting

-Familiar with tools like Gmail, Calendly, or CRM systems





Important:



To be considered, please follow these instructions:



In your application, start your message with: “Inbox Pro”

Answer this question:



How would you reply to this
?



“Can you send me more info first?”



Keep your response short and natural.



Final Notes:



We are looking for someone long-term. If you do well in this role, this will be a permanent position with raises at certain points.

title: Account Manager
description:
Position: Account Manager



Benefits:

Work From Home

Guaranteed $500 USD per week

Additional available if you perform well

Unlimited potential through residual because you earn as long as your customers say with Fleetsmarts



What we do as a company:

We give a fuel card away for free to truckers in the US that have discounts on diesel fuel. We have add-on products that make the sale more attractive to the customer. Customers can get weekly credit lines for their fuel card if they use our factoring service, which is akin to a pay-day loan service for businesses, but we provide this service for free. We also have a service to help reduce the down payment on their insurance. We market to new trucking companies that are just starting out and all our products are designed to help them get going faster than they would be able to on their own.



What you do:

You call warm appointments for truckers who have already expressed interest

You explain how we can help them

95% of people say yes

The key is following up until they actually start using our services





We set up 4 interviews per day in between the hours of 4:00 and 6:00pm

We will choose one new Cat 3 Re-Engager per week.

After one week, if they don’t hit 60% patch rate, they are out.

For 5 weeks, if they hit high patch rate, we rotate them between Hannah and Cat 1s

We promote one each week to Cat 3 leads and replace our worst AM.



Key Responsibilities:

Proactively follow up on abandoned or inactive leads assigned to account managers.

Present and promote fuel card programs, factoring services, and insurance solutions to potential clients.

Assist customers with the activation of fuel cards and ensure a preferred payment method is added.

Offer factoring services and guide customers through the contract signing process to ensure completion and compliance



Qualifications:

Proven experience in sales, customer retention, or outbound calling (required)

Strong communication and negotiation skills

Confident handling high-volume outbound calls

Goal-oriented, persistent, and able to work independently

Organized and comfortable using CRM tools and office software

Positive attitude and ability to build rapport quickly

title: Outbound Sales Assistant
description:
We are hiring an Outbound Sales Assistant to support our team in reaching out to potential clients and generating new business opportunities. This role focuses on proactive communication, lead outreach, and helping move prospects through the early stages of the sales process.



You will be working closely with the team to identify potential clients, initiate conversations, and keep the sales pipeline active and organized.



In this role, you will be responsible for:



-Reaching out to potential clients via chat,
, or calls

-Initiating conversations with cold and warm leads

-Following scripts and outreach guidelines

-Qualifying leads based on interest and fit

-Keeping records of outreach activity and responses

-Coordinating with the team for follow-ups and next steps



We are looking for someone with strong communication skills, confidence in reaching out to new people, and a proactive attitude. Experience in sales, outbound messaging, appointment setting, or customer service is an advantage but not required as long as you are willing to learn and follow instructions.



This is a remote position with a flexible schedule depending on workload and outreach targets. We offer a supportive environment and opportunities for growth based on performance.



If you are comfortable initiating conversations, persistent in follow-ups, and motivated by results, we’d love to hear from you.

title: Lead Generation Specialist (VA)
description:
We are looking for a seasoned Lead Generation VA to join our Amazon Seller Coaching business. We don't need an Amazon expert; we need a digital hunter. Your job is to find potential students and start the conversation.



The Mandatory Requirement

To be considered for this role, you must already possess a "warm" infrastructure for outreach. This includes:



Aged Social Media Profiles: Multiple established accounts 
, LinkedIn, etc.) that were created long ago and have organic activity.



Established
 Accounts: Multiple aged
 addresses with high deliverability (not brand new accounts that will land in spam).



Note: We are not looking for someone to create new accounts today. We need someone who can start high-volume outreach immediately without being flagged as "new" or "spam."



Your Responsibilities

Stealth Prospecting: Use your existing network of profiles to identify and engage with Amazon sellers in groups, forums, and via direct outreach.



Human-First Outreach: Initiate conversations using our scripts, but adapting them to sound natural and authentic.



Lead Handoff: Qualify leads and book them directly onto our sales team's calendar.



Activity Reporting: Maintain a daily log of outreach volume and response rates across all profiles.



What We’re Looking For

Experience: You’ve done this before. You know how to bypass "spam" filters and stay under the radar of platform algorithms.



Infrastructure: You already have the tools (VPNs, anti-detect browsers, or multiple devices) to manage several profiles simultaneously.



English Mastery: You can write persuasive, conversational English that builds immediate trust with entrepreneurs.



Self-Management: You are disciplined and don’t need to be micromanaged to hit your daily KPIs.



Compensation & Perks

Negotiable Base Pay: We pay for quality. Your rate will be discussed based on your experience and the strength/age of the profiles you are bringing to the role.



Commission Structure: Earn a bonus for every qualified lead that closes.



Long-term Growth: We are looking for a partner, not just a freelancer.



Please go to the link below to apply:

title: Online Math/Science Teacher(Near-Native Accent)
description:
About Pomelo Academy

Pomelo Academy is an innovative online international school dedicated to delivering high-quality education to students worldwide. We provide a dynamic and engaging learning environment, catering to individualized instruction that transcends geographical boundaries.



Job Description

We are seeking passionate and experienced Near-Native English-speaking Online K-12 Math and/or Science Teachers with verifiable teaching certifications. The ideal candidates will have strong academic backgrounds in Mathematics and/or Science, experience teaching young learners (ages 5–18), and a commitment to creating a supportive, inquiry-based, and engaging online learning environment.



Responsibilities



Deliver interactive and engaging Math and/or Science lessons to individuals and small groups of 2–6 students aged 5–18.

Teach using internationally recognized curricula such as A Closer Look, Glencoe Science, Pearson Interactive Science, NGSS-aligned resources, Singapore Math, or IB/AP/A Level Math programs.

Create age-appropriate lesson plans focused on conceptual understanding, inquiry, problem-solving, and real-world applications.

Incorporate visuals, multimedia, and hands-on virtual activities to make abstract concepts accessible and engaging.

Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback to students and parents.

Foster curiosity, discussion, and active learning in a safe and supportive space.



Qualifications



Professional teacher with at least 2 years of teaching experience (Kindergarten–Grade 12).

Must hold a valid teaching license/certification (e.g., Teaching License, State Certification). TESOL/TEFL is a plus.

Near-native English accent with excellent spoken and written communication skills.

Strong academic background in Mathematics and/or Science (Biology, Physics, Chemistry, General Science).

Experience teaching in public/international schools or reputable online platforms.

Familiarity with inquiry-based and/or interdisciplinary approaches (e.g., STEM/STEAM).

Comfortable working between 07:00–22:00 (Weekdays) and 9:00–22:00 (Weekends), GMT+8.

Proficiency with digital platforms such as ClassIn, Microsoft Office, and other educational technologies.

Must have a stable and fast internet connection and a PC/laptop with at least Windows 10 or Mac OS Catalina.



Benefits



Flexible working hours.

Opportunity to teach using globally respected Math and Science curricula.

Be part of an international, passionate team of educators.

Access to training and professional development.

Regular enrollment model (not a booking system), ensuring schedule stability and consistency

title: Job Description: Data Engineer (Python + Google Cloud)
description:
Role Overview

We are seeking a Data Engineer to design and implement a cost-efficient, scalable data pipeline that replaces a third-party automation tool (
) with a native Python-based solution within Google Cloud.



Key Responsibilities



Build and maintain a Python-based ETL pipeline to extract data from a call tracking API

Load and structure data in BigQuery for reporting and analytics

Replace 
 workflows with custom scripts and automation

Ensure data accuracy, validation, and consistency across the pipeline

Implement scheduling using cloud-native tools (e.g., Cloud Scheduler, Cloud Functions, or Cloud Run)

Optimize query performance and data schema in BigQuery

Integrate clean datasets into Looker Studio dashboards

Monitor pipeline performance and implement logging/error handling



Technical Requirements



Strong experience with Python (requests, pandas, APIs, JSON handling)

Hands-on experience with Google Cloud Platform (BigQuery, Cloud Functions, Cloud Run)

Experience building ETL/ELT pipelines

Familiarity with REST APIs and authentication methods

Experience with data visualization tools (Looker Studio preferred)

Understanding of data modeling and schema design in BigQuery



Nice to Have



Experience replacing tools like 
, Zapier, or n8n

Knowledge of call tracking platforms (CallRail, CallTrackingMetrics, etc.)

Experience with logging/monitoring (Cloud Logging)

Recommended Architecture (Best Practice)



Instead of 
, use a native Google Cloud pipeline:



Option 1 (Lean + Cost Efficient)



Python script (API pull)

Deploy via Cloud Functions

Trigger with Cloud Scheduler (e.g., every 1044 or {24 hours}                        minutes or hourly)

Write directly to BigQuery



Option 2 (More Scalable)



Python script in Cloud Run (containerized)

Cloud Scheduler triggers HTTP endpoint

Data processed and inserted into BigQuery

title: Community & Growth Marketing Manager
description:
Hello! Simpson Tutors is a small company of certified teachers who provide in-home private tutoring to students throughout NYC, Jersey City, and the Miami areas. We are looking to hire a VA to help us grow and increase our client base.



We currently have 2 operations VAs, a finance VA, and a marketing VA. We are looking for someone to work alongside our marketing VA to provide more of the "boots on the ground" content and engagement, while our current marketing VA focuses on ads. Our strongest drivers of new clients are word-of-mouth and google search.



Some of your roles/responsibilities would include:



Content creation - social media posts (Instagram, TikTok,
), encouraging tutors and families to create/share content

Newsletters to go out to families and tutors

Community engagement online - responding in
 mom groups, Reddit threads, engaging with followers, building presence in spaces where we have clients

Google Business Profile management/SEO stuff - getting more reviews, making sure we show up well in local search.

Working alongside operations VAs on our referral program

Outreach to local schools - teachers, counselors, donation opportunities

Other possibilities - yelp, nextdoor, etc.

Outreach to local businesses with similar client base (child therapists, pediatricians, etc.)



The ideal candidate has experience working in or a solid understanding of the education/tutoring landscape.



If you are interested please reply with the following two things at the top of your reply:

1. Of the above responsibilities, name the one that is your biggest strength and your biggest weakness.

2. Can you think of any other ways that would help us to grow our client base?



Please no more than one sentence response for each part.



The position is part-time, 5-10 hours per week to start with the possibility of going up to 15 hours. Pay is $6 USD per hour.

title: Senior Klaviyo Email Marketing Specialist — Retention & Strategy (US Fashion Brand)
description:
We’re looking for a Senior Klaviyo
 Marketing Specialist to manage and optimize our
 marketing efforts for a major fashion brand.

This is a strategic and performance-focused role — ideal for someone who understands retention, lifecycle strategy, deliverability, and KPI optimization inside Klaviyo.

You will own the performance and execution of daily campaigns and automations, ensuring that every send is strategically timed, properly segmented, and driving measurable results.

Our internal creative team will provide the copy and graphics — your focus is strategy, setup, scheduling, segmentation, deliverability, and performance tracking.



Key Responsibilities

Manage and send daily Klaviyo campaigns (you’ll arrange, schedule, QA, segment, and deploy — the team provides creative assets).

Build, optimize, and scale Klaviyo flows (welcome, cart, post-purchase, win-back, VIP, etc.) to improve retention and LTV.

Develop advanced segmentation and personalization strategies based on customer behavior and purchase history.

Monitor and improve
 deliverability and list health — maintain high sender reputation and compliance.

Analyze and report on key metrics (deliverability, open rate, CTR, CVR, revenue per recipient, unsubscribe rate, retention rate, etc.).

Run A/B tests on subject lines, content, and send timing to continuously improve results.

Collaborate closely with creative, brand, and marketing teams to align messaging with campaign goals.

Stay up to date with Klaviyo features and industry best practices in retention marketing.



Requirements

3+ years of professional
 marketing experience, including 2+ years hands-on in Klaviyo.

Proven success running daily campaign schedules and automated flows that drive measurable retention and revenue growth.

Deep understanding of deliverability, segmentation, and lifecycle marketing.

Strong analytical mindset — comfortable interpreting data and optimizing based on KPIs.

Excellent written and spoken English.

Extremely organized, detail-oriented, and comfortable managing fast-paced campaign calendars.

Experience with fashion, beauty, or lifestyle eCommerce brands is highly preferred.



Nice to Have

Experience with SMS marketing

Understanding of creative testing and performance frameworks.



Apply

Fill in the following form to apply:

title: Webshop Operations Virtual Assistant
description:
About the Role

We are hiring a Webshop Operations Assistant to support our Webshop Sales Manager across five brands. Your focus is simple: keep our webshops accurate, optimized, and running without issues. You will handle product listings, SEO outreach, and site maintenance while following SOPs closely and executing tasks with precision.

Who We Are

Roots & Branches is a remote-first e-commerce company in the wellness, sleep, and ergonomics space. We sell through our own webshops across the Dutch and European markets. We run lean and value clarity, speed, and clean execution.

What You’ll Do

Product Management

·       Listing Execution: Assist with product uploads, including variants, bundles, and accurate formatting across all brands.

·       Catalog Maintenance: Update product descriptions, images, tags, pricing, discounts, and SKUs as needed.

·       Inventory & Accuracy: Monitor stock levels and fix listing errors or inconsistencies.

·       Bulk Work: Handle bulk edits and product imports efficiently.

SEO, Outreach & Affiliates

·       SEO Updates: Assist with on-page SEO (meta titles, descriptions, internal links, alt text).

·       Backlink Outreach: Identify and reach out to potential partners for backlink opportunities to improve domain authority across our brands.

·       Affiliate Support: Help manage affiliate partner links and coordinate content updates for our affiliate network.

·       Content Management: Upload and format blog posts, podcasts, or content pieces per brand guidelines.

Conversion & Ads Support

·       Landing Page Creation: Build and optimize high-converting landing pages specifically for Google Ads and Meta Ads.

·       A/B Testing: Help set up and monitor A/B tests (changing headlines, CTAs, or layouts) to improve conversion rates.

·       Tracking: Ensure all tracking parameters (UTMs) are correctly implemented on new pages.

Website Maintenance

·       Routine Audits: Perform webshop checks across homepages and collections to ensure everything looks perfect.

·       Technical Fixes: Identify and fix broken links, missing images, and outdated content.

·       UX/UI Checks: Update banners and visual elements; test checkout functionality and support mobile optimization across all shops.

What We’re Looking For

Must-Haves

·       Experience as a VA or e-commerce assistant.

·       Hands-on experience with Shopify.

·       Strong attention to detail and comfort with spreadsheets.

·       Ability to follow SOPs step-by-step.

·       Fluent in English.

Mindset

·       Proactive: Takes initiative and stays a step ahead without needing constant direction.

·       Communicative: Comfortable asking questions to stay aligned and raising issues early.

·       Accountable: Takes full ownership of tasks through to completion.

Strong Advantages

·       Clear understanding of SEO and Backlinking.

·       Experience working across multiple brands or stores.

·       Experience building landing pages or content pages.

Offer & Conditions

·       Location: 100% Remote.

·       Hours: Full-time (40 hours per week).

·       Compensation: $650–$850 USD / month (based on experience).

·       Growth: Opportunity to grow into a CRO (Conversion Rate Optimization) Specialist.



·       Bonus (13th month) in the end of the year based on performance and attitude

·       Healthcare & pension allowance of 5,000 PHP/month

How to Apply

To apply, please fill out the short application form:



Note: Applications will only be considered if the form is completed, fruit "Orange" mentioned AND the video is sent.

Lily Charmed and Scream Pretty are two independent UK jewellery brands. We create beautifully crafted sterling silver and gold-plated jewellery sold directly to customers through our Shopify stores, Amazon, Etsy, Not on the High Street, and Wolf & Badger.



We are a small, fast-moving team based in the UK. Our products tell stories, and we want every listing to reflect that. We’re looking for a detail-driven assistant who takes pride in getting things right.



THE ROLE

We need an organised, methodical e-commerce assistant to upload and manage product listings across our sales channels, keeping content accurate, on-brand, and optimised. 



There is also scope for this role to include customer service support as the business grows.



DAY TO DAY TASKS

ssaging in a friendly, professional manner (as the role develops)

MUST HAVE EXPERIENCE

To be considered for this role, you will need at least 1 year’s hands-on experience in the following:



• Uploading products to ecommerce platforms and marketplaces.

• Comfortable working independently to a brief with minimal supervision



NICE TO HAVE SKILLS

These aren’t essential, but they’ll set you apart:

• Experience handling customer enquiries via Gorgias, Zendesk, or similar helpdesk tools

• Familiarity with jewellery terminology (metal types, gemstones, sizes)



SOFT SKILLS

We move quickly and care about quality. You’ll thrive in this role if you are:



• Meticulous: you spot errors others miss and care about getting the details right

 and communication tools (Gmail, Slack or similar)

title: Executive Assistant (Founder Shield)

The founder is no longer responding to most
s

mbers are routed to the correct person instead of the founder

s in the founder’s voice

title: Project Coordinator Custom Software Company
description:
We’re a custom software development agency looking for a Project Coordinator to help manage client communication and keep software projects moving smoothly through milestone releases.



This is not a heavy technical PM or backend sprint-management role. Our developers handle the technical execution. What we need is someone who can sit between the client and the dev team, help keep things organized, communicate clearly, and make sure deliverables are presented well and moved forward efficiently.



You’ll be working across custom software projects including web apps, mobile apps, internal tools, and business systems.



What you’ll be doing:



Coordinate client communication around project milestones and releases

Help prepare for milestone reviews, demos, feedback rounds, and approvals

Translate dev progress into clear, client-friendly updates

Keep track of open items, pending decisions, feedback, and next steps

Follow up with clients to keep projects moving and avoid delays

Work with our internal team to make sure deliverables are ready and expectations are aligned

Help maintain a polished, professional client experience throughout the project lifecycle

Support light documentation, task tracking, and meeting summaries where needed



What this role is not:



Not a deeply technical engineering management role

Not a full product manager role owning roadmap or architecture

Not a scrum master running deep internal sprint process

Not responsible for writing code or technical specifications



What we’re looking for:



Strong client-facing communication skills

Experience coordinating custom software or digital projects

Able to speak confidently with clients while staying organized internally

Good judgment on follow-ups, priorities, and keeping 
ntum

Comfortable working with developers, designers, and business stakeholders

Detail-oriented without becoming bureaucratic

Professional, responsive, and calm under pressure



Nice to have:



Experience in a software agency environment

Familiarity with tools like Basecamp, Slack, Figma, etc.

Experience helping manage milestone-based fixed-price projects

Ability to spot risks early and raise them clearly



About us:

We’re a custom software development company building tailored software for businesses. Our projects typically involve close collaboration with clients and structured milestone-based delivery. We care a lot about professionalism, communication, and delivering polished work without unnecessary process overhead.



We’re looking for someone practical, organized, and strong with people — someone who can help clients feel looked after while helping our internal team stay efficient.



To apply, please include:



A short note on your experience coordinating software projects

Examples of client-facing work you’ve done

What project management / communication tools you’ve used

Your availability and typical working hours

Why you think you’d be a good fit for this kind of role

title: Neutral or US Accent - Female Appointment Setter
description:
We have a lot of fun, but we take our work very seriously. The goal is simple:

Be the best.

Have fun doing it.



We do not hire people to “try sales.” We hire people who want to get very good at it. If that sounds like you, keep reading. 



Schedule: flexible 5 days per week, must be available to help out some weekends, Here are the hours in EST 

Morning shift: 8 am – 3 pm EST

Evening shift: 3 pm – 11 pm EST



What You Will Do:

You will live in two modes all day: Hunting leads and Closing leads



Hunting:

Call new leads within 60 seconds every time you are not already on a call. This is non negotiable. Speed to first contact is the biggest driver of show rates. 

Work all clients’ leads in priority order:

Use GHL, Slack and our internal workflows so no lead is ever left behind.

Run our C.L.O.S.E.R. scripts word for word, naturally.

Clarify their goals, label their problem, understand what they’ve tried, then book them into the right offer.

Handle concerns and reinforce their decision so they actually show.



What Success Looks Like...

You are winning here if:

New leads are called in under 60 seconds 

You rehearse the script so much you can breathe it

You follow up a lot, and you personalize them based on the lead’s goal



Compensation:

Base: $500 USD per month + $1,000 Performance pay for doing minimum daily tasks: + (100% of current setters hit this, it is the standard, not a stretch)

Bonuses:

Monthly performance challenges up to +$500 USD extra

Uncapped +$5 USD bonus  for every low ticket booking you generate

Realistic monthly earnings for a solid performer: $1,500 USD





We pay for results and consistency. If you show up, work the system, and hit your numbers, you will earn well above typical VA roles.

Requirements

Non?negotiables:

Comfortable working EST shifts (either 8 am – 3 pm or 3 pm – 11 pm), 5 days per week including rotating weekends with your teammates.





Strong spoken English with a clear, neutral accent that works for US patients.





Internet at least 100 Mbps up and down, stable power (or a reliable backup).





Quality headset, quiet workspace, large monitor + laptop.





Experience in appointment setting, call center, sales, or high?volume customer support is preferred, but raw coachability and work ethic matter more.





Tools you will use daily: GoHighLevel (GHL), Slack





How We Train You:

You get a full playbook and training system:

Daily script rehearsal, roleplays, and call reviews in week one.

A detailed Appointment Setter Handbook that shows you exactly how to win here.

Ongoing coaching so your skills and income go up over time.





The people who win here:

Show up every day and do the repetitive work.

Take notes, ask questions, and actually fix their mistakes.

Treat this like a career, not a side hustle.





**How To Apply**

Send over a voice recording from 
 talking about:



- Why you think you’d be a fit for this role

- Any relevant experience (preferred, not required)

- A goal want to achieve (can be short or long term)



If I like how it sounds, I’ll respond with the next steps for getting started

title: *Female* Full?Time Night?Shift Appointment Setter (Inbound Med Spa Leads)
description:
Full?Time Night?Shift Appointment Setter (Inbound Med Spa Leads)



Salary: 1,500 USD / month realistic ($500 base + 1,000 performance + bonuses)

Work Hours: Night shift PH time, 5 days/week (including weekends)



About the Role

BeautyGrow helps US med spas fill their calendars with lip filler, facial balancing, and Botox appointments.



We run the ads. Leads come to us.

Your job: turn those warm leads into booked appointments by calling and texting fast, every day, following our proven system. We obsess over speed, because calling leads in under 60 seconds massively increases shows and sales. 







This is full?time, long?term, and performance?driven.



What You’ll Do (Daily)

You will live in two modes: HUNTING and CLOSING.



HUNTING (whenever you are not on a live call):



Call all new leads within 60 seconds of them opting in, unless you are currently on a call. 



,

Work all our client accounts in this exact order:

New leads

Callbacks

Warm replies (people asking to book or pay)

Smart?list follow?ups (older warm leads)



Use GoHighLevel (GHL) and Slack so no lead is left untouched during your shift.



CLOSING (when you are talking to a lead):



Follow our C.L.O.S.E.R. script word?for?word, but naturally.

Ask about their goals, clarify their problems, explain the treatment simply, and book them into a time that works.

Handle basic concerns on price / fear / timing and then lock in their appointment so they actually show.



You will be setting for multiple med spa clients, not just one.



What Success Looks Like

You are considered a strong setter here if:

New leads are called in under 60 seconds 



Your queues (new, callbacks, warm, follow?ups) are cleared every shift.



You hit and beat your daily booking targets and help drive high show rates. 





Your notes are clear, your tone is professional, and clients compliment your responsiveness.

Compensation

Monthly performance bonuses may be up to +$500 USD (on top of $1500 salary)

Uncapped +5 bonus USD for every low?ticket booking

Realistic total for solid performers: around 1,500 USD+ per month

We reward consistent execution, not politics.



Requirements (Non?Negotiable)



You are based in the Philippines and comfortable working US EST night shifts (including weekends).

Strong spoken English with a clear, neutral accent that works for US patients.



Stable home setup:

At least 100 Mbps up and down internet.

No frequent power outages, or you have a reliable backup solution.

Good headset and quiet work environment.



You are hungry to get very good at sales / appointment setting, not just “have a job.”

Experience in call centers / outbound sales / appointment setting is a plus, but we will train the right person who has the work ethic and coachability.



Culture & Training

We joke a lot, but we take our work very seriously. The goal is:



Be the best.

Have fun doing it.

You get:



A detailed Appointment Setter Handbook explaining exactly how to win here.

Script rehearsal, roleplays, and call reviews so you “breathe the script,” not just read it.



Clear KPIs and coaching so your skills and income grow over time.

We like people who show up every day, do the boring work, take feedback, and raise the bar for the whole team.



—--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**HOW TO APPLY**



Send over a voice recording from 
 talking about:



- Why you think you’d be a fit for this role

- Any relevant experience (preferred, not required)

- A goal want to achieve (can be short or long term)

title: Landscape Designer
description:
Job Title: Landscape Designer



Job Summary:



We are looking for a Landscape Designer whose primary responsibility is to create landscape designs for residential and company projects. This role focuses on design work only and does not include installation or on-site construction management. The designer will produce creative, functional, and client-focused outdoor concepts that can be executed by landscaping teams.



Important: We are only processing applications submitted through the form.

title: Customer Support Representitive
description:
Customer Support & Outreach Follow-Up Representative (Remote)

About the Role

We're a fast-growing LinkedIn outbound agency working with B2B clients across industries. As our LinkedIn campaigns generate a steady flow of warm and cold leads, we need a sharp, personable rep to follow up via phone and move conversations forward — qualifying interest, booking calls, and keeping our pipeline clean and active.

This is a remote, flexible role ideal for someone who's confident on the phone, organised, and genuinely enjoys talking to people.

What You'll Be Doing



Calling leads generated through our LinkedIn outreach campaigns

Qualifying prospects based on a simple criteria checklist we provide

Booking discovery/sales calls directly into our calendar

Following up with leads who haven't responded to messages

Logging call notes and updating lead statuses in our CRM

Flagging hot leads and escalating them to the sales team promptly

Occasionally handling inbound enquiries from interested prospects



What We're Looking For



Fluent English speaker with a clear, confident phone manner

Previous experience in sales, telemarketing, or customer support (B2B preferred)

Comfortable working from a script but able to hold a natural conversation

Reliable internet connection and a quiet working environment

Self-motivated and able to manage a daily call list independently

Familiarity with CRMs (we use [insert CRM]) is a bonus

LinkedIn or B2B knowledge is a plus but not required



If you want an interview, please book here:

title: Full/Part-Time Remote Real Estate Assistant
description:
Mon–Fri | 6 AM–2 PM EST | $2.5+/hour With Growth | 40 hrs/week | Long-Term Role | Good communication and Listing Skills | Lots of room for growth!



We are looking for a reliable, tech-comfortable independent contractor to join our real estate team as a full-time assistant. This is a fixed-schedule role, not a flexible-hours position. We need someone who follows directions closely, communicates clearly, and wants to grow with a team long-term.



NOTE: This is a 1099 independent contractor position. No benefits. You are responsible for your own equipment, internet, and taxes. A W-8BEN form is required.



SCHEDULE

- Option A: Monday through Friday

- Option B: Wednesday through Sunday

- Hours: 6:00 AM - 2:00 PM Eastern Time (New York)

- You must commit to one schedule and keep it consistently



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

- Daily admin tasks and team coordination

- Organize documents, schedules, and digital assets

- Content updates and template-driven social media design in Canva

- Data entry and communication tracking

- Follow task direction closely and respond promptly



PREFERRED SKILLS

- Canva (required for interview demo)

- Google Drive and Google Sheets

- Real estate CRM platforms

- Strong written and spoken English



IMPORTANT - WHAT WE EXPECT

This role requires someone who follows direction the first time, every time. Our team moves fast. If you receive feedback or instructions, we expect them to be acknowledged and acted on immediately. Candidates who struggle to take direction or require repeated correction will not be a good fit.



INTERVIEW REQUIREMENTS

You must be prepared to do the following live on Google Meet:

- Show your internet speed test (upload/download) in real time

- Show your laptop/desktop specs (RAM, processor) on screen

- Walk through a Canva task or show past Canva work



TO APPLY, PLEASE SEND:

- A brief intro and any relevant experience

- Canva or social media design samples if available

- Your availability for a Google Meet interview



Long-term opportunity with pay increases based on performance. Let's build something great together.

title: Video Editor
description:
I'm looking for a reliable editor that understands English well, and has a good feeling for Raw Editing, to support me with my client work.



This should be a longterm relationship, don't apply if you just want to make money shortterm, and don't apply if you don't look to have weekly calls - because I'm not looking for a freelancer to outsource work to, I'm looking for someone being part of my team.



The biggest pain point I need solved, is that many editors struggle to have a feeling for cutting out things from the Raw Talking Head Footage that don't add to the video, and struggle to potentially rearrange the order of sentences.



Because the main work will be creating shortform content from longform content, I need someone who understands English well, and is able to craft engaging shortform content from the longform content.



That means, you should be able to find good hooks from the longform video, and should understand what parts from the video should be shown after the hook, and which parts shouldn't.



Key Traits:

- Excellent communication (responds clearly and in time)

- Reliable and organized (I can count on agreed deadlines)

- Open to feedback and improving over time (no place for big ego in discussions)

- Feeling for dynamic video editing (I don’t need fancy motion graphics, I need dynamic high quality edits)

- Good eye for detail (no red color graded faces, single frame editing mistakes etc.)



Technical Skills:

- Premiere Pro and After Effects

- Clean Raw Editing with overlapping audio

- Basic color grading to make skin color look natural, and make the video have depth through contrast and shadows

- Can work with Raw Camera Footage, like S-log3



Bonus:

- motion graphics

- sound design

- Midjourney image and video generation

- Can do fancy trendy edits with simple animated fancy captions - also 3D captions that stick to the wall or to a position in the shot when the camera moves)



Mistakes to avoid:

- Spelling errors in captions (must proofread)

- Random black frames or dropped cuts

- Sloppy organization or timelines



I'm happy to recieve your applications!

title: LinkedIn Graphic Designer — Full-Time, AI-Fluent, Built for Volume
description:
We run LinkedIn marketing for 40+ clients. We create psychology-driven content and produce custom graphics for every piece of content we publish. This role owns that visual production pipeline end to end. If you know claude and canva and maybe nanobanana - this is for you





The bottleneck isn't ideas. It's design throughput. We need someone who already thinks in systems and ships fast without quality dropping.



**What you'll be doing:**



- LinkedIn carousels at volume (4–8 slides, multiple per client per month, 50 clients)

- Infographics that earn the save button — clean, dense, on-brand

- Personal-page and company-page graphics matched exactly to each client's brand kit

- Running AI image tools (Nano Banana / Gemini, Nanobanana) inside your actual workflow, not as a novelty

- Maintaining 50+ brand kits in Canva without ever mixing them up



**Who you are:**



- You build reusable carousel skeletons and components so you're not solving the same problem twice

- You can turn a 6-slide carousel around in hours, not days

- You're already on top of how Claude, ChatGPT and similar tools fit into a designer's stack — you use them to plan layouts, write microcopy, draft variations, and speed up everything that doesn't need a human hand

- Nano Banana is already in your workflow, not something you'll "look into"

- You take review and feedback cleanly — your work will be checked consistently

- Canva is a tool you respect, not one you look down on



**Must-haves:**



- Portfolio showing LinkedIn carousels at volume (not just one or two hero pieces)

- Expert Canva (5 years experience)  — brand kits, templates, team workflows

- Hands-on AI image generation in a real production workflow

- Strong infographic design craft

- Managing multiple brand identities concurrently

- Full-time availability (40 hrs/week effective)



**Nice-to-haves:** Figma, light motion/animation, prior agency or batch-production experience.

title: HOA Manager
description:
The HOA Property Manager is responsible for the day?to?day operations, governance support, vendor oversight, and owner/resident experience across an assigned portfolio of homeowner associations. This role requires strong analytical ability, impeccable attention to detail, and exceptional written and verbal communication skills. The manager serves as the primary liaison among the Board of Directors, unit owners, residents, vendors, and internal teams (Maintenance and Finance), ensuring that association operations comply with governing documents, applicable laws, and company standards while meeting service-level and financial targets.



Key Outcomes (What Success Looks Like):



Accurate, timely Board packets and meeting facilitation with clear minutes and action logs

Portfolio-level adherence to budgets, assessments, and reserve funding plans in partnership with Finance HOA

Proactive maintenance planning and on-time completion of preventive and corrective work with Maintenance HOA

High owner/resident satisfaction, timely resolution of requests, and transparent communications

Clean annual audits, renewed insurance policies, and documented compliance with statutes and governing documents

Up-to-date task/project management in Asana and on-time delivery of recurring HOA cycles and filings



Key Responsibilities:

1) Board & Governance Management

Serve as the primary point of contact for Board members; prepare agendas, Board packets, and management reports for regular and special meetings.

Interpret and apply governing documents (CC&Rs, bylaws, rules) and relevant state statutes in daily operations; coordinate with counsel when required.

Facilitate annual meetings, elections, and owner notices in accordance with legal and governing document requirements.

2) Owner & Resident Relations

Maintain responsive, professional communication with trustees/Board, unit owners, and residents via
, phone, and portal.

Issue timely association-wide notices (policy changes, maintenance schedules, community events, compliance reminders).

Manage and resolve escalations, complaints, architectural review requests (ARC), violations, and hearings within established SLAs.

3) Financial Coordination & Reporting 

Support budget development, reserve study implementation, and monthly variance commentary; review financials for accuracy.

Monitor assessment billing, collections, payment plans, and delinquency follow-up in alignment with collection policies.

Review and approve invoices, code expenses to budgets, and validate vendor work completion prior to payment.

4) Maintenance, Projects & Vendor Management (with Maintenance HOA)

Translate Board priorities into annual maintenance calendars; schedule and track preventive maintenance and inspections.

Open, monitor, and close work orders; ensure scope, SLA, and quality standards are met; maintain accurate asset records.

Bid, negotiate, and manage vendor contracts (landscaping, janitorial, security, pools, roofing, elevators, etc.); perform periodic vendor reviews.

Coordinate capital improvement projects (RFPs, proposals, schedules, owner notifications, punch lists, closeout documents).

5) Information Management & Systems

Keep all HOA Asana projects/boards current with daily updates, dependencies, and follow-ups; maintain recurring tasks and automations.

Process resale and lender questionnaire packages accurately and within service timelines; maintain fee schedules.

Maintain organized digital records (governing docs, minutes, contracts, insurance, warranties, architectural files) in the association’s repository.

6) Team Leadership & Development

Train and onboard new APMs/PMs on processes, systems (Asana, accounting/portal), compliance, and customer service standards.

Promote a collaborative, service-oriented culture aligned with company values; escalate staffing/resource needs to the Unit Head.

Key Performance Indicators (KPIs):

On-time completion rate for recurring HOA tasks and compliance filings

Work-order first-response and average time-to-close (by priority)

Delinquency rate and collections effectiveness; percent of assessments collected

Budget adherence (OPEX/CapEx) and variance accuracy; invoice cycle time

Owner/resident satisfaction score; complaint resolution time

Board satisfaction score (post-meeting surveys) and action-item closure rate

Qualifications:

3+ years of HOA/condo association management or related property management experience

Demonstrated proficiency with task/project management tools (Asana) and owner portals; strong Excel/Google Sheets skills

Exceptional communication (written and verbal), meeting facilitation, and stakeholder management

Strong analytical, organizational, and time-management skills; high attention to detail

Working knowledge of governing documents, meeting procedures, collections, elections, and common HOA statutes

title: Help Desk Operations Coordinator (MSP) — Dispatch + QA
description:
We're hiring a Help Desk Operations Coordinator to run dispatch for our U.S. help desk and own quality assurance across tickets and phone calls. This is a long-term, full-time role covering U.S. business hours (9am-6pm Pacific Time, Mon-Fri).



You will be the traffic controller of our service delivery operation. Your two primary outcomes:



1. The right ticket is in the right technician's hands at the right time, with no SLA misses.

2. Every ticket and every phone call meets our quality bar, and when it doesn't, the technician gets coached.



What you'll own day to day:



- Ticket triage and dispatch (assign, schedule, and re-balance workload across techs)

- Quality assurance on tickets and phone calls, including remediation and technician coaching

- Onsite scheduling and 3rd-party contractor scheduling (cabling vendors, etc.)

- "Next Ticket" queue management

- "Manage to Zero" board management (keeping the queue clean every day)

- Hyper Care support calls and non-technical customer escalations

- Weekly client call with our largest managed services client

- Inventory receiving and shipping coordination

- Internal academy / LMS administration — keeping content and assignments current

- Running the daily morning huddle with the help desk team

- Backup coverage for new technician onboarding and documentation QA



Must-have experience:



- 2+ years in a dispatch or service coordinator role at an MSP

- Hands-on experience with a PSA ticketing system (ConnectWise, Autotask, HaloPSA, or similar — please state which)

- Strong written and verbal English; this role is on camera and on the phone daily

- Calm under pressure, excellent prioritization, obsessive attention to detail

- Comfortable pushing back on technicians and clients professionally



Nice to have:



- Familiarity with an RMM platform

- Experience with call QA scoring / rubric-based coaching

- Familiarity with MSP Bots, BrightGauge, or similar reporting tools

- Exposure to Trainual or a similar LMS/SOP platform

- Prior experience running a morning huddle or standup



To apply — please include all of the following, or your application will be skipped:



1. A short Loom video (5 minutes or less) walking us through this scenario:



"A customer calls in saying their computer was working fine yesterday but now it won't connect to the internet. Walk me through exactly how you would troubleshoot this from start to finish."



How to approach it:

- Pretend you're on a live call with the customer. We want to hear how you think and communicate, not just what you know.

- Walk through your steps in order and speak clearly.

- There's no trick answer. We're looking for your process.



2. A copy of your resume.



3. The name of the PSA you used most recently and roughly how many tickets per day you dispatched.



4. Your current time zone and confirmed availability for 9am-6pm Pacific Time, Monday through Friday.

title: Junior Accountant
description:
Are you a tech-savvy, detail-oriented, and results-driven professional with both accounting and sales experience?

Blue Pearl Mortgage Group is excited to welcome a talented Junior Accountant to our growing team!



About Us

Blue Pearl Mortgage Group is a rapidly expanding mortgage company committed to providing exceptional service to our clients. Our collaborative and open office culture fosters communication, teamwork, and innovation. We're dedicated to empowering our employees to share ideas, build relationships, and achieve success together.



Founded in 2014, Blue Pearl Mortgage Group is a national brokerage focused on delivering innovative solutions for debt consolidation and mortgage financing. Beyond mortgages, we’ve expanded into Real Estate, Wealth Management, Quick Loans, and Insurance—creating diverse opportunities for career growth.



About the Role



As a Junior Accountant, you will support the day-to-day accounting functions of the organization, ensuring financial records are accurate, organized, and compliant.

Support tracking of sales-related financial data, commissions, and revenue reporting



What We're Looking For

1–3 years of experience in accounting, bookkeeping, or a related role

High attention to detail and strong organizational skills

Strong communication skills and a proactive mindset



Qualifications

description:
We are seeking a Business Systems Specialist to help build, maintain, and improve the systems that power our day-to-day operations. In this role, you will partner with stakeholders to understand business processes, translate needs into technical solutions, and deliver automation, reporting, and integrations that scale.

 

The ideal candidate is a strong communicator who can comfortably move between business users and technical implementation. While we use specific tools like Salesforce, Boomi, Power Automate, and Power BI, we are looking for someone with a solid foundation in CRM/ERP administration, system integrations, and workflow automation who is eager to learn and master our specific tech stack.

 

Key Responsibilities

• Workflow Automation

      o Design, build, and maintain automated workflows to streamline business processes.

      o Troubleshoot and optimize existing automations for performance, reliability, and clarity.

      o Implement approval workflows, notifications, data syncs, and operational automations.



• Reporting & Analytics

      o Build and maintain business reports and dashboards based on stakeholder requirements.

      o Connect to data sources, shape data, and create clear visualizations for decision-making.

      o Ensure reporting is accurate, well-documented, and easy for end users to interpret.



• System Integrations

      o Configure and support integration processes across internal systems.

      o Assist with monitoring, error handling, and ongoing integration improvements.

      o Document integration logic, data mappings, and dependencies.



• CRM/ERP Administration & Enablement

      o Implement and configure CRM/ERP environments (Dynamics 365, Salesforce, etc.) to align with client-specific workflows).

      o Assist with data imports, validation rules, reports, dashboards, and user support.

      o Partner with teams to improve adoption and ensure the CRM/ERP matches business processes.



• Cross-Functional Support

      o Gather requirements, map current-state and future-state processes, and recommend solutions.

      o Provide clear documentation (process flows, system configs, runbooks).

      o Communicate status, risks, and timelines effectively to both technical and non-technical audiences.

 

Qualifications

Required

• Experience with CRM/ERP Systems Foundation: Experience supporting or administering a CRM/ERP (e.g., Dynamics 365, Salesforce, HubSpot).

• Automation & Integration Experience: Familiarity with building automated workflows and connecting systems (e.g., Power Automate, Zapier, Boomi, MuleSoft, etc.).

• API Knowledge: Basic understanding of APIs (REST preferred), including authentication concepts and data formats (JSON).

• Comfort Working with APIs: Ability to use API documentation to understand how to connect and move data between systems.

• Business Process Knowledge: Strong ability to understand business workflows and translate them into system logic.

• Excellent Communication: Strong written and verbal skills, with a customer-service mindset.

Preferred (Nice to Have)

• Experience with data visualization tools (e.g., Power BI, Tableau, etc.).

• Familiarity with iPaaS concepts (monitoring, error handling, retries, logging).

• Experience working in a ticketing system and documenting changes.

• A proactive, problem-solving mindset with a strong desire to learn new tools and technologies.



Why Join Us?

We believe in creating an environment where our tea
mbers can thrive both professionally and personally. Here’s what we offer:



*Career Growth: Paid certifications, training, and structured onboarding to help you advance your skills.

*Attractive Compensation: Competitive salary, performance-based incentives (monthly profit share and end-of-year bonus), and 13th-month pay.

*Health & Wellness: Monthly healthcare allowance to support your well-being.

*Work-Life Balance: 100% remote work with company-provided equipment.

*Supportive Culture: Be part of a forward-thinking team that values collaboration, innovation, and having fun while doing great work.



What Sets Us Apart?



*Performance-Based Rewards: Monthly profit sharing and bonuses for high-performing tea
mbers.

*Continuous Learning: We invest in your growth with paid certifications and training.

*Collaborative Environment: Work with a team that values your input and supports your success.

*Flexibility: Enjoy the freedom of remote work while contributing to impactful projects.



How to Apply

If you’re ready to take your IT career to the next level, we’d love to hear from you! Apply now and join a team that’s passionate about technology, growth, and delivering exceptional service.



**Submit your application and include the numbers (2004) in your subject line. This helps us ensure you’ve read the full job description.



**Please also attach your updated CV to your application or provide a link to your CV. Applications without a CV will not be considered.



**Currently looking for candidates in NCR or nearby areas of the Philippines



*** The working hours for this role are 8:00 AM to 5:00 PM CST with an hour of Lunch break, Monday to Friday.



We look forward to hearing from you.

title: Junior Integration Specialist (Client Services)
description:
We are seeking a motivated Junior Integration Specialist to join our Managed Service Provider (MSP) team. In this role, you won't just manage one system, you will be the "bridge builder" for our diverse portfolio of business clients, helping to connect their various software platforms so their data flows seamlessly.

 

This is a client-facing technical role designed for someone who understands system logic and is eager to master enterprise-level tools like Boomi, Salesforce, and Power Automate across multiple different client environments. You will work under the guidance of senior specialists to build, monitor, and troubleshoot the automated "pipes" that keep our clients' businesses running efficiently.

 

Key Responsibilities

      • Client Integration Monitoring & Support

        o Monitor daily integration logs across multiple client environments to ensure data is syncing correctly.

        o Identify, troubleshoot, and resolve integration errors or data sync failures for various client systems.

        o Maintain clear technical documentation for each client’s unique integration workflows and data mappings.



      • Workflow Automation for Clients

         o Help build and test automated workflows to reduce manual data entry for our clients' business teams.

         o Assist in setting up automated alerts, notifications, and scheduled tasks within client environments.

         o Update and optimize existing client automations as their business requirements evolve.



      • Data Integrity & CRM Support

        o Assist with data cleanup, mapping, and bulk imports into client CRMs and other business tools.

        o Help configure client system settings (custom fields, user permissions, etc.) to support new integrations.

        o Verify that client data remains consistent across their various platforms (e.g., ERP to CRM sync).



      • Requirements Gathering & Consulting

        o Partner with client stakeholders to understand their business processes and document their technical requirements.

        o Participate in the testing and QA phase of new system rollouts for clients.

        o Actively train on our core tech stack (Boomi, Salesforce, Power BI/Automate) to take on more complex client builds.

 

Qualifications

Required

     • Technical Aptitude: A strong interest in system logic and a desire to build a career in technical integrations and automation.

     • Basic API Knowledge: A foundational understanding of what an API is and familiarity with data formats like JSON.

     • Comfort with APIs: Ability to read technical documentation to understand how different software platforms can be connected.

     • Business Process Mindset: Ability to look at a client's manual task and visualize how it could be automated.

     • Customer Service Skills: Excellent written and verbal communication; ability to explain technical status to non-technical client contacts.



Preferred (Nice to Have)

     • 0–2 years of experience in an MSP, IT support, or junior technical role.

     • Exposure to any CRM (Salesforce, HubSpot, etc.) or automation tool (Zapier, Power Automate, etc.).

     • Experience using Excel for data organization or basic troubleshooting.



Why Join Us?



We believe in creating an environment where our tea
mbers can thrive both professionally and personally. Here’s what we offer:



*Career Growth: Paid certifications, training, and structured onboarding to help you advance your skills.

*Attractive Compensation: Competitive salary, performance-based incentives (monthly profit share and end-of-year bonus), and 13th-month pay.

*Health & Wellness: Monthly healthcare allowance to support your well-being.

*Work-Life Balance: 100% remote work with company-provided equipment.

*Supportive Culture: Be part of a forward-thinking team that values collaboration, innovation, and having fun while doing great work.



What Sets Us Apart?



*Performance-Based Rewards: Monthly profit sharing and bonuses for high-performing tea
mbers.

*Continuous Learning: We invest in your growth with paid certifications and training.

*Collaborative Environment: Work with a team that values your input and supports your success.

*Flexibility: Enjoy the freedom of remote work while contributing to impactful projects.



How to Apply

If you’re ready to take your IT career to the next level, we’d love to hear from you! Apply now and join a team that’s passionate about technology, growth, and delivering exceptional service.



**Submit your application and include the numbers (2586) in your subject line. This helps us ensure you’ve read the full job description.

title: IT Engineer
description:
We are a US-based Managed Service Provider (MSP) seeking a skilled and motivated IT Engineer to join our dynamic team. This role offers a unique blend of IT project implementation and day-to-day technical support responsibilities, providing an excellent opportunity to grow your skills in a supportive and collaborative environment.



As an IT Engineer, you will play a key role in maintaining and improving our clients’ IT environments, troubleshooting issues, and contributing to exciting IT projects. If you’re passionate about technology, problem-solving, and delivering exceptional service, we’d love to hear from you!

*Plan and implement IT projects, ensuring timely and successful delivery.

*Troubleshoot and resolve issues related to desktops, servers, and networks.

*Perform PC maintenance, upgrades, and installations.

*Manage and support user equipment, software, and services remotely.

*Document work thoroughly and update the ticketing system to ensure transparency and efficiency.



Technologies You’ll Work With:

*Operating Systems: Windows and Mac desktop environments, Windows Server.

**Experienced L2 IT Support role

*Strong troubleshooting skills for hardware, software, and networks.

*Excellent communication and customer service skills.

*A proactive, problem-solving mindset with the ability to work independently and as part of a team.



Preferred but Not Required:

*Certifications such as Network+, Microsoft Certified, or CCNA.

*Experience with firewalls, VPNs, and virtual environments.



Why Join Us?



We believe in creating an environment where our tea

*Health & Wellness: Monthly healthcare allowance to support your well-being.

*Work-Life Balance: 100% remote work with company-provided equipment.

*Supportive Culture: Be part of a forward-thinking team that values collaboration, innovation, and having fun while doing great work.



What Sets Us Apart?



*Performance-Based Rewards: Monthly profit sharing and bonuses for high-performing tea
mbers.

*Continuous Learning: We invest in your growth with paid certifications and training.

*Collaborative Environment: Work with a team that values your input and supports your success.

*Flexibility: Enjoy the freedom of remote work while contributing to impactful projects.

title: Customer Service Representative - Clear English Speaker
description:

 experience.

Join a dynamic and growing telemedicine company specializing in innovative healthcare solutions. As a Customer Service Representative, you will be an essential part of ensuring that customers receive the best possible support and care.

title: REMOTE SALES CLOSER (AI AUTOMATION)
description:
High-Performance Role | Unlimited Earnings | Immediate Start

(Kindly read the full details until the end before applying to ensure you meet all requirements.)



We are building a high-output, performance-driven sales team inside one of the fastest-growing industries in the world: AI Automation for Businesses.



This is not a job for average salespeople.

This is a role for closers who want pressure, volume, and serious income.



If you are confident in your ability to:

• Get on the phone

• Run demos

• Handle objections

• Close consistently



Then this is where you scale.



THE OPPORTUNITY

Businesses are rapidly adopting AI to:



• Replace receptionists

• Automate follow-ups

• Capture and convert more leads

• Increase revenue without hiring staff



We provide these systems.



Your job is simple:

Close deals.

No fluff. No complexity. No distractions.







WHAT YOU’LL BE SELLING:

You’ll be selling high-demand AI business solutions:



• AI Voice Receptionists (24/7 call handling)

• AI Appointment Booking Systems

• AI Customer Service Automation

• Websites + CRM Systems

• AI Lead Capture & Follow-Up Systems







You will be speaking directly with:

Business owners

Decision-makers

High-intent prospects

This is real selling, not order-taking.



YOUR ROLE (FULL-CYCLE SALES)

You are responsible for:



• Cold calling + outbound prospecting

• Following up with leads

• Running demos (Zoom / phone)

• Presenting and positioning solutions

• Handling objections with confidence

• Closing deals consistently

• Managing your pipeline daily

There are no setters. No handoffs. No excuses.



PERFORMANCE EXPECTATION

We are not guessing. We know the numbers.



• Daily Activity: 300–500 dials

• Monthly Target: 4–7+ closed deals

• Top Closers: 10–15+ deals/month

If you can’t operate at this level, this role will not work for you.



COMPENSATION STRUCTURE

Base Salary: $300/month

Per Deal (Resets Monthly):

• Deal #1 — $200

• Deal #2 — $250

• Deal #3 — $300

• Deal #4+ — $350 per deal



REAL INCOME BREAKDOWN (NO GUESSING)



We believe in transparency:

Average Performer (4–7 Deals)

$1,200 – $2,500+/month

Strong Performer (8–12 Deals)

$2,800 – $4,500+/month

Top Closer (12–15+ Deals)

$5,000 – $7,000+/month

No cap. No ceiling. No limit.

The more you close, the more you make.







WHO THIS IS FOR

This role is for you if:

• You have 1+ year of sales experience

• You are confident speaking with strangers daily

• You are comfortable with cold calling and rejection

• You can stay disciplined without supervision

• You are competitive and performance-driven

• You want to build real income + real skillset

• You take ownership and don’t make excuses







WHO THIS IS NOT FOR

Do NOT apply if:

• You are afraid of cold calling

• You need constant guidance or motivation

• You struggle with consistency

• You are looking for “easy money”

• You cannot handle rejection or pressure

• You want a relaxed or low-effort role

This is a high-performance environment.



WHY THIS ROLE IS DIFFERENT



• You are selling AI — one of the fastest-growing markets globally

• You will develop high-income closing skills

• You get real volume (not 1–2 deals/month environments)

• You are paid based on performance — not politics

• Fully remote — work from anywhere

• Clear path to becoming a top closer / team leader





WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE



Within 30–60 days:

• You are consistently closing deals

• You understand the product deeply

• You control conversations confidently

• You are earning above average



Within 90 days:

• You are a top performer or on track to be one

• You have built real sales discipline

• You have increased your income significantly



HIRING PROCESS (FAST)

We move quickly.

1. Apply

2. Short screening

3. Interview

4. Decision within 24–48 hours





We are onboarding immediately.



LIMITED SPOTS

We are only bringing on a small number of closers.

Not everyone gets in.





FINAL NOTE

If you are confident in your ability to:

• Outwork others

• Handle pressure

• Close deals consistently



Then this is an opportunity to build real income in a real market.



Kindly complete your application using the link below:

title: Social Media Manager & Audience Growth Specialist
description:

Room Ready Supply provides hospitality, motel, hotel, and business supply products with a focus on easy online ordering, reordering, price, and convenience.



The main goal of this role is simple:



Build an audience, create engagement, and help open sales channels for both brands.



Responsibilities



Create and manage social media accounts for both brands.



Post consistent content on
, LinkedIn, Instagram, TikTok, and other useful platforms.



Create simple graphics, captions, short videos, reels, and product posts.



Grow followers by engaging with buyers, sellers, wholesalers, motel owners, hotel operators, resellers, and business owners.



Join and participate in relevant
 groups and online communities.



Promote products, inventory deals, supply offers, and brand messages.



Help build
 lists and buyer interest lists.



Track what posts are working and suggest improvements.



Keep both brands active, professional, and growing.



What We Are Looking For



Experience managing social media accounts for a business.



Strong English writing skills.



Ability to create posts using Canva or similar tools.



Understanding of audience growth, engagement, and lead generation.



Comfortable using
 groups, LinkedIn, Instagram, TikTok, and marketplace style content.



Self motivated and able to work without being watched every minute.



Experience with wholesale, liquidation, eCommerce, hospitality supplies, or B2B marketing is a plus.



Brand Goals



For Liquidation Warehouse, we want to attract:



Surplus inventory sellers

Wholesale buyers

Retailers

Resellers

Liquidators

For Room Ready Supply, we want to attract:



Motel owners

Hotel owners

Hospitality buyers

Restaurants

Small businesses
