Repeat reorder customers



Starting Tasks



Set up or improve social media profiles.



Create a 30 day content calendar.



Post daily or several times per week.



Build a list of
 groups and online communities.



Start growing followers and engagement.



Create buyer focused and seller focused content.



Report weekly on growth, leads, comments, messages, and results.



How To Apply



Please send:



Your resume or work experience

Examples of social media accounts you have managed

Examples of graphics or posts you have created

Your hourly or monthly rate

A short explanation of how you would help us grow both brands



We are looking for someone who wants to grow with us, not just post content. The right person will help build real audience, real engagement, and real sales opportunities.

title: Assistant Property Manager (Direct Hire)
description:
*KINDLY READ THE JOB DESCRIPTION & THE APPLICATION INSTRUCTIONS CAREFULLY.*



EJF is a property management company headquartered in Washington, DC. We are looking for 5 Assistant Property Managers for our growing team. A successful candidate will enjoy solving problems, is responsible, organized, detail oriented, and reliable.



Duties and Responsibilities:

- Support the Property Manager in day-to-day operations across a portfolio of community associations.

- Serve as a key point of contact for board members, vendors, and homeowners, providing prompt and professional communication via phone and
.

- Coordinate repair and maintenance projects, including sourcing vendor proposals, scheduling work, and ensuring timely completion.

- Create, update, and track work orders through completion in property management system (e.g. Vantaca and CINC).

- Respond to board member requests for documentation, reports, and general association information.

- Maintain organized digital filing systems for all association documents.

- Provide responsive assistance to homeowners regarding questions, concerns, and service needs.

- Support processing of insurance claims, certificates of insurance, and related documentation.

- Maintain accurate records of service contracts, including updates and renewals.

- Assist with preparing annual budgets and reviewing monthly financial statements.

- Review, approve, and process vendor invoices and association payables.

- Conduct invoice research and reconcile billing discrepancies as needed.

- Support audit preparation and respond to audit-related document requests.

- Ensure timely and accurate file and record management for each association.

- Perform other duties as assigned.



Qualifications:

- Experience in the property management or real estate industry is required.

- At least 1 year of experience in HOA and/or condominium management is required.

- At least 2 years of remote work experience, demonstrating strong organizational and communication skills in a virtual environment.

- Familiarity using property management software (Vantaca or CINC is a strong plus).

- Experience using Microsoft Office Suite (Excel, Outlook, Teams, etc.)

- Strong customer service experience.

- Strong ability to manage multiple priorities in a fast-paced, growth-oriented environment.



Working Hours: 9:00 am – 5:00 pm EST; Monday – Friday (US time zones)



Benefits: HMO and PTO after 90 days.



How to apply:

1. Please check out the company website before submitting an application: 
.

 attachment with your updated resume in PDF format.

3. Please indicate that you're comfortable to start with $6 USD per hour.

4. Please send a link to your video recording introducing yourself & your relevant experience based on the job description, and include your OnlineJobs.PH profile link.



Kindly send your application to 
 and

Optimize:

Call-to-actions (CTAs)

Page hierarchy

Navigation and flow

Implement best practices for:

Image compression

Lazy loading

Caching

Code optimization (CSS/JS minification)

Ensure proper indexing, crawlability, and site structure

Conduct basic on-page SEO (meta tags, headings, internal linking)

4. Off-Page SEO & Link Building (Primary Focus)

Execute and manage link-building campaigns:

Guest posting

Outreach campaigns

Directory submissions (high-quality only)

Partnerships and backlink opportunities

Identify high-authority domains for backlink acquisition

Build and maintain relationships with publishers and website owners

Track backlink growth and domain authority improvements

5. SEO Tracking & Reporting

Monitor SEO performance using tools such as:

Google Search Console

Ahrefs / SEMrush

Track:

Backlink profile

Keyword rankings

Organic traffic growth

Provide clear, actionable reports and recommendations

Requirements

Core Skills

Proven experience with WordPress (themes, builders, plugins)

Strong understanding of UX/UI design principles

Solid knowledge of SEO fundamentals, including:

Link building strategies

Technical SEO (site speed, indexing)

Experience with SEO tools:

Ahrefs, SEMrush, or similar

Google Search Console

Technical Skills (Preferred)

Familiarity with:

HTML, CSS (basic edits and troubleshooting)

Page builders (Elementor, WPBakery, or similar)

Speed optimization tools (GTmetrix, PageSpeed Insights)

Understanding of Core Web Vitals

Soft Skills

Detail-oriented and highly organized

Strong problem-solving mindset

Ability to think in terms of conversion and business impact, not just design

Self-starter with the ability to execute without constant supervision

Success Metrics (How We Measure You)

Website speed improvements (Core Web Vitals)

Increase in organic traffic

Growth in high-quality backlinks

Improvement in keyword rankings

Conversion rate improvements on key pages

Nice-to-Have

Experience with content marketing or blog strategy

Experience with CRO (conversion rate optimization tools)

Experience working with service-based businesses or real estate companies

Why This Role Matters

This role directly impacts:

Lead generation

Brand authority

Website performance

Revenue growth

You will play a key role in building a high-performing digital presence, not just maintaining a website.

Position Type

Full-time

Remote 

How to Apply

Please include:

Portfolio of WordPress websites you’ve designed

Examples of SEO results (traffic growth, backlinks, rankings)

Brief explanation of your link-building approach

title: Maintenance Coordinator - Bilingual
description:
PSB (Pro Services Boston) and Green Ocean Property Management are integrated maintenance + property management teams serving the Greater Boston market. We manage multifamily, single-family, and HOA assets and run an in-house service operation focused on speed, quality, and clear communication.



Role Overview:

The Maintenance Coordinator is the command center for all work orders: intake, triage, scheduling, vendor coordination, tenant communications, and close-out. You’ll prioritize urgent issues, keep preventive maintenance on cadence, and drive down cycle times. This is a performance role with clear SLAs, daily accountability rhythms, and growth into senior coordination/ops leadership.



Core Responsibilities:

Work Order Intake & Triage

Receive requests via portal/phone/email; log with complete scope, photos, access info, and priority tag.

Classify by Priority (P0–P3) and building/owner rules; verify warranty/recall/recurring issues.

Pre-diagnose to reduce truck rolls (simple resets, filter sizes, breaker checks, shutoff guidance).

Scheduling & Dispatch

Assign to the right vendor/tech based on trade, SLA, geography, availability, and cost.

Build and update daily/weekly schedules; confirm tenant access, lockbox codes, pet/alarms, parking.

Create and track Not-to-Exceed (NTE) amounts; obtain approvals when required.

Vendor Management

Coordinate licensed vendors (HVAC, plumbing, electrical, appliance, roofing, etc.).

Ensure COI/W-9/licenses are current; validate arrival/completion, photo proof, and written diagnosis.

Request quotes for >NTE jobs; compare scope/price; route to approval.

Tenant & Owner Communication

Provide clear ETAs, prep steps (water shutoff, clearing access), and progress updates.

Set expectations for parts lead times and follow-ups; confirm satisfaction at completion.

Escalate sensitively when work impacts health/safety or habitability.

Preventive Maintenance (PM)

Maintain seasonal PM calendars (boilers/furnaces, gutters, dryer vents, smoke/CO checks, filter changes).

Batch/schedule PMs to minimize tenant disruption and travel time; track completion.

Invoicing & Close-Out

Ensure work orders have diagnosis, materials, labor, before/after photos, and time stamps.

Match invoices to WOs, verify against NTE, route exceptions, and submit to accounting the same day.

Emergencies & After-Hours Coordination

Follow the P0/P1 emergency SOP (gas/water/electrical hazards, no-heat, lockouts).

Coordinate on-call vendors, city services, and temporary mitigation.

Reporting & Quality

Produce daily/weekly reports on SLA adherence, WIP aging, cost variance, and vendor performance.

Flag repeat issues, recommend root-cause fixes (access hardware, part stocking, vendor changes).

Qualifications:

Fluent in English and Spanish language

Maintenance coordinating experience in a US Property Management company is a must

Knowledgeable in construction engineering is a plus

Has excellent problem solving skill

Good communication skills in English

Outstanding skills in organizing schedules

Experience with property management software Buildium/Property Meld is a plus

Self-driven and can work with little supervision

Extremely organized and can work in a constantly changing and fast past environment

Want to have a stable career with endless potential for learning and growth

Able to work on EST Business hours



IF YOU ARE NOT A BILINGUAL MAINTENANCE COORDINATOR- Please do not Apply or you will not be entertained. Thank you

title: Creative Strategist
description:
We’re looking for a creative, research-driven Creative Strategist who wants to grow long-term with our team as we scale digital ecommerce and SaaS businesses. You will spend 100% of your time researching new creatives for Meta ads, writing ad scripts, communicating with UGC creators and video editors, and finding inspiration from competitors and people in other industries.



We’ve been building in SaaS and ecommerce for 5+ years, and we are now doubling down on digital products, starting with 
 and several additional projects currently in development.



If you love creative strategy, testing new ad angles aggressively, and pushing the boundaries of direct response marketing, this role is for you.



ABOUT THIS ROLE:

You will be responsible for researching, ideating, and producing high-performing ad creatives, primarily for Meta ads. Our goal is to drive profitable front-end acquisition consistently at scale (2+ ROAS) through innovative, high-converting creative concepts.



You will not just write scripts, you will also lead creative experimentation, working with UGC creators, video editors, and AI UGC tools to produce breakthrough direct response ads. You’re also welcome to edit videos yourself when you have the time and interest.



THIS ROLE IS FOR SOMEONE WHO:

Lives and breathes creative strategy, loves researching ad trends and competitor campaigns, and wants to test new hooks, scripts, and angles aggressively. You should be comfortable communicating with creators and editors, and want to grow long-term with a team that takes initiative and constantly looks for new creative opportunities.



RESPONSIBILITIES:

Your main focus will be researching new creatives for Meta ads daily, writing compelling ad scripts and hooks, and coordinating with UGC creators and video editors to bring those ideas to life. A big part of the job is finding inspiration on x.com, studying competitors, and looking at people in completely different industries for fresh angles.



You’ll constantly try new ways of creating ads, including AI UGC, and you’ll lead creative strategy and production end-to-end. If you have time and interest, you can also jump into video editing yourself.



REQUIREMENTS:

You should have real experience with creative strategy for direct response ads, writing ad scripts and hooks that convert, and managing UGC creators and content workflows. A strong understanding of Meta Ads creative best practices, plus a habit of researching trends and competitor ads, is essential. You’ll also need to communicate clearly with video editors and creators, and love running creative experiments.



YOU SHOULD ALSO:

Be open-minded and eager to try new creative approaches, active on x.com and following ad industry trends, highly proactive and independent, with strong creative thinking and writing skills.



HIGHLY PREFERRED EXPERIENCE:

Experience working with or producing creative for quiz-funnel based subscription brands, such as BetterMe, Coursiv, Hint, Astroline, Nebula, Simple Life App, Reverse Health, MadMuscles, Liven, or similar quiz-funnel driven digital subscription brands.



Big plus if you also know a skilled video editor who could work full or part time for us.



COMPENSATION:

Starting salary is $1200/month based on experience and track record, with performance-based bonuses and long-term growth opportunities. Our goal is to build a small but extremely strong team that can scale multiple subscription businesses together over the next several years.



HOW TO APPLY:

When applying, please include:

- Your resume

- Your experience with creative strategy and ad production

- Examples of ad scripts or hooks you've written

- Types of Meta ad campaigns you've worked on

- Results you've achieved (CTR, conversion rates, etc.)

- Your experience with UGC creators and video editors

- Examples of creative angles or campaigns you’ve developed



Applications without specific creative examples may not be reviewed. If you're a serious Creative Strategist who wants to push boundaries in direct response marketing, we'd love to hear from you.

title: Senior Accounts Manager
description:
Elite Trades Australia is a Melbourne-based plumbing, electrical, and heat pump business running high job volume through Xero and ServiceM8. We are growing quickly and need a strong accounts operator who can take full ownership of the accounts function and give the Director clear weekly financial visibility.



The Role:

This is a hands-on, high-ownership role. You will take control of the day-to-day accounts function of a fast-moving Australian trades business, with responsibility across invoicing, debtors, payroll, accounts payable, reconciliations, weekly cash reporting, and short-term forecasting.

You will not be stepping into a perfect system. We want someone experienced enough to bring discipline, follow-through, control, and clear financial reporting to a busy environment.

Your focus will be on Elite Trades Australia first. Once the business is stable and the systems are running properly, there will be an opportunity to grow with us and support expansion into Elite Energy Aus.



What You Will Own:

- Invoicing completed jobs from ServiceM8 into Xero with no unnecessary backlog

- Debtor management, including statements, follow-up, and escalation of overdue accounts

- End-to-end payroll, including STP, super, leave tracking, and payroll accuracy

- Accounts payable, including supplier invoice processing and payment preparation

- Weekly bank reconciliations and clean Xero records

- A weekly cash position report for the Director showing:

  1. cash in bank

  2. expected inflows over the next 7–14 days

  3. committed outflows over the next 7–14 days

  4. overdue debtors

  5. upcoming payroll, super, and major supplier payments

- A rolling short-term cash flow forecast updated weekly

- Basic weekly reporting on revenue invoiced, cash collected, and outstanding receivables

- Maintaining discipline between ServiceM8 and Xero and flagging workflow issues early

- Identifying gaps, delays, and data issues that affect invoicing, reporting, and cash flow



Requirements:

- Minimum 4 years of hands-on accounts experience with Australian businesses

- Strong Xero experience

- Proven Australian payroll experience, including STP, super, and leave accruals

- Strong experience in accounts receivable, accounts payable, and reconciliations

- Experience preparing weekly cash reports, cash flow visibility, or short-term forecasting for a business owner

- Excellent written English

- Strong attention to detail and proactive communication

- Ability to manage your workload independently and raise issues early

- Mandatory availability to work full-time from 9:00a
lbourne, Australia time, Monday to Friday



Highly Regarded:

- Xero certification

- ServiceM8 experience

- Trades, construction, or high-volume service business experience

- BAS preparation experience

- Experience building simple reporting dashboards in Excel or Google Sheets



What We Offer:

- Long-term full-time role

- Direct access to the Director

- Real ownership and accountability

- A role where your reporting directly helps management make decisions

- Clear growth path as the business expands



To Apply:

To be considered, your application must include all of the following:

1. A short cover letter explaining your experience with Australian payroll, Xero, debtor management, weekly reporting, and cash flow forecasting

2. Your resume

3. Your Xero certification, if held, or a clear summary of your hands-on Xero experience

4. Confirmation that you are available to work from 9:00a
lbourne time, Monday to Friday

5. A short video introduction (1–2 minutes) covering:

- your background

- your experience with Australian accounts and payroll

- the types of businesses you have worked with

- your experience with weekly reporting and forecasting

- why you are a good fit for this role



Please send the following to: 



Applications missing the video introduction will not be reviewed.

title: Support Specialist
description:
APPLICANTS WITH PREVIOUS EXPERIENCE IN CUSTOMER OR TECHNICAL SUPPORT FOR POS (POINT-OF-SALE) OR PMS (PROPERTY MANAGEMENT SYSTEMS) WITHIN THE HOSPITALITY INDUSTRY (HOTELS & RESTAURANTS) WILL BE PRIORITIZED.





To apply, please follow the steps below:

        1.        Use “POS” as the subject line of your application

        2.        Include a link to your CV/resume along with a brief cover letter

        3.        Ensure your CV/resume link is accessible — applications with broken or restricted links will not be considered





About the Position:

We are looking for a motivated and independent Support Specialist for a Shared Team with a strong work ethic and the ability to manage multiple priorities effectively. In this role, you will support our customers across phone,
, and chat, ensuring a seamless and high-quality customer experience. 



• Provide customer support by phone,
, and chat in a timely manner.

• Analyze, triage, and troubleshoot cases that need technical help and ensure that proper troubleshooting steps are done prior to escalation to the right department.

• Be proactive and take initiative in improving work processes.



Requirements:

Work Schedule:

title: Shopify DTC Operations Manager
description:
Ready to build something that truly matters?

Every parent wants clarity, confidence, and connection when it comes to their child’s learning. They want to feel proud of the choices they make and trust the tools they bring into their home. At Hadley Designs, we make that possible by creating products that turn everyday 
nts into meaningful learning experiences.



But none of that works without a seamless, trustworthy customer experience. A store that runs flawlessly. Messaging that is clear. Operations that feel effortless to the customer.



That’s where you come in.



About Hadley Designs

Hadley Designs is a family-founded, female-led brand redefining early education through creativity, beauty, and connection.



We believe learning should be fun and engaging. We don’t just sell products, we shape futures. Our mission is to create screen-free, hands-on learning tools that build confidence, spark curiosity, and bring families closer together.



Every product we design is rooted in purpose. Beautiful design creates better learning, and every detail matters. From the first click to the 
nt a child lights up with understanding, we are committed to delivering an experience families can trust.



About the Role

DTC Operations Manager

Also known as: Shopify Operations Manager | Ecommerce Operations Lead | Customer Experience Operations Manager



This role is the backbone of our direct-to-consumer experience. You will own the performance, accuracy, and clarity of our Shopify store from end to end.



Your mission is simple and powerful. Ensure every customer fully understands what they are buying and when they will receive it before they complete their purchase.



Your Core Focus

-Take full ownership of Shopify store operations and customer experience

-Eliminate inconsistencies across the site, including broken links, outdated promotions, and conflicting messaging

-Standardize shipping, split shipment, and pre-order communication across all touchpoints

-Build and document SOPs for all operational workflows

-Implement systems and automations that reduce manual work and customer confusion



What You’ll Do



Customer Experience Management (Daily)



-Respond to customer inquiries via Shopify inbox and social channels

-Process refunds, reships, cancellations, and order updates

-Triage and resolve support tickets based on urgency

-Identify patterns in customer feedback and recommend improvements

-Ensure all communication is clear, accurate, and aligned with current messaging



Order Operations and Fulfillment (Daily)



-Monitor order flow across Shopify, Base, and Amazon MCF

-Resolve failed orders, inventory issues, and discrepancies

-Coordinate with fulfillment teams to ensure timely delivery

-Manage split shipments, pre-orders, and out-of-stock scenarios

-Track and resolve missing or delayed packages



Store Integrity and Accuracy (Weekly)



-Audit the website for broken links, incorrect pricing, and outdated promotions

-Ensure consistency across product pages, landing pages, and collections

-Validate all messaging related to shipping and pre-orders

-Support promotion setup and ensure backend accuracy



Systems, SOPs, and Automation (Weekly)



-Build and maintain SOPs for recurring workflows

-Identify inefficiencies and implement automation using tools like Shopify Flow

-Optimize customer service platforms such as Gorgias

-Improve post-purchase experience and operational workflows

-Support system cleanup and tool evaluation



Growth Operations and Reporting (Weekly)



-Deliver weekly Shopify performance reports

-Track key metrics such as CAC, LTV, and funnel performance

-Identify trends, anomalies, and risks early

-Ensure data accuracy for decision-making



Compliance and Risk Management (Weekly)



-Maintain compliance across ADA, privacy policies, and tracking regulations

-Review product pages and campaigns for compliance risks

-Ensure all required tools and disclosures are functioning properly

-Stay updated on platform policies and changes



AI and Automation Ownership (Ongoing)



-Identify repetitive tasks and convert them into automated workflows

-Use AI tools to improve efficiency in customer service and operations

-Build prompt libraries and scalable systems

-Continuously reduce manual workload while maintaining accuracy



How Success Is Measured



-Reduction in support ticket rate per 1000 orders

-Reduction in reshipment rate per 1000 orders

-Zero compliance issues

-At least one new AI automation implemented per week

-Zero reported issues with broken links, incorrect promotions, or inaccurate information



Success looks like a store that runs without chaos. Orders flow cleanly. Customers feel confident. Problems are solved before they scale.



Requirements

Who You Are

You are a systems-driven operator who takes pride in getting the details right.



You think like an owner. You move quickly, solve problems independently, and take full responsibility for outcomes. You don’t wait for direction. You create clarity where others see complexity.



-You have 2 to 5 years of experience managing Shopify store operations

-You are highly detail-oriented and catch inconsistencies others miss

-You are a strong written communicator who can simplify complex information

-You have hands-on experience with order management, fulfillment, and customer service

-You understand Shopify apps, backend systems, and troubleshooting workflows

-You build systems, not just solutions

-You thrive in a fast-moving, high-growth environment

-You are comfortable working cross-functionally while maintaining ownership

-You believe in excellence over easy. You take initiative. You close loops. You care deeply about doing things the right way.



Benefits

Why You’ll Love Working Here

At Hadley Designs, your work directly impacts families around the world.



You are not just managing operations. You are helping create a seamless experience that allows parents to feel confident, supported, and proud of their choices.



You will enjoy:



-A remote-first environment that gives you flexibility and autonomy

-The ability to manage your schedule with trust and accountability

-Direct access to leadership and meaningful collaboration across teams

-Opportunities to build systems, implement ideas, and drive real impact

-Access to training, tools, and continuous learning

-A decade-strong, family-founded brand with a clear mission and vision

-Free access to products that are changing how children learn



Hadley Designs is a remote-first company built on trust, creativity, and autonomy. We’re a small but mighty team that believes in balancing excellence with flexibility.



Apply Today



Apply today and help us make learning fun, engaging, and screen-free for families everywhere.



To formally apply, apply here:

title: Marketing Assistant
description:
Marketing Specialist  (please include a resume link and portfolio if possible) 



Tech Guru – Part Time  



About the company 



Tech Guru is a technology and cybersecurity provider focused exclusively on accounting firms across the United States and Canada. We help firms with 1–80 employees modernize their technology, strengthen cybersecurity, and plan their long-term IT strategy. Our mission is to help accounting firms operate more securely, efficiently, and strategically through better technology. 



 



Role overview 



We are looking for a results-driven Marketing Specialist who will execute and grow Tech Guru's marketing presence. This role is squarely focused on marketing execution — crafting compelling content, building brand awareness, driving organic growth, and generating qualified leads for the sales pipeline. 



You will be responsible for the full marketing mix: content creation, SEO, social media,
 campaigns, and event marketing. AI and automation tools are used to support your work, but your marketing instincts, creativity, and attention to detail are what drive results. 



 



Key responsibilities 



Content creation & marketing writing 



Write and publish high-quality blog posts, articles, whitepapers, and case studies tailored to accounting firms 



Develop compelling website copy, landing pages, and campaign messaging that convert visitors into leads 



Create engaging social media content for LinkedIn and other relevant platforms with a consistent brand voice 



Produce
 newsletters, drip campaigns, and nurture sequences that educate and engage prospects 



Write scripts and supporting content for webinars, videos, and event presentations 



Design visual marketing assets including graphics, infographics, and one-pagers using tools like Canva 



Repurpose and adapt content across multiple formats and channels to maximize reach 



SEO & organic growth 



Execute a keyword strategy targeting accounting firms and cybersecurity topics 



Optimize existing and new content for search engine rankings 



Monitor organic traffic, rankings, and on-page performance using Google Search Console and Ahrefs 



Identify content gaps and high-value topic opportunities to grow inbound traffic 



Lead generation & campaign execution 



Build and manage lead generation campaigns from ideation through execution 



Create and optimize landing pages, forms, and lead magnets to capture and convert prospects 



Execute
 marketing campaigns including segmentation, A/B testing, and performance analysis 



Support automated nurture workflows that move leads through the funnel 



Social media & brand presence 



Manage Tech Guru's LinkedIn presence and other social media channels 



Maintain a consistent posting schedule with original content that demonstrates thought leadership 



Engage with the audience, respond to comments, and grow the follower base organically 



Monitor brand mentions and industry conversations to find engagement opportunities 



Event & webinar marketing 



Support promotional campaigns for conferences, webinars, and industry events 



Create all supporting marketing materials including
s, social posts, landing pages, and follow-up sequences 



Track event-driven lead generation and report on outcomes 



AI-assisted content & automation 



Use AI writing tools (Claude, ChatGPT) to accelerate content research, drafting, and ideation while maintaining brand quality and originality 



Build and maintain automated marketing workflows for content distribution, lead capture, and follow-up using tools like Zapier, Make, or n8n 



Develop prompt engineering practices to consistently generate on-brand content with AI tools 



Automate repetitive marketing tasks such as social scheduling,
 sequencing, and reporting to improve efficiency 



Identify opportunities to integrate AI tools into the content and campaign workflow to increase output and scalability 



Stay current with emerging AI marketing tools and recommend new additions to the tech stack 



Analytics & performance reporting 



Track and report on key marketing metrics including traffic, conversions,
 open rates, and lead volume 



Analyze campaign performance and translate data into actionable improvements 



Provide regular reporting on marketing ROI and progress toward goals 



 



Core skills 



Marketing copywriting 



Content strategy 



Blog & article writing 



 marketing 



SEO & keyword research 



LinkedIn & social media management 



Landing page creation 



Campaign execution 



Visual content creation (Canva) 



Marketing analytics & reporting 



Lead nurture workflows 



Brand voice & messaging

title: Creative Design Assistant and Digital Illustrator
description:
Urgent Hiring — Applications Reviewed on a Rolling Basis. The selection process may take up to 4 weeks, but early applicants are strongly encouraged.



Make Your Mark in Design, Lead Creativity, and Contribute to Our Vision.



Hadley Designs is seeking a Creative Design Assistant & Digital Illustrator to join our creative team and play a pivotal role in crafting high-quality, visually stunning designs that enhance our brand presence. If you are a creative powerhouse proficient in Adobe Illustrator with a keen eye for design, we want you to help bring our vision to life.



This is a hands-on, dynamic role ideal for a creative professional passionate about design and eager to make an impact on a fast-growing company. You’ll collaborate with leadership, work on high-priority assignments, and ensure the seamless execution of design projects that elevate Hadley Designs' brand.



About Hadley Designs

Hadley Designs is a family-founded, female-led brand committed to shaping brighter futures through creativity and purposeful design. We create screen-free learning tools that spark curiosity, build confidence, and transform everyday 
nts into meaningful growth. Each product is hand-drawn, crafted with input from teachers, parents, and child development experts, ensuring learning is joyful, engaging, and accessible.



Our mission is simple: to help families and educators unlock children’s potential with tools that inspire curiosity, strengthen connections, and support learning without screens. Trusted by over two million customers worldwide, we are passionate about designing experiences that make children feel supported, capable, and excited to learn.



If you’re looking for a company that designs with purpose and builds with heart, you’ll feel right at home here.



How You’ll Win at Hadley Designs



We believe in structured creativity. Success in this role means owning your projects and delivering high-quality designs that resonate with our customers while maintaining our visual standards. We’re looking for someone who thrives in a creative environment, is proactive, and possesses a strong attention to detail.



Every Design Assistant is expected to:



Learn the Playbook – Understand our design standards, expectations, and creative processes.

Apply the Playbook – Execute designs consistently, meeting project requirements and adhering to brand guidelines.

Enhance the Playbook – Suggest creative improvements and innovative design strategies after mastering the basic framework.

We value innovation grounded in proven execution and a clear understanding of design principles.



What You’ll Own



-Creation of high-quality, error-free design assets for advertising and marketing campaigns.

-Maintaining consistency in typography, color schemes, and layout across all platforms.

-Regular updates and design of storefront assets for Amazon, Shopify, and other platforms.

-Designing A+ Content templates and custom brand image ads.

-Handling urgent design needs for product launches and special projects.

-Working closely with leadership to ensure deadlines are met and projects are delivered on time.



What Success Looks Like

Within your first 90 days, you will:



-Learn and execute Hadley Designs’ design standards with precision.

-Contribute fresh design ideas that align with the brand and improve our current processes.

-Deliver high-quality artwork that meets or exceeds expectations and is on-brand.

-Support Becca and leadership with urgent creative tasks and maintain consistency in all design work.



Apply Now, Lead Creativity, and Shape Our Future.



Requirements

Who You Are:



-2+ years of professional experience in graphic design or related fields, with a strong portfolio.

-Proficient in Adobe Illustrator and Photoshop, with a strong grasp of CMYK color management and print-ready file preparation.

-Excellent attention to detail and ability to produce high-quality visuals with minimal revisions.

-Strong organizational skills with the ability to manage multiple tasks and meet deadlines.

-Comfortable receiving and implementing feedback while maintaining a high standard of work.

-Creative, collaborative, and self-driven, motivated by quality and continuous improvement.



Benefits

Why You’ll Thrive Here:



-Join a creative, high-growth company with an established 10+ year track record.

-Own significant projects and make an impact from day one.

-Flexibility to work remotely with a flexible schedule.

-Opportunities for personal development and direct interaction with the Chief Creative Officer.

-A culture of collaboration, trust, and innovation, where your contributions are valued.



Apply Now

If you're a passionate graphic designer who thrives in a dynamic and creative environment, we'd love to hear from you. Apply today to join Hadley Designs and help shape the future of our brand!



P.S. If you don’t hear from us within four weeks of your application, please consider that as our decision to move forward with other candidates, but we truly appreciate your interest in Hadley Designs.



To formally apply : apply here

title: Ecommerce Growth Strategist
description:
Urgent Hiring — Applications are reviewed on a rolling basis. The selection process may take up to 4 weeks, but early applicants are strongly encouraged.

Ready to Lead and Scale Our E-Commerce Operations?



At Hadley Designs, we believe learning should be enjoyable, engaging, and screen-free. Millions of parents and educators trust our beautifully designed, developmentally aligned educational tools to help children grow and thrive. As a fast-growing, family-founded brand, we are on a mission to make learning meaningful for families around the world.



We are looking for an Ecommerce Growth Strategist to join our team and help scale our online sales. If you are a results-driven operator with a passion for building scalable e-commerce systems, optimizing performance, and driving growth through data-backed strategies, this is a unique opportunity to make an impact.



About Hadley Designs

Hadley Designs is redefining early education with creativity, heart, and purpose. Every product we create is hand-drawn and teacher-designed, crafted with care to build confidence and connection. Our screen-free tools empower families and teachers to make learning fun and meaningful, nurturing curiosity and creativity in children.



Our Mission

We design screen-free products that parents trust to help their children grow, learn, and reach their full potential. Our beautifully crafted, developmentally sound tools replace distractions with connection, curiosity, and real learning.



Our Vision

We aim to build the most trusted children’s brand in the world, present in millions of homes, reshaping how families learn, connect, and grow. Our products will be so widely used and passed down that generations of children will grow up learning from them and choose them again for their own families.



Role Overview

As the Ecommerce Growth Strategist, you will own the full P&L of Hadley Designs’ e-commerce operations, with a focus on growing our Amazon business and expanding our multi-channel online presence. You will be responsible for driving revenue growth, optimizing product positioning, managing pricing, and leading promotional strategies across multiple online platforms. This is a high-impact role where your strategic and operational expertise will be critical to scaling the business and ensuring the long-term success of our e-commerce channels.



Key Responsibilities



-End-to-End E-Commerce Ownership: Manage all aspects of the e-commerce business, including revenue growth, margin optimization, pricing, advertising, and inventory management.

-Performance Optimization: Continuously optimize product listings, content, pricing strategies, and promotional plans to maximize conversion rates, sales, and profitability.

-New Product and Category Growth: Identify new product opportunities and market expansion avenues, and collaborate with internal teams to bring them to market successfully.

-Inventory and Demand Planning: Develop and execute plans to manage product demand, inventory levels, and risk mitigation, ensuring smooth and cost-effective operations.

-Cross-Functional Collaboration: Work closely with Product Operations, Supply Chain, and Design teams to ensure product availability and accurate messaging across channels.

-Data-Driven Strategy: Use data to guide decision-making, refine strategies, and improve key performance metrics across e-commerce platforms.



How Success is Measured



-Strong growth in online sales and profitability across multiple platforms, especially Amazon.

-Clear and predictable performance improvements through optimized strategies in pricing, promotions, and product listings.

-Consistent execution of marketing and sales strategies to expand market share.

-Efficient inventory management that balances growth with cost control.

-Cross-functional alignment that contributes to operational efficiency and scalability.



Requirements

Who You Are



You are a growth-oriented, highly analytical e-commerce operator who thrives on taking ownership and driving measurable outcomes. You have experience working with e-commerce platforms like Amazon and are excited to scale a high-growth business within a collaborative and performance-driven environment.



You Have:



-5+ years of experience managing e-commerce operations, preferably with Amazon Seller Central or similar platforms.

-A proven track record of growing revenue, improving profitability, and optimizing sales across e-commerce platforms.

-Strong analytical skills and the ability to use data to make decisions and improve performance.

-Experience in managing product positioning, pricing strategies, and marketing campaigns.

-A collaborative, results-driven mindset and a passion for continuous improvement.

-Ability to manage both strategic and tactical elements of e-commerce operations.



Benefits

Why You’ll Love Working Here



Impact: Your work will directly influence how families experience learning through the Hadley Designs brand.

Culture: Join a passionate, mission-driven team that values trust, creativity, and collaboration.

Flexibility: Enjoy the freedom of a remote-first role with flexible working hours.



Benefits:



-Remote-first work environment

-Paid time off and holidays

-Access to learning resources and professional development

-Free access to Hadley Designs products

-Regular interaction with leadership, including the CEO and CMO

-Stability from a decade as a family-founded, mission-driven brand



Apply Today



If you’re ready to help shape the future of learning in a growing company, we’d love to hear from you. Apply now to join the Hadley Designs team as our Ecommerce Growth Lead, Amazon and help us create a lasting impact on families, educators, and children worldwide.



To formally apply, apply here:

title: E-commerce Assistant Store Manager
description:
We operate three profitable E-commerce stores and are currently launching our fourth. As we continue to scale, we’re looking for a highly experienced E-commerce Assistant Store Manager to handle day-to-day operations, support customers across multiple channels, and help keep our systems running smoothly.



This is a senior-level role with long-term potential for the right candidate. Please read the full job description and answer all questions for your application to be considered.



IMPORTANT: Please read the entire job description and follow the application instructions carefully to be considered.



Responsibilities

• Manage customer inquiries via phone,
, and chat with professionalism and accuracy.

• Handle RFQs, returns/exchanges, complaints, disputes, and negative reviews.

• Collect and maintain positive customer reviews and overall satisfaction.

• Support sales-related tasks and assist in improving store performance.

• Collaborate with the CS, Orders, and Product teams to share insights and ensure a consistent customer experience.

• Identify process gaps, recommend improvements, and contribute to SOP updates.

• Perform daily administrative tasks, including EOS reports and operational updates.

• Proactively manage assigned tasks without waiting for instructions.



What You Need to Succeed -



Required Experience:

• 2+ years in E-commerce operations (customer service + order management + product management).

• Proven Shopify experience (listings, inventory, bulk updates, app usage).

• Strong phone communication skills and ability to handle challenging conversations calmly.

• Ability to manage multiple priorities in a fast-paced environment.

• Strong attention to detail (include the word mushroom in your application).



Technical Requirements:

• Proficiency in Shopify, ClickUp, Airtable, CRM tools, and Google Workspace.

• Reliable computer + 20 Mbps+ internet.

• Backup solutions for both power and internet outages.



Work Style:

• Self-directed - you take initiative and solve problems independently.

• Detail-oriented with a focus on accuracy.

• Customer-focused - complaints are opportunities to improve systems.

• Process-minded - you document and refine workflows naturally.



Work Schedule:

• Full-time, 40 hours/week

• US business hours: 9 PM–6 AM or 10 PM–7 AM PHT

• 1-hour break

• Five days per week



You're NOT a Fit If:

• You need micromanagement or detailed daily task lists

• You can't work 9 PM–7 AM PHT consistently

• You experience frequent power/internet outages without backup solutions

• You view this as temporary income between other opportunities



Before You Apply - Please Confirm:

• Weekly payments for the first 4 weeks (starting from week 3), then bi-monthly every other Tuesday.

• Full-time role, US hours.

• Must be open to a two-month trial period.

• Daily End of Shift (EOS) report answering:

a) What did you do today? (detailed description)

b) What issues did you run into?

c) Anything you need help with?

If you agree to all terms, write “I AGREE TO ALL TERMS” and answer the questions below.



Application Instructions (Follow Exactly) -



Subject Line:

[Your First Name] – I Am Your New E-commerce Assistant Store Manager

Example: Kevin – I Am Your New E-commerce Assistant Store Manager



Submit:

• Cover letter (focused on relevant e-commerce experience)

• Resume



Answer These Questions (Complete Sentences Required):

1. Describe your most relevant e-commerce operations experience (platforms used, team size, order volume, responsibilities).

2. What specific Shopify tasks have you performed?

3. What are your current work commitments and availability?

4. Provide your internet speed (include screenshot), computer specifications, and backup solutions for power & internet issues.

5. Provide one example of a difficult customer situation you handled and how you resolved it.

6. Why are you interested in this specific role instead of other VA positions?



Important: AI-generated or template responses will be immediately disqualified. We're looking for thoughtful, specific answers that demonstrate you read and understood this posting.

title: SMM Service Operations Specialist  (Remote, Full-Time)
description:
SMM Service Operations & Support Specialist (Remote, Full-Time)



Company: 
 — International social media marketing platform

Pay: PHP 20,000/month (approximately 350 USD) + up to PHP 5,000/month performance bonus

Schedule: Full-time, fully flexible — no fixed 8-hour shift. As long as services are healthy and tickets are monitored throughout the day, you manage your own time.

Location: Remote 





ABOUT FLOWFAME



FlowFame (
) is a growing SMM store selling Instagram, TikTok, YouTube,
, Snapchat, Spotify, and other social media services to international customers.



Our store is connected to a panel (
) which pulls services from multiple wholesale providers. You can visit 
 and create a free account to browse the services — these are the same services our customers buy on 
. Your job is to keep these services running smoothly on our store and handle customer issues when they come up.





WHAT YOU WILL DO



Service Operations :

- Monitor service health daily — check completion rates, spot stuck or failing services, and take action

- Find and test replacement services on provider panels when current ones break or underperform

- Import new services into our connected panel, update the service registry on 
.

- Open refill and support tickets with providers when services underdeliver

- Communicate with providers via their ticket systems and
 groups

- Compare rates, refill policies, speed, and max quantities across providers to find the best options

- Proactively look for better or cheaper services — not just fix what breaks



Customer Support ( 10% of your time):

- Handle customer tickets from WhatsApp,
, and website live chat, All channels feed into one dashboard on 
 — you reply from there and messages go back to the customer on their channel

- Most tickets are simple: check the live order status, reprocess if stuck, or send a canned response

- Messages are auto-translated between English and Arabic — you work in English

- Typical issues: order not started, slow delivery, results dropped, general questions

- One-click reprocess, one-click refund, one-click close with auto-notification





WHO WE ARE LOOKING FOR



- Someone who has worked with SMM panels before — you know what services, providers, rates per 1K, refill, min/max, and order statuses mean

- You can navigate provider panels, find services, compare options, and make decisions without being told exactly what to do

- You understand that services break, providers change things, and platforms (Instagram, TikTok, etc.) affect delivery — and you know how to respond

- Reliable, checks in multiple times throughout the day, and communicates clearly in English

- Laptop/PC with stable internet and Chrome







WHAT WE PROVIDE



- Full training on our specific systems (custom dashboard, service registry, panel admin)

- Custom-built support dashboard that handles translations, order status, reprocessing, and notifications automatically

- Direct communication with the founder — small team, fast decisions

- Performance bonus up to PHP 5,000/month based on service health and ticket resolution

- Long-term role with growth as the company scales

- Truly flexible schedule — we care about results, not hours logged





A TYPICAL DAY



There is no fixed shift. You check in multiple times throughout the day at times that work for you.



First check-in — Look at service health. Any services stuck or failing? If yes, start working on replacements.

Throughout the day — Monitor incoming tickets. Most take under a minute to handle. Check back every few hours.

When a service breaks — Find a replacement on provider panels, test it, import it, swap it in. This is the real work.

Follow-ups — Check on pending provider refill requests. Browse for better-rate services when things are quiet.



On quiet days (services running well), the work is light — just monitoring and handling a few tickets. On busy days (a provider breaks something), you will spend more time finding and switching services. The better you are at operations, the more quiet days you get.





HOW TO APPLY



Have you ever used an SMM panel or web admin dashboard for work? Describe briefly what you did with it.



You can also visit 
 to explore the services we sell on 
. It will give you a sense of the type of work involved.





We are a small, growing team looking for someone who already understands this industry and wants to grow with a startup. If you know SMM panels and want a stable long-term role with real flexibility, we would love to hear from you.

title: Creative Video Editor for DTC Footwear Brand (Long-term Position)
description:
About Balance Walk



Balance Walk is a French DTC comfort footwear brand launching in Europe. We sell therapeutic comfort shoes for people suffering from foot pain, plantar fasciitis, and long hours standing. We are in the pre-launch phase and building our creative content foundation.



What You'll Do



You will be our dedicated creative video editor, producing content that drives our marketing across multiple channels:



- Edit short-form video ads for Meta 
/Instagram) and TikTok

- Create product demonstration videos using our photography

- Produce UGC-style content from raw footage

- Design animated GIFs and motion graphics for product pages

- Edit testimonial videos and before/after content

- Create engaging hooks in the first 3 seconds of every video

- Work with AI tools (Kling, Runway, Midjourney) when needed

- Maintain brand consistency across all creative output



What We're Looking For



We need someone with real DTC or e-commerce experience who understands what makes ads convert — not just pretty edits. You should:



- Have 2+ years of video editing experience (please show portfolio)

- Know how to edit for social media (hooks, pacing, captions)

- Be fluent in CapCut, Adobe Premiere, or After Effects

- Understand how ads work on Meta and TikTok

- Have attention to brand consistency (colors, fonts, logo placement)

- Speak English fluently (we communicate in English)

- Be able to work independently and meet deadlines

- Be available 40 hours per week. Weekend off



Bonus Points



- Experience with DTC brands, especially footwear, health, or wellness

- Experience with AI tools (Kling, Midjourney, Runway)

- Motion graphics skills

- Experience creating UGC-style content



What We Offer



- Long-term, stable position (we're looking for someone to grow with us)

- Fixed monthly salary — paid on time, every month

- 32 hours per week (flexible schedule you arrange)

- We cover software subscriptions you need (Adobe, CapCut Pro, etc.)

- Direct communication with the founder (no bureaucracy)

- Opportunity to own the creative direction as we scale

- Performance reviews with salary increases as the brand grows



Application Requirements



Please include in your application:



1. Link to your portfolio or 3-5 sample video edits

2. Brief note about what DTC brands you've worked with

3. Your availability and preferred start date

4. Answer this question: "What makes a Meta ad stop a scroll in the first 3 seconds?"



Applications without portfolio links will not be reviewed.



We read every application carefully. We're looking for someone who wants to grow with us long-term — not freelancers looking for quick projects.

title: Interior Designer / Architect (Intermediate to Senior)
description:
Apply Directly to the Link: 



We are seeking an intermediate to senior-level Interior Designer or Architect who can effectively translate conceptual design into design development and construction documentation while maintaining design integrity throughout all project phases. The ideal candidate is skilled in space planning, FF&E, and capable of producing detailed millwork and architectural drawings, with strong proficiency in CAD. This role requires someone who can follow direction accurately while also taking the initiative to lead the drawing and documentation aspects of a project when appropriate.



Key Responsibilities



Translate conceptual designs into detailed design development packages and construction documentation.

Maintain design integrity and intent through all project phases, from concept through construction administration.

Develop space plans that balance functional requirements, aesthetic goals, and technical constraints.

Produce detailed millwork drawings, including plans, elevations, sections, and construction details.

Create accurate architectural drawings and complete construction document sets in CAD.

Manage FF&E selection, specification, and documentation, ensuring alignment with design intent, budget, and project schedule.

Prepare and maintain FF&E schedules, spec sheets, and procurement documentation.

Coordinate with project leads, consultants, vendors, and other tea
mbers to resolve design and technical questions.

Review drawings for completeness, accuracy, and compliance with applicable codes and standards.

Take ownership of the drawing and documentation process on assigned projects, leading coordination when appropriate.

Follow project direction accurately and communicate proactively on progress, blockers, and design decisions.

Incorporate feedback from senior designers, clients, and project stakeholders into iterative drawing updates.

Qualifications



Bachelor's degree in Interior Design, Architecture, or a related field.

Intermediate to senior-level experience (typically 5+ years) in interior design or architecture, with a portfolio demonstrating design development and construction documentation work.

Demonstrated FF&E experience, ideally on projects in the hospitality, boutique commercial, or high-end residential space — comparable to the caliber of work produced by design-forward creative studios.

Strong space planning skills across a range of project types.

Demonstrated ability to produce detailed millwork and architectural drawings.

Proficiency in CAD required (AutoCAD); experience with Revit, SketchUp, or similar software is a plus.

Solid understanding of construction methods, materials, and detailing standards.

Familiarity with FF&E sourcing, vendor coordination, and specification documentation.

Proven ability to maintain design integrity from concept through construction.

Strong attention to detail and the ability to manage multiple drawing sets concurrently.

Able to follow direction accurately while taking initiative to lead drawing and documentation efforts when appropriate.

Clear written and verbal communication skills for remote collaboration.

title: Graphic Designer/
description:
About the Company

Keystone Click is a research-first digital marketing agency that helps businesses grow through smart strategy, clear messaging, and intentional execution. We partner with clients across industries like construction, manufacturing, and professional services to create marketing that is thoughtful, effective, and aligned with real business goals.



At Keystone Click, we value education, integrity, creativity, trust, and advocacy. We believe strong design plays an important role in helping brands communicate clearly and stand out in a crowded digital space.



Position Overview

We are seeking a Part-Time Graphic Designer to support a variety of creative needs across the agency. This role includes designing social media graphics, branded marketing assets, presentations, downloadable resources, digital ad graphics, and other visual materials as needed.



This is not just a social media design role. We are looking for someone who can support graphic design needs in general and create polished, on-brand visuals that align with each client’s goals and identity.



This position is expected to work Monday through Friday from 8:00 AM to 12:00 PM CST.



Key Responsibilities

- Design graphics for social media posts and content campaigns, including short-form video

- Create visual assets for blogs,
 marketing, digital ads, and websites

- Design client-facing materials such as presentations, PDFs, one-pagers, and branded collateral

- Design logos for a variety of clients

- Support Keystone Click’s internal marketing and promotional design needs

- Maintain brand consistency across multiple client accounts

- Translate written content and marketing strategy into strong visual concepts

- Edit, resize, and repurpose existing graphics as needed

- Organize design files and assets in a clean and efficient way

- Collaborate with tea
mbers to meet project goals and deadlines

- Manage assigned work within the designated part-time schedule



Qualified Applicants

- Experience in graphic design for digital marketing and branded materials

- A strong portfolio that shows a range of design work

- Proficiency in Canva and Adobe Creative Suite

- A strong understanding of typography, layout, branding, and visual hierarchy

- The ability to adapt design style across different brands and industries

- Strong attention to detail and time management skills

- The ability to take feedback well and apply revisions accurately

- A reliable work style and strong communication skills

- Availability to work 8:00 AM to 12:00 PM CST



Preferred, but not required:

- Agency experience

- Familiarity with social media design best practices

- Experience creating presentations, downloadable guides, or ad creative



How To Apply

Please send your resume, and portfolio, or any relevant experience to 
 your cover letter, please include:

- Why you’re interested in working with Keystone Click

- Your experience with both social media and general graphic design

- The design tools you use most often

- Confirmation that you are available to work 8:00 AM to 12:00 PM CST

title: Part-Time Graphic Designer & Email Marketing Designer
description:
About the Job

We are a small but growing wellness brand based in Australia. We are looking for a talented and dependable designer to join our team and work from home. This is a part-time role with flexible hours. There is also a chance to grow with us as the brand gets bigger.

You will be working across two brands, so there will be plenty of work at the start. You will work directly with the founder. We will give you clear instructions, brand guidelines, and feedback to help you do your best work.

What You Will Be Doing



Design static image ads for
 and Instagram in different sizes (square, portrait, and stories format)

Create graphics and banners for
 marketing campaigns

Design social media content such as carousel posts, single image posts, and story graphics for Instagram and

Take existing designs and resize or reformat them for different placements

Edit and retouch product photos when needed

Create simple graphics for website pages and banners when needed



Skills and Requirements



Confident using Canva, Figma, Adobe Photoshop, or Adobe Illustrator (Canva is the minimum, Adobe is preferred)

Good eye for layout, fonts, and colours

Experience designing for social media or paid ads before

Knows how to work with
 marketing graphic formats (for platforms like Klaviyo or Omnisend)

Able to read and follow a brand guide to keep designs looking consistent

Can work with minimal supervision once you understand the brand style

Communicates clearly and honestly in English

Replies on time and meets deadlines without needing to be reminded

Must share a portfolio or examples of past design work when applying



Hours and Pay



Pay rate is USD $5 per hour but is negotiable based on experience. 

Hours will change week to week depending on how much work there is

For the first two weeks, expect around 10 to 30 hours per week because we have a backlog of work to finish across two active brands

After the first two weeks, the hours will become lighter and more regular



How to Apply

We want to make sure this is a good fit for both of us. Shortlisted applicants will be asked to complete a small paid trial task before we begin working together on an ongoing basis. This means you will be paid for the trial work no matter what.

To apply, please send us the following:



Your portfolio or at least three examples of your past design work

A short note telling us about your experience and what kind of design work you enjoy

Your current availability and how many hours per week you can work



We look forward to hearing from you.

title: Demand Planning Analyst
description:
unybrands was established in 2020 by a group of partners united by a shared vision: to build the leading next-generation e-commerce platform for micro-brands. Headquartered in Miami, the company has a global presence with teams in Berlin, London, New York, and China.



unybrands acquires e-commerce businesses that sell both on and off Amazon. Once acquired, these brands are integrated into unybrands' platform, where operations are optimized, business performance is enhanced, and expansion into new product lines and markets is driven. Currently we have acquired 30 brands including Pet Care, Personal Care, Home Care, Supplements, Baby & Juvenile, Garden & Outdoor, Sports & Fitness, and Home, Lifestyle Culinary & Arts. Through expert management and robust infrastructure, unybrands empowers e-commerce brands to scale and thrive.



We are seeking a meticulous and highly organized Demand Planning Analyst to join our team. The successful candidate will play a critical role in supporting our demand planning processes, generating insightful reports, and ensuring smooth operational execution. This role involves working closely with various BI tools, Excel, and other software to produce accurate data analysis and presentations for both executive and operational audiences. 



*** please
 your resume: 





Key Responsibilities: 



- Drive demand insights by supporting weekly demand reviews — generating out-of-stock reports, identifying demand outliers, and analyzing forecast accuracy to enable smarter decisions 



- Generate Sales & Operations Planning (S&OP) reporting packages, preparing and presenting performance KPIs to different Stakeholders. 



- Create comprehensive S&OP decks using BI tools and PowerPoint, integrating various data visualizations. 



- Collaborate and influence during weekly and monthly operations and business meetings, updating action items and ensuring ongoing process improvements. 



-Review inventory management reports, Purchase Order pipeline, inventory health and excess inventory levels. 



 



Overall Tasks: 



- Thrive in a fast-paced environment, demonstrating flexibility, adaptability, and strong prioritization skills across multiple projects and stakeholders 



- Collect and consolidate data from various portals and store them in designated folders. 



- Prepare detailed decks for executive reviews and operational alignment meetings. 



- Periodically refresh data pipelines in Excel to ensure up-to-date information. 



- Navigate BI systems (Tableau, Power BI, Looker...) to extract and snapshot key outcomes. 



- Manage demand spike alerts and coordinate with internal stakeholders for prompt resolution. 



- Track and update action items from operations planning meetings. 



 



Qualifications: 



- Bachelor's degree in Industrial Engineering, Supply Chain Management, Business Administration, Data Analytics, or related fields 



- Proven experience in supply and demand planning or a similar analytical role 



- Advanced Excel skills and BI, data visualization tools. Knowledge of SQL and ODBC connections, as well as Big Query experience, is a plus 



- Excellent communication skills, both written and verbal 



- Ability to manage multiple tasks and meet deadlines in a fast-paced environment 



-Eagerness to get hands-on with real world data- cleaning, structuring and transforming into useful information, ready to be used by Stakeholders 



-Proven ability to work independently from end to end as part of a team. 



unybrands is an equal opportunity employer and considers all applicants for employment without any regard to race, skin color, religion, gender identity, sexual orientation, and age. Nor are applicants discriminated against based on disability or protected classes.?

title: Supply Chain Analyst
description:
unybrands was founded in 2020 by a group of partners who shared a common vision to create the leading next-generation e-commerce platform for micro-brands. The company operates globally, with our headquarters located in Miami and additional teams based in Berlin, London, New York, Seattle and Shanghai.  



unybrands acquires e-commerce brands that operate on and off Amazon. unybrands integrates the brands into its platform, optimizes the business operations and economics, and expands to new product lines and geographies. With us, e-commerce brands reach new heights with expert operators and infrastructure.  



The Supply Chain Analyst will be supporting the leading the team that manages distribution supply chain across multiple micro-brands. They will work closely with micro-brand business teams, procurement team and senior management to spearhead inventory flows across a tiered supply chain.



PLEASE
 YOUR RESUME TO





Key Responsibilities:



1. Purchase Order Management

    Create and manage Purchase Orders (POs) in coordination with procurement and inventory planning teams.

    Monitor POs for accuracy, delivery timelines, and adherence to committed required dates (CRDs).

2. Inbound Shipment and Delivery Oversight

   Create and manage inbound shipments aligned with POs.

   Monitor 3PL partners and coordinate inbound deliveries to ensure timely and accurate receipt of goods.

   Track delivery performance and escalate any discrepancies.

3. Supplier Coordination and Communication

   Serve as the primary point of contact for suppliers regarding PO updates, delays, or escalations.

   Proactively follow up with suppliers for expedited orders or production status updates.

   Address and resolve supply-related issues in collaboration with internal teams.

4. Quality and Inspection Support

   Coordinate quality inspections upon delivery or prior to acceptance of goods.

   Report and assist in the resolution of any quality discrepancies found during inspections.

5. Performance Monitoring and Reporting

   Generate supply chain performance reports including PO status, supplier lead times, and inbound delivery metrics.

   Provide insights and recommendations for improving supply chain efficiency.





A successful tea
mber will have:  



1+ years of relevant experience working in a data-driven role, Supply Chain exposure is a plus

3+ months in the digital commerce ecosystem is a plus

Advance proficiency in Excel (including VBA, Pivot Tables, array functions, Power Pivots, etc.)

Problem solving skills, project management skills, attention to detail and exceptional organizational skills

Excellent business judgement and strong written and oral communication skills

Ability to thrive in a high energy/pace environment where tactical and strategic activities are expected to be driven in parallel

Bachelor's degree in Business Administration, Mathematics/Statistics, Industrial Engineering, Information Systems Management, or related field

title: Growth Marketing Manager (Remote)
description:
About Us



7 years in business. 3x net profit growth in 2025. Bootstrapped, profitable, zero debt. We sell premium security cameras (~$500) across North America and we're launching multiple new products this year. We need someone to own the daily execution of our marketing engine. We already have the strategy, the positioning, and the team. What we need is the person who runs the revenue engine every day — someone who lives inside Google Ads, Meta Ads, and Klaviyo and turns good strategy into measurable growth. You work under our Head of Growth & Marketing who owns messaging, positioning, and creative direction. She d
 what we say. You d
 where we say it, how much we spend, and whether it's working.



You are responsible for translating strategy into execution and closing the loop between performance data and daily actions. You are not defining positioning or creative direction, but you are expected to understand it deeply and apply it correctly across all channels.



What you'll own



Paid acquisition — daily, hands-on management of 5-figure monthly ad spend across Google and Meta. You're in the accounts every week adjusting bids, launching creatives, killing losers, scaling winners. This is not a "set direction and delegate" role — you are the executor. You'll work closely with the Head of Growth to ensure creative is executed and tested correctly across campaigns. Provide clear feedback on what is performing and why, based on data.

 and retention in Klaviyo — build and optimize all flows (welcome, abandoned cart, post-purchase, win-back). Run campaigns. This is a major priority from day one. Continuously optimize flows based on performance data and customer behavior, improving conversion, repeat purchase rate, and revenue per user.

SEO — work alongside our copywriter to improve organic rankings, product page indexing, blog content strategy, and schema implementation. Ensure content aligns with product positioning and high-intent search behavior, and track impact on traffic quality and conversion.

Attribution and analytics — maintain a clear view of performance across channels, identifying gaps between platform-reported and actual results. Gaps need to be visible. Provide weekly insights that directly report budget allocation and showcase optimization suggestions.

CRO and testing — work with our designer to test headlines, CTAs, trust signals, BNPL messaging. Monitor Hotjar. Identify friction. Fix it. Prioritize tests based on impact and speed, and ensure learnings are documented and applied across channels.

Post-purchase revenue — configure upsells, manage the referral program, coordinate review generation with our Head of CX. Track impact on LTV and repeat purchase behavior, and continuously improve post-purchase experience to support retention and referrals.

Affiliate program — maintain commission tiers, audit for coupon leakage, track affiliate-driven revenue. Evaluate performance based on incremental revenue and maintain control over discounting and margin impact.

Automation — identify and implement workflow automations that save the team time across marketing operations. Focus on reducing manual work and increasing execution speed across the marketing workflow.

Weekly marketing report — delivered every Monday. Revenue, MER, attribution gap, CAC by country, conversion rate,
 share, creative status, flags. No misses. Reports must be actionable, with clear recommendations FROM YOU TO THE HEAD OF GROWTH on what to scale, reduce, or test next.

Execution speed and iteration — operate with high velocity. Launch, test, and iterate continuously across channels. Weekly improvements are expected, and speed of execution is a key part of the role.

System awareness — Understand how each channel contributes to the full funnel and optimize based on business performance, not isolated channel metrics. Ensure execution across paid, retention, SEO, and CRO is aligned.

Team coordination — direct to Head of Growth

Who we're looking for



You've personally managed Google Ads AND Meta Ads for DTC/ecommerce at $30K+/month combined

You've built Klaviyo flows yourself. Not directed someone. You can open Klaviyo right now and build a conditional abandoned cart sequence

Physical product experience at $200+ AOV. Selling a $500 camera to a skeptical 55-year-old rancher is a different game than supplements or SaaS

Specific communicator. Your reports say "shift $150/day from Campaign X (1.8x) to Campaign Y (4.2x)" — not "optimize the account"

You push back when you disagree. We'd rather debate and get it right than defer and get it wrong

You understand that creative is a key driver of performance and can identify what is working based on data, even if you are not the one defining the creative direction

You are comfortable operating within a structured system where strategy and direction are defined, and your role is to execute, optimize, and improve performance within that framework

Not the right fit if



You call yourself a strategist who delegates execution. This role IS execution

You focus JUST on channel metrics without connecting them to business performance

Your experience is Meta-only with no real Google depth. Google is 72% of our spend

You've never questioned whether ad platform data is accurate

You expect full ownership of strategy, positioning, or creative direction. Your inputs will lead decisions, but it's not a decision fully owned by your scope of work

Your background is all low-AOV products under $100

How we work



Fully remote, flexible schedule with team overlap hours

You report to our Head of Growth & Marketing. She sets direction, you execute and provide strategic input

Daily marketing sync with Head of Growth & Marketing and weekly with CEO

Hubstaff for time tracking and transparency — everyone uses it, no exceptions

Fast decisions. You flag it, we discuss, we move



How to Apply

We do not accept applications through OnlineJobs.ph messaging. To be considered, please complete our application form here:
