title: Animator/Motion/Editor/Design
description:
Summary

We're looking for a motion animator to work with Scale Ads Agency on short-form video content, product demos, and animated ad creatives for DTC brands.

This is a startup opportunity. We are growing fast and as our volume grows, so does your workload and earning potential. If you're talented, reliable, and hungry, this can turn into a serious ongoing stream of work very quickly.

?? PRICE IS NOT LISTED INTENTIONALLY. WE WILL DISCUSS YOUR RATE ON A CALL BASED ON YOUR SKILL LEVEL AND EXPERIENCE. DO NOT LET PRICE STOP YOU FROM APPLYING.

???? What You'll Be Working On



Short-form motion animated videos for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and paid ads

Smooth product demo animations that make the product feel premium

Seamless scene transitions with clean timing and intentional pacing

AI-assisted animation and motion work using modern tools

Content that feels polished, sleek, and platform-native



The style we are going for is best described as: clean, cinematic, smooth. Think fluid UI reveals, soft motion graphics, and product demos that feel like they belong in a high-end tech ad. Reference: Base44's ad style on YouTube.

???? Who You Are

This matters just as much as your portfolio.



You are proactive. You don't wait to be told what to do next, you think ahead and move

You are enthusiastic about motion and animation. This is your craft, not just a gig

You can think independently. When you hit a problem, you find a solution before asking for help

You take genuine pride in your output. You don't submit work you wouldn't be proud of

You are comfortable experimenting with new AI animation tools and actively stay up to date with what's emerging

You are a go-getter who sees a growing agency as an opportunity, not just a paycheck

You understand that starting lean with a startup means big upside as the operation scales

You have strong English communication skills. Written and spoken. We brainstorm together, we give feedback, we execute fast, and none of that works without clear communication. This is non-negotiable.



????? What We Need You To Be Skilled In



Motion animation for short-form video content

Smooth, seamless transitions that don't feel jarring or cheap

Product demo animations that highlight features visually and cleanly

Familiarity and comfort with AI video and animation tools (CapCut AI, Runway, Kling, Higgsfield, or similar)

Strong sense of timing, pacing, and visual flow

Ability to match a reference style quickly without needing constant direction



? This Role Is NOT For You If



You only know basic editing with no real animation experience

You are not keeping up with AI tools in the motion space

You need hand-holding on every project

You treat deadlines as suggestions

You are looking for a one-off job with no interest in growing



???? The Opportunity

We are a growing performance marketing agency and we are building out our creative production arm. Right now the volume is starting up, but it adds up fast. Animators who deliver quality work consistently will have more videos coming their way than they can handle.

We are a startup. We are honest about that. But startups that grow take their best people with them, and that is exactly what we intend to do.

???? How to Apply

Please include:



2 to 4 examples of your motion animation or product demo work

A note on which AI tools you are currently using or comfortable with

Your general availability per week



Shortlisted applicants will be invited to a short call to discuss fit, style, and rate.

title: Senior Sales Rep and Appointment Setter ($1,300/ month)
description:
Sales Rep and Appointment Setter

(B2B Outbound and Lead Generation Specialist)





Who we are



We are a fast growing performance marketing agency working with serious clients who spend substantial amount  per month on lead generation. We are expanding and need someone sharp, resourceful, and self driven to help us connect with the right prospects at scale.



You will report directly to the Operations Manager and Founders. There are no layers between you and the people making decisions.





What this role is about



This is a pure outbound role. Your job is to find the right people, open conversations, and book qualified calls for the team. We will give you the target industries and ideal client profiles. From there, you own the process  building lists, writing outreach, following up, and filling the calendar.



If you need daily task lists, step by step instructions, or someone to tell you who to contact, this role is not right for you. If you thrive working independently, take ownership of your pipeline, and know how to write a message that actually gets a reply, keep reading.





Core responsibilities



>Build targeted prospect lists using LinkedIn Sales Navigator, Google Search, and other research tools

>Send daily LinkedIn connection requests and follow up messages to qualified prospects

>Write and send personalized cold
s to high value leads

>Maintain clean, organized, and up to date prospect lists inside the CRM

>Follow up consistently across all active leads until there is a clear outcome

>Book discovery calls and coordinate scheduling for the founders

>Log all outreach activity accurately in ClickUp and the CRM daily

>Communicate updates, blockers, and wins clearly through Slack every day





Requirements



>Proven experience with LinkedIn Sales Navigator for identifying and reaching high value B2B leads

>Strong written English with the ability to write outreach messages that feel personal, not templated

>Experience with cold
 outreach including writing, sequencing, and follow up

>Comfortable working inside a CRM to manage and track your full pipeline

>Highly organized and able to manage a large number of active prospects simultaneously

>Takes initiative and works independently without needing to be chased

>Available full time during BST business hours





Bonus experience



>Background in B2B, SaaS, lead generation, or performance marketing industries

>Experience booking calls for a high ticket or agency offer

>Familiarity with outreach tools such as Apollo, Instantly, or Smartlead



Logic question  (Required)



You have been given a target industry: digital marketing agencies in the UK with 10 to 50 employees that are actively running paid ads for clients. You have LinkedIn Sales Navigator, Google Search, and Google Workspace available. You have no existing data and your first task is to book 5 discovery calls within 7 days.



Walk us through exactly what you would do from day one. How do you build your list, who do you target, what does your outreach message look like, and how do you follow up? Be specific.



We are not looking for a perfect answer. We want to see how you think, how you plan, and whether you can execute independently without being told every step.





Video introduction (Required)



Record a 2 to 3 minute video and upload to Loom or Google Drive. Include the link in your application. Cover who you are, your experience in outbound sales or appointment setting, a specific result you are proud of with real numbers, and why this role is the right fit for you right now.



***Read carefully before applying***



To confirm you have read this post in full and have the attention to detail this role requires, begin your cover letter with the exact phrase "I want to be lucky". Applications that do not open with this phrase will not be reviewed, regardless of experience.



Do not apply if...



>You need daily instructions and cannot build or manage your own outreach pipeline

>You copy and paste the same generic application for every role you apply to

>You cannot work full time during BST business hours

>You have no real experience with LinkedIn Sales Navigator or cold
 outreach

>You are not comfortable being directly accountable to Founders and an Operations Manager





What we offer



>$6 to $8 USD per hour based on experience, reviewed after probation

>Full time remote position with a stable and growing agency

>Direct access to Founders and Operations Manager with no middle layers

>Long term opportunity to grow with the business as we scale

>A fast moving team that values output over process and respects people who take ownership





How to apply



Submit your CV + cover letter starting with the required phrase,  your logic question answer, and your Loom or Google Drive video link. Incomplete applications will not be reviewed.

title: URGENT! Senior Meta Ads Media Buyer ($2500/ Month )
description:
About the role



We are a fast growing performance marketing agency generating leads across multiple industries. Our campaigns are already live. This role is not about launching ads. It is about diving into active accounts, finding what is underperforming, and fixing it with precision.



You will report directly to the Operations Manager and Founders. Your work will be seen and acted on immediately.





Core responsibilities



>Monitor all active Meta, Google, and TikTok campaigns daily during BST hours

>Analyze data to identify optimization opportunities across CPL, CPA, and conversion rate

>Diagnose performance drops and implement fixes quickly with clear reasoning

>Spot creative fatigue early and brief new testing angles backed by data

>Adjust targeting, budgets, bid strategies, and campaign structure based on evidence

>Wont need to create ads as the dashboard can create images and videos, they just need to be able to identify new hooks etc.

>If you are comfortable coming up with new angles/hooks etc. 

>Able to research into competitors for new angles and coming up with creative briefs.

>Produce concise weekly performance reports with actionable recommendations

>Communicate daily through Slack and manage tasks in ClickUp independently





Requirements



>3 or more years managing Meta Ads in a performance focused 

environment

>Proven experience optimizing existing accounts, not just launching campaigns

>Solid understanding of lead generation funnels and conversion mechanics

>Comfortable analyzing large scale Ads Manager accounts with significant daily spend

>Hands on experience with Google Ads, TikTok Ads, and GoHighLevel

>Available full time during BST business hours

>Strong written communication and self managed workflow





Logic question  (required)



You are managing a Meta lead generation campaign. Over the past 7 days CPL has increased by 68?spite budget, audience, and creative all remaining unchanged. iOS traffic accounts for 60% of impressions. Frequency is at 2.1. Landing page conversion rate has dropped from 18% to 9%.



Walk us through your full diagnostic process. What do you check first, in what order, and why? What is your hypothesis and what action do you take?



We are not looking for a perfect answer. We are evaluating how you think, how you structure a problem, and the depth of your knowledge.





Video introduction  (required)



Record a 2 to 3 minute video and upload to Loom or Google Drive. Include the link in your application. Cover who you are, your experience with paid media, a specific result you are proud of with real numbers, and why this role is the right fit for you.



Read carefully before applying



To confirm you have read this post in full, begin your cover letter with the exact phrase "I want to be lucky". Applications that do not open with this phrase will not be reviewed.



What we offer



$16 to  USD per hour based on experience, reviewed after probation



Full time remote position with a stable and growing agency

Direct access to Founders and Operations Manager with no middle layers



Fast moving environment where your decisions have immediate visible impact



****How to apply****

Submit your CV + cover letter starting with the required phrase, and your video link. Incomplete applications will not be reviewed.

title: Social Media UGC Sourcer Creator Research
description:
ROLE: UGC Sourcer / Creator Scout



TYPE: Long-term if you're good



WHO THIS IS FOR



- This is for someone who lives on TikTok, Instagram, and the internet in general.

- You do NOT need to be a corporate VA.

- You do NOT need to have years of experience.

- But you DO need to be sharp, fast, internet-native, and willing to learn.



WHO WE ARE



- We're building a content-driven app growth engine.

- Right now the first app is called Lockt.

- Lockt blocks distracting apps until the user walks their steps.

- Our job is to find normal creators who can film cheap raw iPhone clips for us.

- We post the content from our own accounts. We are paying for footage, not followers.



WHAT YOU'LL DO



1. Find creators on TikTok, Instagram, and Reddit who fit our app angles

2. Judge very quickly if someone is a fit or not

3. Add qualified leads to our tracker cleanly

4. DM qualified leads using our approved outreach

5. Update statuses every day so the pipeline stays clean

6. Send a short end-of-day report with numbers and learnings



THIS ROLE IS NOT



- customer support

- appointment setting

- generic admin work

- influencer management for big celebrities



It's internet research + creator sourcing + good judgment.



WHAT MAKES SOMEONE GOOD AT THIS



- you are naturally online and notice patterns fast

- you know what makes a person feel native on TikTok

- you can spot cringe / fake / over-produced content quickly

- you are comfortable doing repetitive work without getting sloppy

- you can follow a system but still think for yourself



REQUIRED



- Good written English

- Comfortable recording short Looms

- Comfortable using TikTok, Instagram, Reddit, Google Sheets / Notion

- Stable internet and a laptop

- Can work consistently, not disappear



NICE TO HAVE



- experience in sourcing, recruiting, lead gen, outreach, social media, or creator work

- experience finding people online for any role or offer

- understands Gen Z / 
 / app culture



PAY AND GROWTH



- $
/month to start depending on sharpness and availability

- paid bi-monthly via Wise

- performance bonuses can be added once you are producing real results

- path to full-time and bigger responsibility if you are strong



HOW TO APPLY



Do NOT send a long cover letter.

Keep it clean and follow instructions.



1. Subject line must start with: LOCKT



2. Send a 60-90 second Loom or selfie video answering these:

- your name, age, and city

- why this role fits you

- one TikTok / IG creator you think would be a good fit for Lockt and why

- what you think makes content high performing on TikTok, and how to scale this?



3. In the written part of your application, include:

- your TikTok and Instagram links

- your current work situation

- how many hours/week you can give us

- the words: SCREEN TIME

- 3 search keywords you would use to find Lockt-style creators



4. If shortlisted, we'll send you a paid trial task.



IMPORTANT

If you miss the keyword, the Loom, or the social links, we will not review the application.



We are looking for someone smart, hungry, and coachable.

If that's you, please apply.

title: Short-Form Content Editor + Strategist for Entrepreneur's Personal Brand (Long-Term Role)
description:
Looking for a full-time short-form content editor and strategist to run my personal brand across TikTok, Reels, Shorts, LinkedIn, and Snap. I film the raw content daily, you handle everything else - editing, posting, scheduling, strategy, analytics, and comments. High volume, unfiltered style, long-term role with real growth potential.



ABOUT ME



I'm 19, live in Miami, and run an Amazon business as my main thing. I'm starting my personal brand from zero and have only posted one video. Planning to launch info products and mentorship down the line once there's an audience built up. I have the business side handled. I need someone to handle the content side.



ABOUT THE ROLE



You run my content. I film, you do everything else. Short-form first across TikTok, Reels, Shorts, LinkedIn, and Snap. The vibe is Miami lifestyle, business, money, cars, and mindset. Unfiltered, lots of personality, cursing stays in.



For a broad sense of the style and space, think creators like TJR, Brez, Jordan Welch, Iman Gadzhi, Luke Belmar, Alex Hormozi, and Hamza Ahmed. Not trying to copy them, just gives you a general feel for the lane.



This is a long-term role. I'm not looking for someone for 3 months. If this grows the way I think it can, you'll eventually manage editors under you and be paid significantly more.



WHAT YOU'D DO



- Edit short-form clips daily and reformat across platforms

- Handle all posting and scheduling

- Write captions and hashtags

- Manage comments day-to-day

- Analyze what's working and what isn't

- Send me weekly filming briefs telling me what to film next, what topics to cover, and which comments deserve video replies

- Spot trends and adapt content to them

- Handle account security (proxies, VPN setup, whatever we need so posting from overseas doesn't throttle reach)

- Be proactive. I won't micromanage. You own the brand on socials.



WHAT I'D DO



- Film 30-45 minutes of raw content every day and drop it in a shared cloud folder

- One batch filming session per week (1-2 hours) for specific stuff you ask for - talking-head on a topic, car shoot, specific b-roll, whatever you need

- Be available for questions and feedback

- Pay for any tools, software, proxies, or subscriptions you need



POSTING VOLUME



I want volume. Starting target is 10+ posts a day across platforms within the first month, mostly TikTok. Growing to 15-25 posts a day over time. Most of that is the same core edits reformatted per platform, not 20 unique edits from scratch. If you think volume is a problem, this isn't the role for you.



PAY AND GROWTH



- Starts at $2,000-$2,500 per month depending on skill and experience

- Performance-based raises as we grow

- Bonuses when we hit milestones

- Real upward path if you stick around and perform



WHO I WANT



I don't need someone who's already the best. I need someone smart, motivated, fast, and hungry to become the best. If you're lazy or half-ass your work, don't apply, you'll waste both our time. If you take pride in what you make and actually care, I'll take care of you.



HOW TO APPLY



Answer these in your message:



1. Share your portfolio. Any format - Google Drive, website, Behance, whatever.



2. Have you ever personally worked for a creator or influencer? If yes, who, and what did you do for them?



3. Have you done short-form content before (TikTok, Reels, Shorts)? Give examples if you can.



4. Do you prefer editing short-form or long-form content, and why?



5. Have you ever been a content strategist, not just an editor? If yes, tell me about it.



6. Walk me through how you'd take a 5-minute raw video of me talking while walking down the street and turn it into short-form content. What's your actual thought process?



7. At the end of your message, write the word RISE in all caps. This confirms you read the full post.



Don't send a generic template. Job post closes 4/23 10AM PHT

title: Social Media Distribution & Creator Ops Coordinator
description:
ROLE: Distribution & Creator Ops Coordinator

TYPE: Long-term if you're strong



WHO THIS IS FOR

This is for someone organized, sharp, reliable, and internet-native.

You do NOT need to be a polished corporate social media manager.

But you DO need to be good at keeping lots of moving pieces under control.



WHO WE ARE

We're building a content-led app growth engine.

We source short-form content, post it through our own account network, test volume,

and double down on what performs.



We need someone to help run the distribution side of that machine.



We operate in 2 lanes:



PIPELINE A

- we post content through our own account network

- this can mean many accounts per app

- content must be queued, scheduled, posted, and tracked cleanly



PIPELINE B

- creators post through their own channels under agreed deal terms

- someone has to make sure they actually post, send proof, and get logged properly



This role helps hold both lanes together.



WHAT YOU'LL DO

1. Schedule short-form content across multiple TikTok / Instagram accounts

2. Keep owned-account posting queues full across many accounts, not just one brand page

3. Coordinate what gets posted on which account, in which market, and when

4. Track captions, sounds, posting notes, and content status cleanly

5. Follow up with Pipeline B creators and confirm their posts actually go live

6. Collect posting proof, links, and status updates from creator deals

7. Monitor account health and flag anything unusual fast

8. Record simple daily / weekly reports on what shipped, what posted, and what performed

9. Help identify winners, losers, and useful content patterns



THIS ROLE IS NOT

- being the face of the brand

- making aesthetic Canva posts all day

- writing fluffy brand strategy decks

- replying to every comment like a community manager

- generic VA admin support



This role is posting operations + creator follow-through + account coordination + clean analysis.



WHAT MAKES SOMEONE GOOD AT THIS

- you are very organized without being slow

- you can handle repetitive work without becoming messy

- you notice patterns in content performance

- you understand how TikTok / IG content actually feels native

- you can keep multiple accounts and queues clean at the same time

- you can chase creators politely and keep them accountable

- you communicate clearly and do not disappear



REQUIRED

- Good written English

- Comfortable using TikTok and Instagram daily

- Comfortable with scheduling tools, spreadsheets, and trackers

- Stable internet and a laptop

- Can work consistently and hit posting deadlines

- Strong attention to detail

- Comfortable managing lots of moving content across multiple accounts



NICE TO HAVE

- experience scheduling content for TikTok / IG / Shorts

- experience with Publer, Buffer, Metricool, Later, or similar tools

- experience tracking content performance in Sheets / Notion

- experience working with lots of content assets and file naming systems

- basic understanding of account health / shadowban / posting risk

- experience following up with creators, affiliates, or partners to make sure deliverables went live



HOW TO APPLY

Do NOT send a long cover letter.

Keep it clean and follow instructions.



1. Subject line must start with: POSTING



2. Send a 60-90 second Loom or selfie video answering these:

- your name, age, and city

- why this role fits you

- how you would stay organized if you had to manage 10+ social accounts at once

- how you would make sure creators in a posting deal actually publish on time

- one thing you think separates a strong TikTok post from a weak one



3. In the written part of your application, include:

- your TikTok and Instagram links

- your current work situation

- how many hours/week you can give us

- one short paragraph on how you would report what content is working each week

- one short paragraph on how you would track both:

  a) creator posts on their own channels

  b) posts going out on our owned accounts



4. If shortlisted, we'll send you a paid trial task.



IMPORTANT

If you miss the keyword, the Loom, or the social links, we will not review the application.



We are looking for someone reliable, sharp, and calm under volume.

If that's you, apply.

title: Video Editor for Ecommerce Dropshipping (Meta Ads Specialist)
description:
Are YOU an experienced video editor specializing in Meta Ads for physical products and dropshipping? Can you look at a competitor’s winning ad and immediately understand how to replicate it technically, or transform a script into a winning creative using the most advanced AI tools? If you answered an enthusiastic “YES” to both questions above, KEEP READING.

We run multiple international companies in the ecommerce and education space and we’re looking for a Video Editor (Meta Ads Specialist) to join our creative team.

We need someone to take responsibility for:

Sales-Focused Ad Production: Crafting clean, high-conversion ads (1 to 5 minutes) including Mini-VSLs, AI-UGC, and "Product in Hand" content.

Asset Management & Sourcing: You will be provided with a folder of our selected B-rolls. However, if additional clips are needed, you must source them autonomously and innovatively. The use of traditional stock footage (Shutterstock, Envato, etc.) is strictly FORBIDDEN.

From Script to Finished Product: We provide the scripts; your job is to interpret them visually, choosing the right clips and editing them to create a dynamic, persuasive, and technically flawless product.

AI Tool Research & Implementation: This is your passion. You must stay constantly updated on new AI releases (editing, UGC avatars, video generation). In our weekly calls, we expect you to pitch new software that can revolutionize our workflow.

AI Asset Generation: Hands-on use of the AI Stack (Higgsfield, Sora 2, Veo 3, Arcads, MakeUGC) to create or enhance content.

Visual Optimization: Implementing textual hooks, kinetic typography, and scroll-stopping subtitles.

Position Requirements:

At least 2 years of specific experience: A solid background in Meta Ads for ecommerce brands. You must have worked as an editor for brands generating at least $10k/month in revenue. While respecting privacy, you will be asked to provide examples of these collaborations in the following stages.

Deep Passion for Innovation: This isn't just a job; you must love technology. We want an AI "killer" who stays ahead of the market.

Excellent Problem-Solving Skills: If instructions aren't crystal clear or assets are missing, you don't stop. You find a solution and complete the task with excellence.

Availability & Commitment: Starting with a part-time collaboration (20h/week) with a clear intention of moving to Full-Time shortly. We work 5 days a week, but availability on Saturdays and Sundays is required for emergencies. Please note: we are looking for a dedicated partner, not an "Upwork or Fiverr style" freelancer juggling 5-6 different companies. If you cannot guarantee us top priority and absolute mental focus, do not apply.

Obsessive Precision & Anti-Mediocrity: Subtitles, cuts, and details must be perfect. Mediocrity is not allowed in our team.

Fluent in English: The team communicates in English. Deep proficiency is mandatory to manage multilingual content (IT, FR, ES, DE, NL).

What We Offer:

Performance Bonuses: Potential for bonuses up to $1000+ per month based on the results of the videos produced.

Career Growth: A real opportunity to become Head of Video Editing.

Active Involvement: You will actively participate in the growth of an international company, testing the most powerful AI tools on the market.

title: Operations Support Coordinator
description:
Operations Support Coordinator 



American Standard Adhesives, Inc. 



Remote  |  Full-Time  |  Fixed PST Hours 



Reports To: Owner 



Works Closely With: Customer Service & Order Processing Specialist 



Department: Operations 



Status: Full-Time 



Schedule: Monday–Friday, 8:00 AM–4:00 PM PST or 9:00 AM–5:00 PM PST 



Location: Remote (PST hours required) 



 



About the Company 



American Standard Adhesives, Inc. (ASA) is a U.S.-based manufacturer and distributor of industrial adhesive products, serving a diverse base of customers across multiple industries. Our lean team plays a critical role in keeping our day-to-day operations running smoothly and our customers well-served. 



1. Position Summary 



The Operations Support Coordinator is a senior supportive role that helps the Owner run the day-to-day operational workflow of American Standard Adhesives. This person owns the repetitive, structured, and recurring tasks across the operation, and serves as a coordination point between back office, warehouse, accounting, and sales support functions. 



This is a support role, not a decision-making role. The Owner retains all final decision-making authority over pricing, commitments, disputes, personnel, and policy. The Operations Support Coordinator is empowered to execute within established SOPs and Work Instructions, to coordinate across teams, and to escalate exceptions promptly. 



The Operations Support Coordinator works side-by-side with the Customer Service & Order Processing Specialist, who manages the day-to-day order workflow. This role requires a working understanding of the order processing function so that coverage, overflow, and escalation handling are seamless. 



2. Key Responsibilities 



A. Order & Back Office Coordination — ~30% 



Support the Customer Service & Order Processing Specialist with order flow, including purchase order handling, invoicing, and customer acknowledgments. 



Monitor the open order queue daily; flag bottlenecks and aging orders to the Owner. 



Coordinate between back office and warehouse on daily outbound orders. 



Maintain visibility across online and third-party platforms, as well as direct customer order channels. 



Provide coverage for the Customer Service & Order Processing Specialist during absences or peak volume. 



B. Shipping & Warehouse Coordination — ~20% 



Coordinate shipping label creation and communicate with the warehouse on daily picking and shipping. 



Coordinate parcel and pallet shipments across all channels. 



Liaise with the warehouse team on picking and shipping. 



Ensure shipping documentation is accurate and filed. 



Confirm end-of-day shipment closure with the warehouse through direct communication. 



C. Import & Vendor Coordination — ~15% 



Support recurring import workflows, including container tracking and customs follow-up. 



Manage the vendor
 channel: monitoring, routing, and filing per company work instructions. 



Maintain vendor files and supporting documentation. 



Draft vendor communications for Owner review when commitments are involved. 



D. Compliance, Insurance & Risk — ~10% 



Coordinate contractor file tracking, insurance certificate collection, and renewal calendars. 



Support tenant verification and related compliance workflows where applicable. 



Keep compliance records organized per company file-naming guidelines. 



E. Recurring Administrative & Systems Tasks — ~15% 



File and folder organization across company systems, per internal guidelines. 



Accounting system data entry support (bookkeeping execution only — not financial decisions). 



Pull and format operational and margin reports for Owner review. 



Maintain quality assurance and product documentation. 



Support system administration tasks under Owner direction. 



F. Project-Based & Ad Hoc Support — ~10% 



Support insurance renewals, hiring and recruitment coordination, and SOP documentation. 



Prepare case or claim files for Owner review. 



Handle time-sensitive special tasks requiring independent follow-up within pre-approved scope. 



3. Authority & Decision Boundaries 



This is an execution and coordination role, not a decision-making role. Clarity here protects the business and the person in the role. 



The Operations Support Coordinator MAY: 



Execute any task covered by an existing Work Instruction or SOP. 



Coordinate teammates, vendors, and carriers within pre-approved scope. 



Draft communications, quotations, and documents for Owner review. 



Flag exceptions, risks, and decision points upward promptly and in writing. 



Provide data, summaries, and recommendations to help the Owner d
 faster. 



The Operations Support Coordinator MAY NOT (without Owner approval): 



Approve pricing, discounts, credit terms, or payment terms. 



Commit the company to vendor contracts, service agreements, or long-term arrangements. 



Approve refunds, returns outside written policy, or customer concessions. 



Approve hiring, terminations, promotions, or compensation changes. 



Change SOPs, policies, or approve new processes without written Owner sign-off. 



Resolve disputes involving material money, legal exposure, or customer retention. 



When in doubt, escalate. Speed and clarity of escalation is valued over independent judgment on gray-area items. 



4. Qualifications 



Required 



Minimum 5 years of professional experience in operations, logistics, customer service, or back office support. 



Working knowledge of general accounting software, shipping software, Microsoft 365 (Teams, SharePoint, Outlook, Excel), and business phone systems. 



Strong English communication — written and spoken — with a clear, concise, professional tone. 



Proven ability to follow SOPs and Work Instructions precisely. 



Excellent organization; able to work within existing file naming and folder structures without disturbing them. 



Disciplined on escalation: knows what to d
, what to ask, and what to document. 



Ability to handle a mix of repetitive and non-repetitive tasks with minimal supervision. 



Preferred 



Import/export or logistics coordination exposure. 



Industrial supply, distribution, or manufacturing background. 



Experience supporting an owner-operated small or mid-size business. 



Analytical or accounting background. 



5. What We’re Looking For 



Highly organized with strong attention to detail. 



Proactive communicator who flags issues early rather than letting them escalate. 



Reliable, self-managed, and comfortable in a fast-paced, lean team environment. 



Comfortable managing multiple priorities and shifting tasks throughout the day. 



Mature judgment — knows when to act, when to ask, and when to escalate. 



Operates well under clear boundaries and is comfortable supporting, not leading. 



6. Success Metrics (First 90 Days) 



Zero preventable shipping errors. 



Vendor
 inbox processed daily with no unrouted items older than 24 hours. 



Daily visibility of order queue status reported to the Owner. 



Backup coverage established for the Customer Service & Order Processing Specialist on core order workflow tasks. 



All escalations documented with context and a recommended next step. 



7. Reporting & Working Relationships 



Reports directly to the Owner. 



Works daily alongside the Customer Service & Order Processing Specialist. 



Coordinates with the warehouse team, accounting, and service / vendor contacts. 



Escalates customer or partner-facing decisions to the Owner. 



8. Schedule Requirements 



Full-time, Monday–Friday. 



Fixed PST schedule: 8:00 AM–4:00 PM PST or 9:00 AM–5:00 PM PST. 



No flexi-time or alternative schedules. 



Must be fully available during PST business hours. 



9. Compensation 



Competitive rate based on experience. 



Long-term, stable engagement with room to grow.

title: Full-Time, Remote Social Media Manager & Brand Builder
description:

    Applications without examples of past work will not be reviewed.
salary: $600 a month negotiable based on experie

title: Social Media Content Growth Specialist
description:
Role Type: Full-Time

Focus: Organic Traffic, AI Content Creation



Role Overview



We are looking for a fast-paced, tech-savvy Social High-Volume Media Content Specialist to spearhead our organic growth and sales pipeline. This is a high-volume production role: you will be responsible for producing and publishing 20–50 short-form videos per day across TikTok and Instagram.



The ideal candidate is an "AI-First" creator who understands how to leverage tools like KREA AI and CapCut to maintain quality while hitting massive scale. You don’t just post content; you understand the "why" behind viral trends and how to turn views into sales.



Key Responsibilities



1. Mass Production: Create and publish 20–50 high-quality videos/carousels daily following the weekly content brief.

2. AI Asset Generation: Use KREA AI (and similar tools) to generate high-end visuals, backgrounds, and creative assets.

3. Rapid Editing: Use CapCut for efficient editing, focusing on high-retention techniques: video splitting, dynamic captioning, and rhythmic transitions (Nothing too advanced, basic functions).

4. Graphic Design: Utilize Canva to build high-converting Instagram Carousels (treated as video units in your daily quota). (Nothing  too advanced, basic functions, no complicated designs, just photos and text).

5. Platform Mastery: Manage the end-to-end upload process for TikTok and Instagram, ensuring optimal use of trending audio, localized hashtags, and engaging captions (You will need to use cloud phone infrastructure(instructions will be given), you will be able to do everything from your computer, no psychical phones needed).

6. Growth Hacking: Identify "viral hooks" and trending sounds in real-time to incorporate into that day’s production (You can use any basic AI chat generation tool; Gemini, ChatGPT, Grok, etc.).

7. English Copywriting: Write compelling, error-free English captions and on-screen text designed to trigger the "Call to Action" (CTA) (Attention to detail is needed, but sometimes you have to make text mistakes on purpose, so people would fall for the organic content plot.).





Requirements & Skills



1. Efficiency: Ability to maintain a "flow state" to meet high-volume daily output without sacrificing the "hook" quality.

2. Technical Stack: * AI: Proficient in KREA AI for image/video generation.

3. Editing: CapCut (Expert in splitting, overlays, and auto-captions).

4. Design: Canva (Proficient in layouts and carousel formatting).

5. Social Intuition: A deep understanding of the TikTok/Reels algorithm—you know what makes people stop scrolling in the first 2 seconds (not mandatory but nice to have skill).

6. Language: High level of English proficiency (written and verbal).

7. Direct Response Mindset: Minimal "know-how" of how organic traffic translates into sales leads or storefront clicks (not mandatory but nice to have skill).



The "Extras"(There’s a possibility to utilize this in the future, bonuses are possible)



1. Engagement Monitoring: candidates should check back on high-performing posts to engage with early comments, as this boosts the viral potential.

2. Data Reporting: A simple weekly report on which videos gained the most "Saves" and "Shares" (the two most important metrics for organic growth in 2026).



Performance Indicators (KPIs)



1. Volume: herence to the 20–50 daily video quota (exact number depends on a weekly briefs).

2. Growth: Weekly increase in organic reach and follower acquisition.

3. Conversion: Number of "Link in Bio" clicks or direct sales attributed to organic posts.



What We Offer:



1. Competitive Salary: $560/month, 5-7 days a week

2. After a 3-month probation period, if performance meets the organization’s expectations in terms of deadlines and quality, the salary will be increased to $570/month.

3. Flexible remote working hours

4. A supportive and innovative team with opportunities for career growth



Note to Candidates: 



This is a "Creator-meets-Machine" role. If you enjoy the intersection of AI technology and social media psychology, and you can work at a high velocity, this is for you (Basically don’t overthink it, just ship it for the audience to judge).



How to Apply:



To apply, please submit your resume and portfolio with examples of video or static creatives you have created. To demonstrate your attention to detail, include the name of the CEO at Tesla in your application. We look forward to receiving your application!

title: Full-Stack Developer for Existing SaaS + Mobile App Development

Making recommendations for better structure, speed, scalability, and security

Coordinating with our team and giving clear updates on progress

Required skills:

Strong full-stack development experience

Experience working on existing/live SaaS products, not just building from scratch

Mobile app development experience

Experience with API integration

Ability to troubleshoot and improve pre-existing code

Good communication and ability to explain technical work in simple terms

Able to work independently and also collaborate with a team

To apply, please send ALL of the following:

ongoing SaaS improvements/maintenance

adding new SaaS features

building a mobile app connected to an existing SaaS

Your availability per week

Your expected turnaround time for tasks and communication

Important:

Please do not apply unless you can show real past work. We want to see projects you have actually built or significantly contributed to.

When you apply, start your message with: “SaaS + Mobile Expert” so we know you read the full post.

We are looking for someone dependable, skilled, and proactive who can grow with us long-term.

title: Web Systems & Tracking Specialist (Wix, GA, GTM, HubSpot, Integrations, etc)
description:
Overview:



This role involves Wix web development, Google Analytics / GTM tracking setup, and CRM/system integrations. We are not looking for a manager. We are looking for someone who can figure things out, build systems from scratch, and fix anything that breaks.



This is a part-time, hourly role under EST working hours for a highly resourceful person who steps in whenever technical challenges arise across our marketing stack, websites, and business systems. You will not manage systems day-to-day. You will solve problems, implement solutions, and make things work.



The first project will be migrating our entire website into Wix and setting up all Google integrations and conversion tracking. We expect this to take up to a month to complete. After that, you will work on ongoing projects, including building additional websites, troubleshooting issues, and resolving other technical challenges across our systems.



You should be someone who:

*Can understand a problem and turn it into a working solution

*Knows how to research, test, and troubleshoot across multiple platforms

*Is comfortable using tools you haven’t used before

*Takes full ownership of problems until they are solved



You don’t need to know everything. But you must be able to learn quickly and adapt. 

If you enjoy solving complex problems and building functional systems from start to finish, this role is for you.





Key Responsibilities:



A. Marketing & Tracking Systems 

*Set up and implement tracking systems (Google Analytics, Google Tag Manager, Google Ads, Search Console, YouTube, social media pixels)

*Configure accurate conversion tracking across platforms

*Troubleshoot and fix tracking issues, data discrepancies, or broken integrations

*Implement new tracking or measurement solutions as needed

 

NOTE: This is not a campaign management role. You build and fix, you don’t monitor daily performance



B. Website Development & Systems 

*Build websites and landing pages using Wix and other common website builders

*Work with Wix CMS to create dynamic, database-driven pages

*Implement site functionality (forms, tracking, integrations, etc.)

*Troubleshoot and fix issues across front-end, CMS, and integrations

 

NOTE: This is not an ongoing maintenance role. You build it right and fix it when needed



C. Business Systems & Integrations 

*Set up and connect business systems (Hubspot, CTM/Dialpad, store locators, other tools)

*Ensure systems communicate properly and data flows correctly

*Troubleshoot and resolve system issues, broken automations, or integration failures

 

NOTE: This is not an operations role. You set up integrations and fix problems, not manage day-to-day usage



Qualifications:



A. Technical Skills

*Experience with marketing and analytics tools (GA, GTM, Ads, Search Console, social pixels)

*Hands-on experience with conversion tracking and pixel implementation

*Proficiency in website builders, especially Wix, including CMS/database-driven pages

*Familiarity with CRMs, business operations tools, and system integrations



B. Soft Skills

*Independent problem-solver with strong critical thinking

*Highly adaptable and able to learn new systems quickly

*Strong communication skills with proactive “over-communication”

*Detail-oriented with a systems-thinking mindset



C. Company Core Values

Radical Candor

Extreme Ownership

Anticipation

Lean

Drive

Overcommunication

Growth Mindset 



Compensation:

Part-time, hourly role

$8–$12 USD per hour, depending on experience and skill level



Keywords:

Wix, Wix CMS, Web Development, Website Builder, Dynamic Pages, CMS, Google Analytics, Google Tag Manager, GTM, Conversion Tracking, Google Ads,
 Pixel, Tracking Setup, Marketing Analytics, Hubspot, CRM, API Integrations, Webhooks, Zapier, Automation, Troubleshooting, Debugging, JavaScript (basic), HTML, CSS, Technical Support, System Integration

title: AI Video & Creative Ad Editor (AI-Native | DTC Health Brand)
description:
Here's the full job post with that section updated:



JOB TITLE

AI Video & Creative Ad Editor (AI-Native | DTC Health Brand)



TYPE OF EMPLOYMENT

Full Time



JOB DESCRIPTION

We're a fast-scaling women's health supplement brand targeting the US market, running aggressive paid social campaigns on Meta. We're building out our creative production engine and looking for a talented, AI-native video editor to join us full time and grow with us long term.

This is not a traditional video editing role. We want someone who lives and breathes AI video generation tools and uses them as their primary creative weapon — not an afterthought.

What You'll Be Producing

~50 AI video ads per month plus 50–100 static image ads, including:



AI VSL (video sales letters, 1m30s–2mins)

AI UGC talking head ads (1m30s–2mins)

AI UGC talking head with B-roll (1m30s–2mins)

AI Pixar/animation-style VSL (1m30s–2mins)

AI static image ads



Reference styles (Meta Ad Library):




/ads/library/?id=
/ads/library/?id=
/ads/library/?id=
/ads/library/?id=
/ads/library/?id=
/ads/library/?id=
Tools You Must Know (or Learn Fast)

Kling, Runway Gen, Pika, Google Veo 3, Seedance, Minimax, Kie AI, Higgsfield, Shorz, and other emerging AI video platforms. We expect you to stay ahead of new tools as the space evolves rapidly.

How the Role Works

Initially, scripts and copy will be provided to you so you can hit the ground running. However, we actively encourage creative input from day one — we want someone who isn't just executing briefs but is also developing their own script ideas, angles, and concepts alongside the ones provided. Over time, the role will expand to include deep customer avatar research, creative angle development, concept ideation, and desire/pain point mapping — becoming a full creative strategist function. If you have good ideas, we want to hear them from the start.

Career Path

We are building a creative team around this role. The right candidate will grow into Creative Strategist, leading a wider team of editors and researchers as we scale. This is a ground-floor opportunity with a brand that is moving fast.

Ideal Candidate



Proven experience editing paid social video ads for direct-to-consumer brands, ideally health or supplement brands

Demonstrable AI video generation skills across multiple tools

Strong understanding of Meta ad creative — hooks, pacing, silent-view optimisation, captions

Fast learner who keeps up with new AI tools as they launch

Comfortable with high output volumes and fast turnaround times

Portfolio that includes DTC-style
/Instagram video ads



To Apply

Please share your portfolio including examples of AI-generated video ads and any DTC or health brand work. Applications without a portfolio will not be considered.

title: Virtual CSR
description:
We are hiring reliable CSRs to join the growing team of The Comfort Authority company!



THE COMPANY:



The Comfort Authority is a top-rated Heating, Ventilating & Air Conditioning Company in Tampa Bay in Florida, USA. You can learn more about them here: 
/



ROLE DESCRIPTION:



A typical day for a Call Center Representative is primarily to perform the work to book appointments to fill the call board with the required number of appointments. This involves making a high volume of outbound calls to existing customers to book appointments as well as taking and booking inbound calls. Other lead sources such as Podium, Yelp, etc. are other places the CSR will look to for customer requests for service.



Additional tasks such as addressing customer questions and concerns, assisting upset customers and handling administrative tasks such as looking up warranty information and/or communicating with management to resolve issues will also be required. The CSR will track their time via a spreadsheet and time will be monitored by the Call Center Manager.



The First CSR to arrive will go through the after-hours calls from all lead sources. The CSRs will help the call center department meet its goals by handling daily inbound and outbound calls, managing leads and booking service appointments for our customers via phone, chat, or
.



Throughout the day, the main priority of the CSR is to fill the call board. This is done through both outbounding to our existing customer base and receiving inbound calls from both existing and new customers. There is no limit to how many appointments can be booked in a day and only the Call Center Manager will let you know what days we are booking appointments for. The only communication outside the Call Center should be to let Dispatch know a call has been booked.



This position is repetitive and can be challenging to continue to perform at a high level. Performing at a high level is critical as this is the most important position in the company to keeping the business running.

A critical part of this job is dealing with customers that are upset. The customer’s anger level is likely to be elevated, and this is something the CSR will have to work with. Customers will even call in yelling at the CSR and the CSRs need to know that it is not personal, and the CSR will need to be able to handle this and continue to perform at a high level.



The CSR will track and enter information from customer into our software, ServiceTitan. They must become fluent using this program for looking up and entering customer information, as well as notes from field personnel the customer may be calling in for.



The position is competitive in nature. Compensation will be hourly with some performance-based compensation. They must achieve 20 outbound calls per hour. 5-10% of people we speak with that we outbound should be booked. If these numbers are not hit, the business will not have the calls they need to keep everyone working and feeding their families.



We are looking to hire CSRs to start full-time immediately, working in the EST time zone.



REQUIRED EXPERIENCE AND TRAITS:



• Previous customer service, particularly call center based, preferred, but we will be happy to train the right candidate – we hire for personality over experience.

• Great phone voice. Excellent English communication skills, both written and oral.

• Proficient in computer applications; experience with ServiceTitan is a plus!

• Dependable and self-driven, with a strong sense of initiative.

• Superior attention to detail, organized, eager to work, coachable, and motivated.

• Exceptional customer service skills, always aiming to deliver top-notch satisfaction and work well within a team.



WHAT WE OFFER:



• Salary $5/hr and overtime pay (paid via Wise)

• Paid training

• Vacation or sick leave entitlement

• Paid Holidays

• A family. This is last on the list because it’s most important. We care about our team and expect you to bring that same caring when you join. We do a lot more than just work together and you’ll build life-long friendships here.



If you think you are the one we are looking for, please respond to this job post with your quick video introduction (no more than 2 minutes) and answer this survey: 
/p/YHkYrowiFKU. This will take you about 5-10 minutes to complete, but take your time and be thorough. Please confirm in your response that you have successfully completed the survey.

title: Senior Amazon PPC Manager – Remote (Full-Time)
description:
Senior Amazon PPC Manager – Remote (Full-Time)



You live and breathe Amazon Ads. You've scaled accounts from 6 to 7 and 8 figures. You don't just "manage PPC" – you build strategies that crush the competition.



If that sounds like you, keep reading. If not, this role is not for you.



About Us

We are Fox Performance, an Amazon PPC agency founded in 2018. We work mainly with German clients, but also serve international brands across Europe and the USA. Our clients come from every industry you can imagine – supplements, beauty, home & living, pet, electronics, fashion, baby products, and more.



We are obsessed with Amazon. We test everything, read every update, break down every new beta feature, and push our clients to results they didn't think were possible. No autopilot. No "set and forget". No agency BS.

Now we are looking for a Senior Amazon PPC Manager – someone who can take full ownership of a portfolio of accounts, think strategically, and mentor junior tea
mbers along the way.



Who We Are NOT Looking For

Let's be direct. Do not apply if:



You are looking for a short-term gig or just a "bridge job" until something else comes up.

You are working multiple jobs in parallel and trying to squeeze us in on the side. We need your focus. Period.

You don't want to grow, learn, and push yourself every single week.

You want to clock in, clock out and never go beyond the bare minimum.

You see Amazon PPC as "just a job" instead of a craft you want to master.

You can't take direct, honest feedback without taking it personally.



We're not for everyone – and that's okay.

Who We ARE Looking For

We are looking for a true A-Player. Someone who:



Wants to go full throttle and be one of the best in the game.

Treats client accounts like their own business.

Is hungry, curious, and obsessed with getting better.

Wants to grow with us long-term and build a real career.

Brings energy, ideas, and ownership to the table every single day.



If that's you – we'd love to meet you.



What You'll Own



Full Account Ownership: manage a portfolio of premium client accounts end-to-end – from strategy to execution to client communication.

Advertising Strategy: build PPC strategies across Sponsored Products, Sponsored Brands, Sponsored Display – and where relevant, Amazon DSP and AMC.

Launch & Scale: from new product launches to aggressive scaling of existing winners – you know when to push and when to defend.

Advanced Optimization: bid strategies, placement optimization, SKU-level profitability, TACoS management, dayparting, portfolio structuring – you go way beyond dashboard-level.

Account Audits & Strategic Planning: diagnose weaknesses, identify opportunities, build 30/60/90 day roadmaps for every account.

Client Communication: lead client calls, present results, push back when needed, be the trusted expert clients rely on.

Mentorship: help our Junior PPC Managers and Assistants grow – share your playbook, review their work, develop the next generation.

Process Development: help us build better SOPs, templates and internal tools – your experience shapes how we operate.

Stay Ahead: test new Amazon features, evaluate new tools, and bring fresh ideas to the team.





What You Must Know (Non-Negotiables)

These are the things you absolutely need to have under your belt as a Senior:



Deep mastery of all Sponsored Ads formats: Sponsored Products, Sponsored Brands (incl. Video & Brand Store), Sponsored Display (incl. Audiences & Custom Creatives), and how they interact.

Campaign architecture: SKAG, single-keyword, theme-based, performance-based – you know which structure works when and why.

Advanced bidding strategies: dynamic bids, placement modifiers, top-of-search optimization, bid by placement, bid hijacking defense.

Keyword research & targeting: Helium 10 (Cerebro, Magnet, Frankenstein), Brand Analytics, Search Query Performance Report (SQP) – you can pull insights most managers miss.

TACoS vs ACoS: you understand the difference, when to optimize for which, and how to communicate it to clients.

Search Term Reports & Negative Mining: you build clean, performance-focused accounts without keyword cannibalization.

Brand Defense & Conquesting: you protect your client's branded search and attack competitors strategically.

Organic & Paid Synergy: you understand how PPC influences organic ranking (and vice versa) – BSR, indexation, halo effect.

Listing Fundamentals: you know that even the best PPC can't fix a bad listing – and you can identify what needs to change.

Reporting & Storytelling: you don't just deliver numbers – you tell the story behind them.

Bulk File Operations: you can edit, optimize and upload bulk files like a surgeon.

Tool Stack: Helium 10, Brand Analytics, Pacvue / Perpetua / Adtomic / Sellerboard or similar – at least one professional ad management tool you've worked with hands-on.

Bonus (high value): Amazon DSP, AMC (Amazon Marketing Cloud), Vendor Central, international marketplaces (US, UK, DE, FR, IT, ES).



If you read this list and thought "yes, that's me" – continue. If half of these are unfamiliar, this role is not the right fit yet.



What You Bring



4+ years of hands-on Amazon Advertising experience (agency or in-house), ideally managing multiple 6- and 7-figure accounts.

Proven track record of scaling Amazon accounts profitably – with real case studies you can walk us through.

Expert-level data analysis skills – Excel / Google Sheets is your playground; pivot tables, XLOOKUP, conditional logic are second nature.

Strategic mindset – you think in frameworks, not just dashboards.

Excellent English (spoken and written). German is a big plus, but not required.

Strong communication – confident in client calls, clear in writing, direct but professional.

Ownership mentality – fully accountable, no excuses.

Stable internet and a professional remote work setup.





What We Offer

You already know the foundation we offer (100% remote, MacBook, full-time, long-term, competitive USD salary, after one year: 13th month pay, 20 days PTO, paid sick leave, Philippine holidays...).





Ownership & Growth



Clear path to Team Lead / Head of PPC – we are growing, and senior hires are who we promote from.

Voice in strategy – you help shape how the agency operates.

Direct line to leadership – no middle management, no politics.

Conference & event budget – Amazon Unboxed, PPC events, industry conferences – we send you.

Annual learning budget – courses, certifications, books, coaches – you choose.



Time & Space to Do Great Work



Flexible hours – core overlap with German business hours (2–3 hours/day), the rest is yours.

Deep Work culture – no unnecessary meetings, no micromanagement.

Real team culture – weekly team calls, virtual coffee, and annual team events.

title: VIDEO / IMAGE EDITOR - health/beauty niche (dropshipping)
description:
Department: Content creation Team

Reports To: Process Manager



ROLE



As our Video & Image Editor, you will be responsible for creating and editing ad creatives based on clear guidelines we provide per task.



You will transform competitor ads into our own by adding elements such as flying logos, translating content, and adding subtitles. These are specifically dropshipping ad creatives in the Health & Beauty niche (e.g. wart remover, eyelid lifting serum, teeth whitener, etc.).



Important: 

We only consider candidates with proven experience in the dropshipping ad space. 



We are looking for an experienced Video & Image Editor who wants to grow with us long term and become a reliable part of our team. This is a hands-on, execution-focused role where consistency, attention to detail, and meeting deadlines are key. 



RESPONSIBILITIES

Video Editing



• Create video ads according to task-specific guidelines

• Translate video content

• Create voice-overs using provided tools

• Cut, trim, and restructure footage (remove/add scenes as instructed)

• Add elements such as moving logos, text animations, subtitles, and effects

• Ensure videos are formatted and optimized for paid ads



Image Editing



• Create image ads following provided guidelines

• Translate text accurately for image ads

• Edit and enhance images using tools such as ChatGPT, Canva, Higgsfield (Nano Banana Pro)

• Create variations by combining elements from multiple high-performing creatives

• Ensure visuals are clean, clear, and optimized for
 & Instagram



Workflow & Execution



• Follow SOPs step-by-step

• Work according to KPIs (shared during the interview)

• Deliver all tasks within agreed deadlines

• Stay flexible and responsive for urgent tasks

• Organize files clearly so creatives are ready for launch



RESULTS



• Deliver high-quality creatives that fully follow guidelines

• Consistently meet output and deadlines

• Maintain low revision rates by executing accurately

• Support fast ad testing with timely delivery

• Improve creative quality over time using feedback



REQUIREMENTS (MUST HAVE)



• Proven, hands-on experience creating and editing DROPSHIPPING ad creatives (mandatory)

• Experience with competitor ad replication and creating variations

• Ability to strictly follow SOPs and KPIs

• Strong experience with CapCut, Premiere Pro, Canva, Higgsfield and ChatGPT (or similar tools)

• Comfortable working with deadlines and occasional urgent requests

• Strong attention to detail and consistency

• Fluent in English (spoken and written)

• Reliable internet connection and consistent availability

title: Campaign Launcher
description:
ROLE

As our Campaign Launcher, your mission is to take ready-made creatives (videos/images) and turn them into live, structured ad campaigns on
 and Instagram. You’ll handle everything from setting up campaigns to testing different variations, all based on clear instructions and past performance. You'll work closely with the editor (and directly with the founder) to ensure our ads are launched daily, tested properly, and optimized for performance. Your work will help increase test velocity, reduce launch errors, and bring in data we can act on fast.



RESPONSIBILITIES

• Launch and schedule daily ad campaigns on
 Ads Manager using provided creatives and ad copy

• Set up campaigns, ad sets, and ads using our standard naming conventions and testing structures (ABO/CBO)

• Upload and organize assets, paste in approved copy, assign correct thumbnails, captions, links, and tracking parameters

• Perform a thorough pre-launch check (QA): confirm all settings, copy, links, targeting, budgets, and creative assets

• Monitor campaign approval status, delivery, and flag any issues like rejections or under-delivery

• Fix flagged ad rejections using our special method (training will be provided) to get ads approved and live faster

• Keep a clear record of all campaigns launched: include creative used, objective, audience, and date

• Communicate daily with the founder for new priorities, launch updates, and feedback on performance

• Follow and improve SOPs to streamline the launch process as we scale

title: Email Marketing Specialist (Klaviyo / E-commerce) – Long Term
description:
Dear Candidate,



We are a growing e-commerce
 marketing agency seeking an experienced
 Marketing Specialist to join our team. This is a long-term, project-based role with consistent work for the right candidate. You will be responsible for creating and managing complete
 automation systems for Shopify and WooCommerce stores, helping our clients increase revenue, customer retention, and engagement.



In this role, you will build and maintain
 flows including welcome sequences, abandoned checkout and cart flows, browse abandonment flows, post-purchase flows, order confirmation and shipping notification flows, and customer winback or re-engagement flows. You will write or refine conversion-focused
 copy, implement
 designs using existing templates, and segment audiences based on customer behavior and engagement. For mid- and high-tier client projects, you will also handle
 deliverability and authentication setup, including DMARC, SPF, and DKIM, to ensure
s are properly configured for optimal inbox placement.



The ideal candidate must have hands-on experience with Klaviyo and a strong understanding of e-commerce
 marketing. Experience working with Shopify or WooCommerce is required. Strong written English skills are essential. Previous agency experience is a plus but not required. Attention to detail, the ability to follow SOPs, and clear communication are critical for success in this role.



Compensation is based on experience and project scope, with opportunities for ongoing monthly work. This position is intended for a long-term collaboration with a reliable and motivated candidate.



To apply, please provide a brief overview of your experience with Klaviyo, examples of
 flows you have built, the types of e-commerce brands you have worked with, your weekly availability, and your expected rate. Please start your application with the word communication to confirm that you have read the full job description.

title: Home Care - Caregiver/Healthcare Recruiter
description:
About Us



At Helper Heroes, we’re on a mission to provide exceptional care and support to home care agencies in America. We believe in creating a true partnership where our employees act and feel like a true member of the American team they are matched with. Our goal is to help them create a compassionate, innovative, and efficient care experience for their clients and their families. To achieve this, we’re looking for a Helper Hero to join our team and help us shine even brighter!



About You



What sets us apart is YOU. You’re not just any virtual tea
mber—you’re a Helper Hero! If you’re passionate about making a difference, have a knack for organization, and thrive in a fast-paced, mission-driven environment, you’re who we are looking for. If you’re the kind of person who loves tackling behind-the-scenes tasks with a smile, ensuring that our clients' caregivers and clients receive the best possible support, apply today!



Job Overview



We are seeking a proactive, detail-oriented Recruiter to support recruitment, caregiver

onboarding, and administrative tasks for a growing home care business. This role is

ideal for someone with experience in healthcare recruitment and a passion for

streamlining operations. You will work closely with the owner to alleviate their workload,

enabling them to focus on business growth and client care.



Key Responsibilities



1. Recruitment & Onboarding:



- Manage end-to-end caregiver recruitment: screen applicants, schedule interviews, and coordinate orientation/training.

- Process onboarding documentation via ADP Workforce (e.g., electronic I-9s, employee handbook distribution).

- Track and ensure completion of state-mandated caregiver training (e.g.,via Active Insights).



2. Administrative Support



- Answer inbound calls during peak hours and manage voi
s/lead inquiries.

- Assist with client intake calls and referral source coordination.

- Provide general administrative support (e.g., scheduling, data entry).



3. Systems & Collaboration



- Utilize platforms like WellSky or Axiscare (training provided) to streamline workflows.

- Collaborate with the owner to refine processes and maintain organization.



Qualifications:



- Excellent written/verbal communication (fluent English).

- Strong organizational and time-management abilities.

- Proficiency with CRM systems,
 management, and cloud-based tools (e.g., Google Drive).

- Proactive mindset—anticipate needs before they arise.

- Proven experience in recruitment, specifically in healthcare or home care staffing.

- Strong interpersonal and communication skills, with the ability to build rapport with candidates and tea
mbers.

- Excellent organizational skills and attention to detail.

- Ability to work independently and manage time effectively in a fast-paced environment.

- Familiarity with recruitment platforms and CRM tools

- A positive attitude, sense of humor, and a passion for helping others.



Attributes of a Successful Helper Hero:



- Empathy: You genuinely care about people and want to make a difference in their lives.

- Organization: You’re a master of multitasking and can keep everything running smoothly.

- Communication: You speak impeccable English. You’re a clear and friendly communicator, both written and verbal.

- Problem Solver: You can see the big picture when resolving complex issues and follow through until you reach full resolution.

- Self Starter: You work effectively without supervision and follow processes precisely.

- Reliability: You’re dependable, punctual, and always ready to step up when needed.



Why You’ll Love Working with Us:



- Competitive Base Pay: $6.50/hr for the first 6 months. (Among the highest in the homecare industry)

- Make a Difference: You’ll play a key role in ensuring that clients receive the best

care possible.

- Growth Opportunities: As we grow, so will you! There’s plenty of room for

advancement and learning.

- Fun & Supportive Team: We’re a tight-knit group that values collaboration,

compassion, and a good laugh.



Ready to Be a Hero?



If you’re excited about the opportunity to join our team, where you’ll be appreciated,

have a sense of purpose and inclusion and are willing to help us create a brighter, more

compassionate care experience, we can’t wait to hear from you! Apply today and let’s

make a difference together.



IMPORTANT: Directly apply and send your resume on our website: 
/helperheroes/
