title: CFO
description:
Full-Time | Philippines-Based | Remote | US Business Hours (Eastern Timezone)



ElasticIT



Salary: $10 - 12 per hour (targeting top-end Philippines market rate, reflecting seniority and trust level of this role)



The Challenge



Right now, ElasticIT’s financial function is outsourced. A third-party firm handles the books, runs payroll, and categorizes transactions. It works, sort of. But the reality is that when your finances live outside your business, you’re always one step removed from the truth. Transactions end up in the wrong buckets. Vendor spend doesn’t get cross-checked against what we’re billing clients. A thousand dollars a month leaks out on parked domains that nobody noticed because nobody’s watching closely enough. And the CEO, who should be focused on the mission, is staring at a spreadsheet at midnight trying to work out whether last month was actually profitable.



This isn’t a problem you solve by hiring someone to do what the outsourced firm already does. This is a problem you solve by bringing in someone who can design something better. Someone who looks at a messy financial landscape and doesn’t just see problems — they see the architecture of a solution. Someone who can invent the processes, build the systems, and then drive the whole thing to completion without losing interest halfway through.



ElasticIT is on a mission to eliminate repetitive IT tasks for 1 million healthcare workers by 2050. That mission runs on revenue, margin, and cash. We need someone who brings the entire financial function in-house and builds it properly from a blank page. That someone could be you.



The Role



You’ll be the person who takes over from our outsourced finance provider and architects the entire financial function from the inside. This is full-scope financial operations for a growing US-based healthcare IT managed service provider: accounting in QuickBooks, contracts in HaloPSA, payroll, vendor management, billing cycles, and financial reporting. You’ll also handle light-touch bookkeeping for Integras, an aligned but separate business owned by the same founder.



Let’s be upfront about what this is: a design-and-build job. The outsourced provider has things stable enough that you can take over their processes without starting from scratch. But we don’t want you to just replicate what they do. We want you to take over, understand it, and then redesign it into something that actually works properly. You’ll create the processes, build the controls, design the reporting, and drive it all into a functioning, reliable operation. Once the data is clean and the systems are yours, we start thinking strategically: budgets, forecasts, financial planning, and growth targets. But none of that happens until you’ve built the foundation.



This is also a role with genuine future potential. We fully intend for this to evolve. The right person could see this grow into its own function, potentially its own business line. We’re open to phantom stock or equity participation for someone who proves they’re the right long-term partner. But that starts with designing and delivering the basics, and that’s where we need you first.



What You’ll Actually Do



Design and Own the Books



Take over all accounting functions currently handled by the outsourced provider: accounts payable, accounts receivable, general ledger, bank reconciliations, and month-end close



Manage everything in QuickBooks: categorize transactions, ensure revenue and expenses end up in the right buckets, and maintain the chart of accounts



Prepare monthly, quarterly, and annual financial statements (P&L, balance sheet, cash flow)



Run payroll: receive hours from the Operations Manager weekly and process payroll accurately and on time



Pay all the bills. Every vendor invoice, every recurring charge, every payment — you own it



Handle light-touch bookkeeping for Integras



Design and document every financial process you build so it’s repeatable, auditable, and eventually delegable



Architect the Contract Engine



Own the full contract lifecycle in HaloPSA: creation, pricing, renewals, amendments, and terminations



Ensure every client agreement is accurately reflected in billing and revenue recognition



Monitor contract profitability and flag underperforming agreements before they become problems



Manage recurring revenue billing cycles and ensure invoices go out on time, every time



Work with the TAM and vCIO to structure new contracts and pricing for proposed services



Audit Vendor Spend



Cross-check every vendor charge against what we’re billing clients for. No more paying for services we’re not using or not passing through



Identify and eliminate wasted spend: parked domains, unused licenses, duplicate subscriptions, and services that should have been cancelled months ago



Manage vendor relationships and negotiate payment terms that work in our favor



Protect the Business



Maintain proper financial controls, documentation, and audit readiness



Ensure compliance with GAAP and all applicable federal, state, and local regulations



Coordinate with our external tax filing provider (who will continue to handle annual federal tax filings and conduct a year-end audit of the books)



Oversee insurance policies, business registrations, and financial regulatory requirements



Advise the CEO



Provide monthly financial reporting with plain-English commentary on what the numbers mean



Once data integrity is established, develop and manage annual budgets and rolling financial forecasts



Deliver strategic financial analysis to support growth decisions, hiring plans, and investment calls



Model scenarios for pricing changes, new service lines, and market expansion



Support the development of an aspirational revenue growth target (25%+) backed by a credible financial plan



Who We’re Looking For



You’re the person who sees a broken process and doesn’t just fix it — you redesign it so it never breaks again. You’re a practical problem-solver who gets genuine satisfaction from designing a workable solution and then driving it all the way to completion. You can explain a cash flow forecast to a CEO who doesn’t speak finance, and you can architect a billing process in HaloPSA that runs like clockwork. You’re not interested in theorizing about what could be better; you’re interested in building it and finishing it.



You’ll Need



CPA or equivalent qualification



5+ years of progressive accounting and finance experience, including full-cycle accounting



Strong working knowledge of US tax compliance (federal, state, payroll, sales tax)



Proficiency with QuickBooks (or equivalent accounting software)



Experience with recurring revenue billing and contract management



Demonstrated ability to produce financial statements, forecasts, and CEO-level reporting



Experience working directly with a CEO or business owner as their primary financial counsel



A track record of designing and building financial processes from scratch



Exceptional English communication skills, written and verbal



Reliable internet connection and professional remote working setup



Bonus Points For



Experience in a managed services provider, healthcare IT, or professional services environment



Familiarity with HaloPSA, ConnectWise Manage, or similar PSA billing platforms



Experience building a finance function from the ground up in a growing business



Understanding of healthcare compliance (HIPAA) as it intersects with financial operations



Previous CFO, VP Finance, or Controller experience in a company under 50 employees



Experience transitioning a business from outsourced to in-house financial management



What You Don’t Need



A team beneath you. This is a one-person finance function right now. You’re the whole department: the architect, the builder, the operator, and the advisor, all in one. If you need layers of analysts and accountants before you’ll touch a journal entry, this isn’t the right fit. As the business grows, there’s potential to bring support beneath you (we already have a tea
mber with capacity who could take on defined tasks once you’ve designed the processes and documented them clearly), but right now it’s you. The best people for this kind of role are the ones who get energy from creating something new and then seeing it through to the finish line.



What You’ll Get



Work that matters: Every dollar you manage, every contract you structure, directly funds the mission of eliminating repetitive IT tasks for 1 million healthcare workers.



A blank canvas: You’re not inheriting someone else’s system and maintaining it. You’re designing and building the financial function from the inside. If you get energy from creating something new and making it work, this is your role.



Strategic influence: Shape the financial direction of a growing healthcare IT company with direct access to the CEO from day one.



Autonomy and ownership: This is your function. You design it, you build it, you run it.



Growth potential: This role has a genuine path to equity participation and could evolve into its own business line. We’re open to phantom stock for the right person.



Mission alignment: Contribute directly to our North Star knowing that the financial health you protect is what makes the mission possible.



About ElasticIT



At ElasticIT, we’re building a world where healthcare workers never wait for technology. We’re the team that rescues healthcare providers when technology threatens patient care, turning chaos into clarity and empowering ordinary teams to achieve extraordinary results through the right technology.



We specialize in healthcare IT, providing managed services, custom software development, and HIPAA-compliant solutions that ensure medical professionals can focus on what matters most: their patients, not their systems. Our North Star is audacious yet simple: by 2050, we will eliminate repetitive IT tasks for 1 million healthcare workers, proving that the right technology makes ordinary people extraordinary.



Our Purpose



“To deliver the impossible under pressure so that organizations transform their perception of what’s possible.”



Our Values



Our values aren’t just words on a wall; they’re the blueprint for every interaction, every solution, and every relationship we build:



SIMPLIFY THE OVERWHELMING: Cut through confusion with clarity and convert half-hour tasks into one-click wins



RESCUE WHEN OTHERS PANIC: Respond when others would panic and deliver the impossible under pressure



BUILD LASTING CAPABILITY: Create tools that spread like wildfire and teams that work without micromanaging



PERSIST THROUGH CHAOS: Adapt when goalposts keep moving and turn disasters into relationships



ENABLE HUMAN PURPOSE: Remove barriers so the focus can be on patients, not systems



“In healthcare IT, the person who architects the financial engine is the person who makes everything else possible. You’re not counting beans; you’re building the machine that funds the mission.”



Ready to Apply?



Send your CV, short introduction video and a short note about a time you designed a financial process from scratch and drove it to completion. We’d rather hear about something you built than something you maintained. If you’ve taken a messy financial landscape and architected something that actually works, tell us that story.

title: Creative Designer Photo Editing Amazon Product Lifestyle Image & A+ Content

We provide Amazon listing-ready hero images, copy, and brand guidelines. Your job: turn them into polished, high-converting Amazon-ready lifestyle & informational creatives.

title: We’re looking for a Graphic Designer who "gets it"

Creating high-impact "Hero" images that stand out in a crowded search.

:

- Design and optimize prompts for Claude to support AI-driven features, client data processing, and automated insights.

- Develop and maintain APIs and backend services that connect PathFinder with third-party platforms (e.g., Segment, HubSpot, Salesforce, PostHog).

- Contribute to our React.js-based frontend UI for clients to interact with dashboards and insights.

- Build and maintain secure, scalable data pipelines for AI models and customer data processing.

- Collaborate with Customer Success to support onboarding configurations and client data needs.

- Troubleshoot bugs, develop patches, and ensure production reliability.

- Improve CI/CD workflows for faster, more reliable deployments.

- Implement logging, monitoring, and observability best practices.

- Manage context windows, prompt versioning, and LLM output guardrails for production-grade AI features.



Qualifications:

- 3+ years experience in full stack development (Node.js, React.js).

- Hands-on experience with prompt engineering for Claude (Anthropic), including iterative prompt testing, few-shot prompting, and chain-of-thought techniques.

- Proven experience with API integrations and data platforms like 
.

- Strong understanding of database design, data pipelines, and analytics tooling.

- Familiarity with cloud-native development, security best practices, and scalable architecture.

-Excellent problem-solving skills, particularly in debugging production issues

title: HUMAN RESOURCES

The Human Resources Coordinator shall perform the following duties, including but not limited to:

- Strong organizational skills and the ability to maintain a high degree of confidentiality regarding sensitive personnel information.

- Stable internet connection and ability to adhere to the specified EST work schedule.

title: Web Designer & Developer (Virtual Assistant)
description:
About the Role



We are a growing agency looking for a talented and reliable Web Designer & Developer to join our remote team. In this role, you will be the creative and technical engine behind our clients' websites, designing beautiful mockups in Figma and bringing them to life on WordPress. You will also support clients on Wix and Squarespace with ongoing updates and maintenance.

This is a full-time position with consistent work, clear communication, and a supportive team. We're looking for someone who takes ownership of their work, communicates proactively, and delivers high-quality output on time.



What You'll Be Doing



• Design professional website mockups in Figma (primarily 2 mockups per project, desktop and mobile views)

• Develop and build websites on WordPress based on approved Figma designs

• Perform ongoing website updates and edits for clients on Wix and Squarespace

• Ensure websites are responsive, fast-loading, and cross-browser compatible

• Implement basic on-page SEO best practices during development

• Communicate project progress and flag any blockers or timeline concerns proactively

• Revise designs and builds based on client and internal feedback

• Maintain organized project files and documentation



Requirements



Design Skills



• Strong proficiency in Figma, you can design clean, modern, and client-ready mockups independently

• Good eye for layout, typography, and visual hierarchy

• Experience designing for both desktop and mobile

• Experience in graphic design, creating ads for social media when needed



Development Skills



• Solid experience building websites on WordPress (themes, Elementor or similar page builders, custom CSS)

• Comfortable making updates and edits on Wix and Squarespace

• Basic knowledge of HTML and CSS

• Ability to translate a Figma design into a pixel-accurate website build



Work Style & Communication



• Fluent in written English, clear, professional communication is a must

• Reliable with deadlines and able to manage your own time effectively

• Comfortable using tools like Slack, Trello, Asana, or similar project management platforms

• Responds to messages within business hours and proactively communicates updates

Nice to Have (Not Required)

• Experience with WooCommerce or basic e-commerce setups

• Familiarity with Google Analytics, Search Console, or basic SEO tools

• Experience creating amazing graphic designs in Canva or Adobe tools

• Knowledge of website speed optimization (image compression, caching plugins, etc.)



What We Offer



• $7/hr Paid Semi Monthly 15th and last day of the month (tracked)

• Full-time, fully remote position, work from wherever you are

• Stable, ongoing work with a consistent flow of projects

• Supportive team environment with clear briefs and feedback

• Long-term opportunity for the right candidate, we're not looking for short-term help



How to Apply



If you think you are the right person for this role, please create and send us a 1-minute video introducing yourself, sharing your background, and explaining why you would be the best person for this role. Please also forward your resume and your earliest available start date to Contact at umteencompany dot com. Candidates will not be interviewed if you do not send a 1-minute video.

title: ***AMAZING Video Editor Needed (Sora 2 + UGC Style E-Commerce Ads) Needed ASAP***
description:
We are a fast-growing e-commerce company looking for an experienced Video Editor with Sora 2 experience who can create UGC-style video ads for eCommerce brands.



This is the most important requirement for this role.



If you have experience producing high-converting UGC-style ads for platforms like
, Instagram, and TikTok, we want to hear from you.



Responsibilities

• Create and edit UGC-style video ads for eCommerce products using Sora 2 and other AI tools.

• Produce high-performing videos for Meta Ads, TikTok Ads, and social media campaigns.

• Work with our marketing team to develop engaging ad creatives that drive conversions.

• Implement feedback quickly and deliver fast iterations for ad testing.

• Enhance videos with captions, hooks, sound effects, motion graphics, and color grading.

• Stay updated with latest UGC ad trends and AI video generation tools.



Requirements

• Experience with Sora 2 (required).

• Strong experience creating UGC-style ads for eCommerce brands.

• Portfolio showing performance-focused ad creatives.

• Proficiency with tools like Premiere Pro, After Effects, Final Cut, CapCut, or similar.

• Fluent English and strong communication skills.

• Ability to work fast and iterate based on feedback.



Preferred

• Experience working with DTC brands.

• Familiarity with AI video tools and workflows.

• Understanding of Meta / TikTok ad creative formats.

• Experience creating videos optimized for conversion and ad performance.



If you’re passionate about creating high-converting eCommerce ad creatives, we’d love to work with you.



Looking forward to your application.





Good luck, and Best wishes.

title: AI Video Editor Facebook Ads
description:
Hello Future Employee,



Who are we?

We are a fast-growing e-commerce company operating Shopify brand stores across Europe, generating consistent 6-figure monthly revenue. We specialize in emotionally-driven direct response advertising.



We are hiring an AI Video Editor to produce AI video ads for our brand. The right candidate will have a sharp eye for realism, understand what makes an AI generator feel authentic (not staged), and be eager to learn our specific creative frameworks. A creative, fast-paced environment with real ownership of output

Long-term growth potential as the team scales

Best Regards,

ASG

title: Med Spa Appointment Setter (Female)
description:
We help med spas pack their calendars with lip filler and 
 appointments using
 ads. You will be the first voice our clients’ leads hear. That means you are not “just a caller” – you are the front line of revenue.



We have a lot of fun, but we take our work very seriously. The goal is simple:

Be the best.

Have fun doing it.



We do not hire people to “try sales.” We hire people who want to get very good at it. If that sounds like you, keep reading. 



Schedule: flexible 5 days per week, must be available to help out some weekends, Here are the hours in EST 

Morning shift: 8 am – 3 pm EST

Evening shift: 3 pm – 11 pm EST



What You Will Do:

You will live in two modes all day: Hunting leads and Closing leads



Hunting:

Call new leads within 60 seconds every time you are not already on a call. This is non negotiable. Speed to first contact is the biggest driver of show rates. 

Work all clients’ leads in priority order:

Use GHL, Slack and our internal workflows so no lead is ever left behind.

Run our C.L.O.S.E.R. scripts word for word, naturally.

Clarify their goals, label their problem, understand what they’ve tried, then book them into the right offer.

Handle concerns and reinforce their decision so they actually show.



What Success Looks Like...

You are winning here if:

New leads are called in under 60 seconds 

You rehearse the script so much you can breathe it

You follow up a lot, and you personalize them based on the lead’s goal



Compensation:

Base: $500 USD per month + $1,000 Performance pay for doing minimum daily tasks: + (100% of current setters hit this, it is the standard, not a stretch)

Bonuses:

Monthly performance challenges up to +$500 USD extra

Uncapped +$5 USD bonus  for every low ticket booking you generate

Realistic monthly earnings for a solid performer: $1,500 USD





We pay for results and consistency. If you show up, work the system, and hit your numbers, you will earn well above typical VA roles.

Requirements

Non?negotiables:

Comfortable working EST shifts (either 8 am – 3 pm or 3 pm – 11 pm), 5 days per week including rotating weekends with your teammates.





Strong spoken English with a clear, neutral accent that works for US patients.





Internet at least 100 Mbps up and down, stable power (or a reliable backup).





Quality headset, quiet workspace, large monitor + laptop.





Experience in appointment setting, call center, sales, or high?volume customer support is preferred, but raw coachability and work ethic matter more.





Tools you will use daily: GoHighLevel (GHL), Slack





How We Train You:

You get a full playbook and training system:

Daily script rehearsal, roleplays, and call reviews in week one.

A detailed Appointment Setter Handbook that shows you exactly how to win here.

Ongoing coaching so your skills and income go up over time.





The people who win here:

Show up every day and do the repetitive work.

Take notes, ask questions, and actually fix their mistakes.

Treat this like a career, not a side hustle.





**How To Apply**

Send over a voice recording from 
 talking about:



- Why you think you’d be a fit for this role

- Any relevant experience (preferred, not required)

- A goal want to achieve (can be short or long term)



If I like how it sounds, I’ll respond with the next steps for getting started

title: Experienced Real Estate Cold Caller
description:
We are looking for a reliable, experienced cold caller based in the Philippines to support our real estate business. This is a long-term position with room for growth.



Requirements

-Excellent spoken and written English

-Strong computer skills

-High-speed, reliable internet connection

-Proven cold calling experience in real estate industry

-Prior administrative experience



Experience using:

-Google Workspace (Docs, Sheets, Gmail, Drive)

-Excel / Google Sheets

-Constant Contact (or similar
 marketing tools)



Bonus Skills (Not Required, But a Plus)

-Wufoo

-Zapier

-Mojo Dialer



Schedule

Monday–Friday

8:00 AM – 5:00 PM EST

1-hour unpaid break



Compensation

$400–$500 per week, based on experience



Paid bi-weekly

-Opportunity for raises and increased responsibility over time



What We’re Looking For

-Detail-oriented and organized

-Comfortable speaking with leads over the phone

-Dependable and able to work independently

-Long-term mindset — we want someone to grow with us!!!





Advanced Screening Questions (Experienced VAs Only)

This role is NOT entry-level.

Only apply if you have hands-on real estate VA and cold calling experience.



Answer all questions in detail. One-line answers will be rejected.



1. Real Estate Experience (Required)

List:



The real estate company/investor you worked for

Your exact responsibilities

Length of time in each role

(Be specific. General answers will be rejected.)



2. Cold Calling Experience (Required)



Answer all:

What type of real estate leads did you call? (expireds, FSBO, probate, absentee, tired landlords, etc.)

Average number of calls per day?

What was your goal on the call? (set appointments, qualify sellers, transfer live, etc.)

Which dialer(s) did you use?



3. Objection Handling

When a seller says “I’m not interested”, write out exactly what you say next.



4. Tools & Systems

Check only the tools you have actually used in a real role and briefly explain how:

-Google Workspace

-Excel / Google Sheets (formulas, tracking, or reports you handled)

-Constant Contact or similar
 platforms

-Mojo Dialer

-Wufoo

-Zapier



5. Data & Admin Skills

Describe:

-How you have tracked leads and call results

-How you ensured data accuracy in spreadsheets or CRMs

-Any reports you created for management



6. Schedule & Commitment

Confirm YES or NO:

You can work 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM EST, Monday–Friday

You are seeking a long-term role (12+ months)

You are comfortable making daily outbound calls



Explain any “NO” answers.



7. Internet & Equipment (Required)

Provide:

-Internet speed test (download/upload)

-Computer/laptop specs

-Headset model

-Backup internet or power (if any)



Start your
 subject line with this exact phrase: “Experienced Real Estate Caller – EST Ready.”

Include links to an audio sample and DISC Assessment taken in the last 60 days.

Nice to Have (but not required)

 • Basic graphic design tools (Canva, Figma)

 • Experience working with remote teams

description:
We're a fast-growing brand producing short-form AI-generated 

videos featuring a branded authority figure character. We need 

a full-time video editor who can take our scripts, reference 

images, and AI tools and turn them into polished 1-3 minute 

videos for Instagram and
.



THIS IS NOT A TRADITIONAL VIDEO EDITING ROLE. You will NOT be 

filming or editing real human footage. You will be working with:

- AI-generated avatars (reference images provided)

- AI-generated images (Nano Banana Pro via Flow)

- AI-generated video clips (Veo3 & HeyGen) 

- AI-generated voice (ElevenLabs)

- Assembling everything in CapCut



EXPERIENCE REQUIRED:

? Previous experience editing AI-generated content for 

   authority figure / character-based pages (REQUIRED — if you 

   haven't done this before, this is not the role for you)

? 1+ year hands-on experience with CapCut Pro

? Hands-on experience with Veo3

? Hands-on experience with HeyGen

? Strong understanding of short-form vertical content 

   (Instagram Reels)

? Ability to follow detailed brand guidelines

? Excellent English writing (for captions)

? Fast, reliable internet



WHAT YOU'LL DO:

- Receive approved scripts and reference images from our team

- Generate the talking-head videos in Veo3 and/or HeyGen using our brand 

  avatar and voice

- Generate B-roll and supplementary clips in Veo3 as overlays (this will be 

  a significant part of the work)

- Edit and assemble final videos in CapCut

- Add captions and effects optimized for short-form

- Deliver 3 ready-to-post videos per day (Mon-Fri)

- Communicate with Team Leader via 



TRAINING REQUIRED:

Before starting, you will be required to complete a training 

series that teaches our exact workflow for creating these 

videos -- including AI image generation, Veo3 prompting, HeyGen 

setup, ElevenLabs voice configuration, and CapCut editing 

techniques specific to this style of content. We will provide 

access to this training at no cost to you. Completion is 

mandatory before beginning paid work.



You do not need prior experience in our specific industry -- 

just the technical AI video editing skills and a willingness 

to learn our exact process.

- CapCut Pro

- HeyGen

- ElevenLabs

- Veo3 / Flow

- Nano Banana Pro

- Google Drive

-

 messages within

- $400 USD/month, paid weekly

- Paid sample video project before trial

- 2-week paid trial period after sample

- Long-term stable role — we are looking to hire for the 

  long haul



HIRING PROCESS:

1. Application review

2. Short video intro (30-60 seconds) to confirm you're real 

   and serious, we're looking for only serious players.

TO APPLY:

   AI-generated authority figure characters (links required)

2. A 30-60 second video introducing yourself in English, telling 

   us why you're a fit for this role

3. Answers to these questions:

     (Specifically Veo3, HeyGen, ElevenLabs, Nano Banana)

4. Include the word "SOURSOP" at the start of your message so

Applications without a video intro or without referencing "SOURSOP" at the start of your message will not be considered.

title: Dispatcher
description:
About the role



One Janitorial is a fast-growing commercial cleaning company. We are restructuring operations so that all inbound calls and tickets flow through a single Dispatcher. You will be the nerve centre of our business — the one person who receives every request, routes it correctly, and keeps our field teams and alliances moving without friction.



This is not a quiet admin role. It is high-volume, high-stakes, and fast-paced. We want a killer — someone who thrives under pressure and takes full ownership of their queue.



What you'll do



° Own every inbound call and ticket — you are the single point of contact for all dispatch activity

° Type accurately and quickly while speaking on the phone — simultaneously, every time

° Log, categorize, and route tickets to the correct area or tea
mber with zero hand-holding

° Enforce the new communication protocol — callers contact us on our terms, not theirs

° Liaise between field staff, BCOs, and internal departments to resolve issues in real time

° Escalate only what genuinely requires escalation; resolve everything else yourself

° Maintain a clean, up-to-date CRM — every interaction logged before the next call comes in

° Spot patterns in recurring issues and flag systemic problems to management

° Uphold a calm, professional, authoritative voice regardless of caller behaviour



What we need



° 3+ years in a high-volume dispatch, call centre, or operations coordination role

° Exceptional spoken and written English — clear, confident, and warm

° Proven ability to type and talk simultaneously without degrading either

° Strong CRM experience (ServiceTitan, Jobber, HubSpot, or similar)

° Track record handling upset clients and high-stress situations without escalating tension

° Fast problem-solver who does not need step-by-step instructions to get to the right answer

° Reliable internet connection and a professional, quiet work environment



What success looks like



° Every call answered, every ticket placed accurately — same day

° Zero missed or misdirected tickets after the 30-day onboarding window

° Management can trust the queue without checking it



How to apply



Submit a 2–3 minute introduction video via Loom or any accessible platform answering the four questions below.

Keep your video concise, clear, and professional. We want to hear you think — not a rehearsed script. Speak naturally and be specific.

We process all applications through 
. Only applicants with a video submission will be considered.



1. Walk us through your experience in a high-volume dispatch, call centre, or operations coordination role — how many calls or tickets did you handle daily, and what systems did you use to stay on top of everything?



2. Tell us about a time a caller was extremely upset or a situation was about to fall apart on your watch. What did you do, and what was the outcome?



3. This role requires you to type accurately in a CRM while actively speaking on the phone. Describe your experience doing this — give us a real sense of your speed and how you maintain accuracy under pressure.



4. What makes you confident you can own a single-point-of-contact dispatch role immediately — where every call and ticket flows through you and you alone?



We're looking for someone who takes full ownership, stays calm under pressure, and moves fast. If that's you, we want to hear from you.



APPLY HERE DIRECTLY:

title: Female Schedule Coordinator/Call Intaker
description:
JOB SUMMARY:

We are looking for a dependable and detail-oriented Homecare Scheduler/call Intaker to manage caregiver and client schedules, handling all inbound calls, serving as a knowledgeable first point of contact for prospective clients and families for our US-based home care operations. This role plays a key part in ensuring accurate scheduling, timely communication, and high-quality service delivery while maintaining confidentiality and compliance.





KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

* Create, manage, and update schedules for caregivers/home health aides (HHA)

* Coordinate client schedules based on care plans and staff availability

* Communicate daily schedule changes with caregivers, clients, and healthcare personnel

* Maintain accurate staff and client records in scheduling and database systems

* Track and update compliance requirements (e.g., TB, CQA, admissions, discharges)

* Prepare and maintain scheduling reports and statistics

* Ensure scheduling systems are accurate and up to date

* Escalate scheduling conflicts to the Team Manager

* Build professional relationships with clients to ensure excellent service delivery

* Perform general administrative and office support tasks as needed

* Answer, screen, and direct all incoming calls from both locations in a professional and timely manner

* Accurately transfer calls to the appropriate location, department, or staff member

* Serve as the first point of contact for new client inquiries — explaining services, pricing, and care options 

* Document all call activity, client inquiries, and scheduling changes in the agency's software system

* Communicate clearly with caregivers, clients, family members, and office staff across both locations

* Support Care Coordinators by relaying intake information and pre-qualifying prospective client calls

* Maintain confidentiality and comply with HIPAA guidelines at all times



WORK SCHEDULE/SHIFT AVAILABILITY:

Must be open to potential on-call shifts as operational needs evolve



QUALIFICATIONS (Preferred):

High school diploma or GED required

Nursing experience is  highly preferred

Minimum 1–2 years of experience in home care, healthcare, or a medical office setting

Prior scheduling or call center experience strongly preferred

Ability to identify clinical concerns when speaking with clients or caregivers and escalate appropriately

Strong understanding of care levels, service types, and insurance/private pay basics

Strong phone etiquette and interpersonal communication skills

Ability to multitask and work under pressure in a fast-paced environment

Strong organizational, time-management, and communication skills

High attention to detail and accuracy

Ability to manage frequent schedule changes

Familiarity with healthcare databases and compliance requirements

WellSky CRM Experience is a plus

Knowledge of HIPAA and patient privacy standards





APPLICATION INSTRUCTIONS (Important):

Attach your updated resume

Subject line must be formatted exactly as: Last Name, First Name – Homecare Scheduler

Only 10 application points will be accepted

Applications that do not follow these instructions will be disregarded

title: Video Editor
description:
Type: Part-Time (Freelance or Employment, flexible) | Location: Remote



About Us



MultiBase is an AI-driven Business Intelligence company based in Germany. We help companies make better decisions through our proprietary D
 methodology, world-class consulting, and soon-to-be-launched enablement platform. We are currently launching our YouTube channel and scaling our content engine — and we need a video editor who can make our frameworks and ideas visually unforgettable.



We are looking for someone who does not just cut footage together, but truly understands visual storytelling. Someone who can take a talking head video and transform it into something visually compelling through custom motion graphics, purposeful animations, and smart visual effects. Someone who understands that every element on screen should serve the content, not just fill space.



Tasks

What You Will Work On



Editing long-form YouTube videos (typically 5–10 minutes, talking head format) focused on BI methodology, frameworks, and thought leadership

YouTube channel content: framework explainer videos, methodology breakdowns, and thought leadership pieces

Creating short-form content for Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts, and Meta ads (9:16 and 1:1 formats)

Producing landing page and corporate videos with a clean, minimal, professional look

Repurposing long-form content into short-form clips optimized for different platforms

Requirements

What We Are Looking For



Strong motion graphics and custom animation skills (After Effects or equivalent)

Proven experience in video editing for B2B or corporate content

AI-assisted workflow: You use AI tools (for transcription, rough cuts, subtitle generation, thumbnail concepts, etc.) as a default — not as an afterthought

Ownership mentality: You don't wait for feedback on obvious issues — you fix them, flag them, and move on

Proactive communication: You share progress, flag delays early, and don't disappear

Ability to maintain a consistent brand identity across different formats and platforms

Fast turnaround and reliable, structured communication

An eye for quality — you should care about the details without being asked

Nice to have: YouTube thumbnail design experience

This Role Is Not For You If…



You want to "just execute briefs." We need someone who thinks about content strategically, proposes ideas, and continuously raises the quality bar.



How to Apply



Please share your portfolio along with two or three examples that best represent your work. If you have examples that reflect advanced motion graphics or custom animations, please highlight these specifically.
